body:
A 10X Match for Patriots

|
---

Peter,

Marco Rubio here. Since you're a TOP Republican in your area, I wanted to share a special offer with you to support Senate Republicans like myself and Ted Budd. _If you use[**this link**](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=e3a514090d894169a064145a577cd3b5&_e=Tt9HgqsUbpZRoaZxVOjuIVirgkf637Y4BZsmS7dhnsnTsXnZqdtG49H1v2zDV9cYyqQoIqezYwpPD_PBkdhgBDtDyAZGa9kxyN5apmmT-IB7tHBKav4YlwEFmqGsyWqUCTjD-bN13oDYSgOvVC-22UWzSQQ1_ZiUaLqQV8EExkvxE6lwYCNP3T_cvLB8VzfmQujAsaIMoXFKnIYNDhjlv79hVKPe_CFKHTYgXM4V5PkQjmS58W7De7THbPYisSdYIOxBjFe_fbpiQddUlbkfDpg-RHfMPrjFlvmLu3BuXAIXtJ1NvOG7lZa8ltfgDEE7CFoI03OJYm92OOudrKLDP2KoF6bJ5pZKTETNozmeNFymAB-cKrmry7fQc0v5xr7GiblB4wnYP6WzogSnEJGQ3YNJuQX_ft_bzxk_tL63xYjBW3GgaSdt5F9Uf8NYx1biSOmRcENjLHUXjMJGDJmGmeuOGb8zsm3k-p5iMoSyqEMwA0KxAm6kPntY70IKAk2-Q0G_4h32ASazKL2bAJmsVA%3D%3D), you can activate an exclusive 10X Match._ But first, let me explain why we appreciate your support so much.

American Patriots, like you, Peter, are the backbone of our country. You're the reason we come to work every day to fight. You are the reason that we put ourselves on the front line against the radical left and their extreme agenda. You are the reason we fight against Big Tech, fight to protect the Second Amendment, and fight to secure our southern border.

Words only go so far. So, how can we show you how much we appreciate your support?

We can only extend this gracious offer to a select few American Patriots. That's why YOU, Peter, are getting this email. [**You are one of our TOP supporters, and we hope you 'll take advantage of this exclusive offer.**](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=e3a514090d894169a064145a577cd3b5&_e=Tt9HgqsUbpZRoaZxVOjuIVirgkf637Y4BZsmS7dhnsnTsXnZqdtG49H1v2zDV9cYyqQoIqezYwpPD_PBkdhgBDtDyAZGa9kxyN5apmmT-IB7tHBKav4YlwEFmqGsyWqUCTjD-bN13oDYSgOvVC-22UWzSQQ1_ZiUaLqQV8EExkvxE6lwYCNP3T_cvLB8VzfmQujAsaIMoXFKnIYNDhjlv79hVKPe_CFKHTYgXM4V5PkQjmS58W7De7THbPYisSdYIOxBjFe_fbpiQddUlbkfDpg-RHfMPrjFlvmLu3BuXAIXtJ1NvOG7lZa8ltfgDEE7CFoI03OJYm92OOudrKLDP2KoF6bJ5pZKTETNozmeNFymAB-cKrmry7fQc0v5xr7GbcD3ioITI2OY-y-p_kzC63GW6k0lwyrQ6aLhemw9gcyqAARanUTG6hTWtUytVeWVvqDcT-efL24flDa3PYtlCj9xOci1vecOKPbTM7UWbMizM9iUDPioU-cFrv0iL184ugNYE1isML0CDY9HCutA1Q%3D%3D)

Use this link to claim your exclusive 10X match: [**LINK >>**](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=e3a514090d894169a064145a577cd3b5&_e=Tt9HgqsUbpZRoaZxVOjuIVirgkf637Y4BZsmS7dhnsnTsXnZqdtG49H1v2zDV9cYyqQoIqezYwpPD_PBkdhgBDtDyAZGa9kxyN5apmmT-IB7tHBKav4YlwEFmqGsyWqUCTjD-bN13oDYSgOvVC-22UWzSQQ1_ZiUaLqQV8EExkvxE6lwYCNP3T_cvLB8VzfmQujAsaIMoXFKnIYNDhjlv79hVKPe_CFKHTYgXM4V5PkQjmS58W7De7THbPYisSdYIOxBjFe_fbpiQddUlbkfDpg-RHfMPrjFlvmLu3BuXAIXtJ1NvOG7lZa8ltfgDEE7CFoI03OJYm92OOudrKLDP2KoF6bJ5pZKTETNozmeNFymAB-cKrmry7fQc0v5xr7GgCgpH7uFwCT7Khx0P0NpXEe095q4BvNWnE-aReRG9ktOFF5ONofydIHAsgC7l-AmBYUWqcqMRa4AahXeu0-kyQrcETjWiV15m22T8w8_qT1S5ya9c2O4ECLSpiz7n8H1HthjHpLgt0NbX97eqGTJBw%3D%3D)

Senator Marco Rubio and Senator Ted Budd

Fellow American,

**I’m putting the White House on notice.**

I plan to block every single one of Joe Biden’s nominees until every single classified document taken by the Department of Justice is turned over to Congress.

**_No one is above the law._**

[**No information?_No confirmations!_ >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9ff106c06034d5a8b2fcd2da21128f6&_e=_HvXY3Jplsz37nA7f1U2l5daVY5W9foZqL00IrSvgYI7MMhL-VVTRA_a99xuMl6c5mw5uHnYnEF3Sq9NrywQQOyEXvOTfwsD5ZBwBpFXyB8Z3WogPpts9qeVk9BqUi7327wBrYyNAAjYWeMhE2gEvOVOtMT2xm8jyANMmFnwWqzdwPKtcR1QipJGtEDQwmJgF6KkVvBQyuPS6943OIiMizzN6dWZxUTqEbFnFdOCg_7pY06ks2xc4HPdSoDjW7GT0Po1pJxeI-hHQjj4plZUeiHCCMwPKKtMmlg5GT2ZiAay0HO6dknSfDyrB76AoSC8O_nnd3OuoaC5LN2LLc9K1wBk6dze9wmoEriQAhsw20si-uPGt4D4ro9L_FVUg7L5vPQoqSfjc5LJP7efnN5oq40WU0Fmd3GL1wEwFrk-VFhn-74nUFlImBeA1ZdZP02PXUlMdH-pjXYTlf2_A5d6NA%3D%3D)
We will not stand for stonewalling. **We must know if our national security was put at risk by President Biden’s mishandling of classified documents.** And until the White House cooperates, they will feel pain.

[**If you agree, add your name to let me know you support my decision to block Biden’s nominees until every classified document is turned over.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9ff106c06034d5a8b2fcd2da21128f6&_e=_HvXY3Jplsz37nA7f1U2l5daVY5W9foZqL00IrSvgYI7MMhL-VVTRA_a99xuMl6c5mw5uHnYnEF3Sq9NrywQQOyEXvOTfwsD5ZBwBpFXyB8Z3WogPpts9qeVk9BqUi7327wBrYyNAAjYWeMhE2gEvOVOtMT2xm8jyANMmFnwWqzdwPKtcR1QipJGtEDQwmJgF6KkVvBQyuPS6943OIiMizzN6dWZxUTqEbFnFdOCg_7pY06ks2xc4HPdSoDjW7GT0Po1pJxeI-hHQjj4plZUeiHCCMwPKKtMmlg5GT2ZiAay0HO6dknSfDyrB76AoSC8Kmwpr5LleY4D_WvIbcYbX7tgJSAKVPiTPN1rQWp0ZBgHWMsIDAhkIO5j4B9z7_DbT8nxPqZwrff8LnR9goUWhNZ2dyVJm0ZFKG_LOEqz4H315zlBCcgL7UTo484xALDpLIs-0H-aRlGbuP_1ZJPUwA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Fellow American, I’m putting the White House on notice. I plan to block every single one of Joe Biden’s nominees until every single classified document taken by the Department of Justice is turned over to Congress. No one is above the law. We will not stand for stonewalling. We must know if our national security was put at risk by President Biden’s mishandling of classified documents. And until the White House cooperates, they will feel pain. In service, Tom Cotton (R-AR) If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! name: Bob Casey
subject: Thank you for sticking with me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
This year started off much different than I expected, but one thing stayed the same: your continued support. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58328031/390746197/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RmZTYxMC1jMGE1LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FlOvTOCMQdd1oUoXY911eH5CPyNo9gKs99J3wg8IIkk=&emci=70e56c44-a0a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=47dfe610-c0a5-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter,

This year started off much different than I expected, but one thing stayed the same: your continued support.

Because people just like you stepped up last month, our team just reached another ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal.

As the new Congress has begun to take shape, we've already seen a preview of how Republicans plan to use their power to frame their 2024 campaigns.

My focus is different. I'm committed to using my position to get things done, fight for your values, and put people ahead of politics — because that's what you elected me to do.

We have a great deal of work left, and I'm ready for the fights ahead.

Thank you for fighting alongside me.

Bob

P.S. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel?=
subject: 📌I Need Your Input!📌
body:
I'm interviewing General Michael Flynn this week! What do you think I should ask him? | | | |
---
| | |
---
**Rachel & 3-Star General Michael Flynn**
|
# **__I want to hear from you!!__**
---
|
---
|
---
| I have the privilege of interviewing General Michael Flynn this week! I'd love to hear from _you_ with any questions you'd like for me to ask him. Simply 'reply to sender' and give me your ideas.

_**Be sure to subscribe to my Rumble Channel so you can watch the interview! **_
Subscribe here:
[https://rumble.com/user/TheRachelHammShow](https://RachelHammSOS.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2a4361c438b0f1b15ed7ec95&id=2f7f3da227&e=5fa0631807 "Rachel's Rumble Channel")
Then, tune in Wednesday, February 8th at 10AM, PST to see if I ask your question!
---
|
---
|
### _Just in case you're not familiar with who General Michael Flynn is...._
With more than 33 years of service in the United States military and current Chairman of **[America’s Future](https://RachelHammSOS.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2a4361c438b0f1b15ed7ec95&id=ac7041300e&e=5fa0631807)** , General Flynn’s military career culminated as the Director of the Defense Intelligence Agency (DIA) and as the nation’s highest serving military intelligence officer. After retiring from the Army in 2014, General Flynn went on to serve in a variety of business, educational, and non-profit roles. He also actively supports veterans’ organizations around the country. His public service included selection and service as a foreign policy advisor to several Republican U.S. presidential candidates (2016) and subsequent appointment and service as the National Security Advisor to the 45th President of the United States of America. General Flynn is a **[National Bestselling Author](https://RachelHammSOS.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2a4361c438b0f1b15ed7ec95&id=bd3ead9326&e=5fa0631807)** , holds three master’s degrees, and is recipient of numerous military, intelligence and law enforcement awards. He is married to his beautiful wife Lori whom he started dating when he was just 13 years old! They have two sons and several grandchildren.

General Flynn also endorsed me to be Secretary of State for the state of California in 2022.

I first met General Flynn in November of 2020. Getting to know him these last 3 years has been a joy. I have so much respect for him and am honored that he's allowing me to interview him! I hope you'll join us on Wednesday!
---
|
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Don't tell your parents..."
body:
We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help t
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That’s why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1lc2ti03m07o4hcadksh0392tie2uas4lj6096o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdge8oj4cth2bs) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** ’s great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They’re not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm6kr4hk43a2hi56atlh2q5geol1tttbsjs50a4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdge8oj4cth2bs) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents andthe community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zho07o4n26e3kls2mqigps2vdq3qstqr0h45tlh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdge8oj4cth2bs) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today – $50, $100, $250 or more – I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits – we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztgdsh8s83059jjf7mr2an42u4fod69v0sng6f50_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdge8oj4cth2bs) We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
|
---

clean_body: We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help t | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on Laura Ingraham ’s great Fox News show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”. These people are not real teachers. They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read... They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic... They’re not concerned with teaching history... They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents andthe community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit The Ingraham Angle , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold them accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today – $50, $100, $250 or more – I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits – we WIN them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon | | | P.S. The grooming and indoctrination happening in our schools must be stopped – and making the schools and individual “teachers” pay is the only way! name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Will You Join Me Tonight To Pray For America w/Roger Stone?
body:
Tonight Is IMPORTANT! I want to personally invite you to join me tonight for Pastor's For Trump National Prayer Call with special guest Roger Stone.
| | |
---
## Tonight Is IMPORTANT!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10261.1.21074d42c1201eff458a4cfe694adf7f)
---
**I want to personally invite you** to join me tonight for [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10262.1.001ff9239771f89d30acd3cce3ceae51) National Prayer Call with special guest **Roger Stone**.
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the Netflix documentary ‘ _Get Me Roger Stone_.’
A veteran of ten national presidential campaigns, he served as a senior campaign aide to three Republican presidents: **Nixon** , **Reagan** , and **Trump**.
Mr. Stone will provide us with **insights** and **updates** regarding the 2024 race for the White House.
We will have Pastors from across the nation lead us in a time of prayer and I believe it is important for you to join us.
This National Prayer Call is not just for Pastors only but for believers across America. Therefore, encourage others to join in!
You can join the Prayer Call by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10263.1.73ca90460375940cb7d2f73489b329d6) or through [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10264.1.2d31dd583eadf51d9850dec730a5acca), [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10265.1.6a25dfc2ebb203c39753bb03db6e9761) & [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10266.1.bf23b02cd912013b80bd0766c05ddd0f).
The National Prayer Call will take place on Monday, February 6 at 7:30pm EST.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10267.1.5c7a1684cb48f2d65439c63bf2803039), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10268.1.c27a7ea77287126e25a778061575a89b), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10269.1.4084f9ec36333cc6445d7bd0ecf3cc32), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10270.1.937804f8d7b7c6feb02c850f9ba9a0cb), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10271.1.960708dcfe1b92b56ff285901e08f949) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10272.1.3b98ebf4a6eae31b8d5de0b55d5ff505)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10273.1.25c3129f1e918dd4d1e4647dd8e38940)
| | [ Join The National Prayer Call ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10274.1.1f4d88a0cb8dc9629e33252fa3f66e33)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10275.1.d4167d667548f4e471327752cf8a6037)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10276.1.9bdda0f9a00916f5d14d8546073ee46b) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10277.1.df061ad1b754020c48de49470e9d53bf)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10278.1.1c80b04e45553c43cb7936dbb3a81395) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10279.1.c0872a4decca41ddc713973edc275b8f) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10280.1.09f7baff61eaaa9420a02f84beea3c17) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10281.1.bced48a2f1f10bed7639891d54a4b61c) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10282.1.f357e41e701707cb59b00d52e9055992) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10283.1.0126ffd39abb6a83199349cf21e3036e) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---
## Sheridan.Church Is Coming To OKC!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10284.1.1af5af88b67899d4e17cf10b0dc435ee)
---
**I am excited to announce** that [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10285.1.c6c5b3844ffcf177f59654d9b39d1688) in Tulsa, OK is launching a **new campus in Oklahoma City!**
If you or someone you know lives in the OKC Metro and is searching for a Church Home, then I want to invite you to join me for a [Interest Meet & Greet](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10286.1.46d60da8ab8201dc5eaf0562e08b0eb0).
**Date** : Saturday, February 25, 2023
**Time** : 5:00 - 6:30 pm
**Location** : 2222 W. Hefner Rd. Oklahoma City, OK 73120
**RSVP** : [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/846320](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10287.1.f994af0c3c0f3797c3ac40409e381811)
To learn more about [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10288.1.c4774a1e127f49aaf51ec47b861e58a4) please visit: [www.sheridan.church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17537156.10289.1.4a7e3df788fad9044c0c7bbfad895866)

| Endorsement Alert Colonel Mike Flanagan

| Dear Friend, Sunday after church, we had a well attended event in Goochland County where I was honored to have received the endorsement of fellow veteran, fellow Goochlander and friend, Colonel Mike Flanagan, COO of [American Veterans Vote](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xfi2OKI01PkwcYEbHZV9oJWxB_JJ-kMDFjwfkh8PNc0dSkBAjdZDCSxKQRXL30ekUw0BeSt4mdaNH9rETPzV5JIciZXu-ijLCVwDecMhokJQPBfjz7jT1J4f11AV94KBjdWDAmx-0s9SjG-mZhn11_QUjGlAY4gG&c=WYJiUKe_pmmAbP3_mNQa9hc5wx_sq30X-4sZhWbLVoJxfztM7zep9A==&ch=QMfBymWdS_LjtPSClwoFed-tFpmtqMhNmhZEN9ghymcNv71s-NAKOg==), for my Virginia State Senate District 10 campaign!

---|---
|
"John is a fellow Veteran and true patriot. I am endorsing John because of his character and his tenacity to get results. John has a solid conservative voting record in the House of Delegates, so we do not have to guess or worry about how he will vote in the Virginia State Senate. I'm bringing ten plus friends to the convention on May 6. Please join me by becoming a delegate and bringing ten friends to the convention as well."

-Colonel Mike Flanagan (COO American Veterans Vote)
| Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire

---

| We all want to live, work, and raise our families in peace. This is "crossover week" in the General Assembly and most likely all of our good governance bills will die in the Democrat controlled State Senate. I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Add your name: Statehood for D.C. now!
body:
Taxation with no representation
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T510cce67-484f-443c-9d8e-7c4c573e8f22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Taxation without representation** was wrong in 1776 and it is wrong today. The people of D.C. pay the [highest federal taxes per capita](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2dce0b7d-b2ef-4270-9a7e-4ed2d05ee29f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but **have no voting representation in Congress**. Becoming a state ends this injustice. [**Sign the petition: Congress must stop denying representation to hundreds of thousands of American citizens. The time for D.C. statehood is NOW!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef595c11-3148-4021-9f35-5e55f1dd44dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) D.C. residents bear all the responsibilities of full U.S. citizenship—they serve on juries, in the U.S. military, and work hard to build safe, strong communities where they live. And yet, the 700,000+ people who call D.C. home, the majority of whom are Black and Brown, have no vote on any decisions our Congress makes every day, even though they exert undue power over those residents. This includes [maintenance](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e393968-9fed-4f35-9429-d24e73dbaede/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) within the district, [banning](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb928987-814f-4515-b35e-0fe588b75392/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) a district-elected legalization of marijuana, and even regulating legal [abortion access](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4828e479-0507-4f94-a257-b1253b789ead/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Those residents—who are mostly people of color and members of frontline communities—are denied the most basic tenet that founded our country: Representation. This is a fundamental civil rights issue. Now, Sen. Tom Carper [reintroduced](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4b7b9e3-1234-4951-a577-334251de6741/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) legislation to make Washington, D.C. the 51st state. The bill would give Washington D.C. citizens full representation in Congress—the bill MUST pass.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83741a4a-5cb2-48df-a0cd-cbba601713ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Make no mistake, this is voter suppression—equality at the ballot box cannot be guaranteed until Congress grants the residents of D.C. the statehood they deserve to be a part of the democratic process. It’s past time this great injustice be righted. [**Sign the petition: Congress must stop denying representation to hundreds of thousands of American citizens. The time for D.C. statehood is NOW!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3544d6e3-953f-4ee4-bb64-6d301fb3ade2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing up for DC voting rights, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78ae63c5-d794-4f55-9851-229c34af5443/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/dcstatehood2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34c38e83-90b0-4c81-b43e-edd729db7905/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: Taxation with no representation | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Taxation without representation was wrong in 1776 and it is wrong today. The people of D.C. pay the , but have no voting representation in Congress. Becoming a state ends this injustice. D.C. residents bear all the responsibilities of full U.S. citizenship—they serve on juries, in the U.S. military, and work hard to build safe, strong communities where they live. And yet, the 700,000+ people who call D.C. home, the majority of whom are Black and Brown, have no vote on any decisions our Congress makes every day, even though they exert undue power over those residents. This includes within the district, a district-elected legalization of marijuana, and even regulating legal . Those residents—who are mostly people of color and members of frontline communities—are denied the most basic tenet that founded our country: Representation. This is a fundamental civil rights issue. Now, Sen. Tom Carper legislation to make Washington, D.C. the 51st state. The bill would give Washington D.C. citizens full representation in Congress—the bill MUST pass. | | | | | | | | Make no mistake, this is voter suppression—equality at the ballot box cannot be guaranteed until Congress grants the residents of D.C. the statehood they deserve to be a part of the democratic process. It’s past time this great injustice be righted. Thank you for standing up for DC voting rights, Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

subject: I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

Button")
---
Peter, it's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

I need you to see this major announcement before 11:59 PM tonight. I've always been able to count on you in the past, so please don't let me down this time.

Access here before midnight tonight:
📎 **[majorannouncement.timscott.doc](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62291233:JnVochGNq:m:1:3334294963:E1356C360838FDB7D869DE2E671CC580:r "majorannouncement.timscott.doc")** 📎
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62291232:JnVochGNq:m:1:3334294963:E1356C360838FDB7D869DE2E671CC580:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _****
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62291232:JnVochGNq:m:1:3334294963:E1356C360838FDB7D869DE2E671CC580:r "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**
**
---

---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott

subject: the promise of America

body:
I haven’t just seen the American story. I’ve lived the American story.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvdlkcg2l3nmpu7me2s2iuo9uupkgqg73n5ge9tg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tll6hh7cchicspr4sr1caq7ecr7m9rr4pj7cgrbbdlkeup3eddjeiq7fd5k6moefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p7aphh6iqj2ptmclj32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmepb3cjh60pb7c8iv0)

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3o91vukfjosfugioecu8m2c6tj7v9m513jfn52g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie4o35cth2bs)
---

Friend,

As a child, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

I'm the proud daughter of Indian immigrants. My parents reminded me every day how blessed we are to live in America.

When my family moved to Bamburg, South Carolina, no one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. No day was easy, but every day was better than the last. Then, something very American happened. People began to move past our differences and saw what made us similar.

_I haven 't just seen the American story. I've lived the American story. _

When I worked in my mom's store at the age of 13, I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. I ran for state legislature so I could fix the problems I saw happening around me. Despite being the underdog, people believed in me, and they helped me defeat a 30-year incumbent.

When I was growing up, no one could have imagined that I would one day become a state legislator, a governor, and UN Ambassador.

But that's what makes America special...And it's why I'll never stop fighting for America.

For the past two years I have been working non-stop to support conservative candidates across the country.

_**[If you want to join me to rally behind freedom-loving conservatives, stand for conservative values, and defend our country's freedoms, I'm humbly asking you to donate just $1 or more today.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp7kgaututigkb1h9acrg2f35r5vv508hp1h3kgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie4o35cth2bs "If you want to join me to rally behind freedom-loving conservatives, stand for conservative values, and defend our country’s freedoms, I’m humbly asking you to donate just $1 or more today.")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous contribution.

---
My very best,

---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of by Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc
body:
I haven’t just seen the American story. I’ve lived the American story.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4nljtfo3f4jm2d0jbqg1kdvs31eiiu4l87iegt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie2ob2c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u9q7attkc5ij8o9k6ipb5c5nciqrec3n6lhm2odjc4pbecb26hin8t9heuo72tpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphheiqr6o3nchj3ao5jc9jr1db5e8iv0)

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z65a5ke7082gl83vbgs05fcgldlekils9qtsinf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie2ob2c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

As a child, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

I'm the proud daughter of Indian immigrants. My parents reminded me every day how blessed we are to live in America.

When my family moved to Bamburg, South Carolina, no one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. No day was easy, but every day was better than the last. Then, something very American happened. People began to move past our differences and saw what made us similar.

_I haven 't just seen the American story. I've lived the American story. _

When I worked in my mom's store at the age of 13, I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. I ran for state legislature so I could fix the problems I saw happening around me. Despite being the underdog, people believed in me, and they helped me defeat a 30-year incumbent.

When I was growing up, no one could have imagined that I would one day become a state legislator, a governor, and UN Ambassador.

But that's what makes America special...And it's why I'll never stop fighting for America.

For the past two years I have been working non-stop to support conservative candidates across the country.

_**[If you want to join me to rally behind freedom-loving conservatives, stand for conservative values, and defend our country's freedoms, I'm humbly asking you to donate just $1 or more today.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqgudroj77f357jahivnhu1vqb1ln3ecktqv1ldo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie2ob2c5h2bs "If you want to join me to rally behind freedom-loving conservatives, stand for conservative values, and defend our country’s freedoms, I’m humbly asking you to donate just $1 or more today.")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous contribution.

---
My very best,

---

---

clean_body: I haven’t just seen the American story. I’ve lived the American story. | | | | | | Friend, As a child, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. I'm the proud daughter of Indian immigrants. My parents reminded me every day how blessed we are to live in America. When my family moved to Bamburg, South Carolina, no one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. No day was easy, but every day was better than the last. Then, something very American happened. People began to move past our differences and saw what made us similar. I haven 't just seen the American story. I've lived the American story. When I worked in my mom's store at the age of 13, I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. I ran for state legislature so I could fix the problems I saw happening around me. Despite being the underdog, people believed in me, and they helped me defeat a 30-year incumbent. When I was growing up, no one could have imagined that I would one day become a state legislator, a governor, and UN Ambassador. But that's what makes America special...And it's why I'll never stop fighting for America. For the past two years I have been working non-stop to support conservative candidates across the country. "If you want to join me to rally behind freedom-loving conservatives, stand for conservative values, and defend our country’s freedoms, I’m humbly asking you to donate just $1 or more today." Thank you in advance for your generous contribution. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | ---|--- | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of by Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc. body:

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents. | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zli1skrls6kuq5f2j2ls056m409r655an9vv2jqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9oj6cdh2bs)

---

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhe1cb63k85tj6vsfpt2bvdcgj099oinoj2pg4cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9oj6cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq3gvdfcn7bbqdato92725kbojesto66q88901lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9oj6cdh2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You’ve seen Marine One on TV countless times, I’m sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn’t charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that’s it.

His alleged crime is called “obstruction of an official proceeding.”

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn’t even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9jk3dg4eb690erta9oqrmm1ruo8f69ph17pvmv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9oj6cdh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ziudvbj5f77rmoju5d0049ujikkvidre3guc4d8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9oj6cdh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjb00qc6hemlss6tp8523n01ujl4ffedavp16ilo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9oj6cdh2bs)

name: James H. Harvey III, American Veterans Center
subject: My time as a Tuskegee Airman
body:
I truly understand the importance of recording and sharing veterans’ stories so we can honor the men and women who served and
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zia171duam5t4a5n60q47h6drf4g8bol1n9icsro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s30cqp3adbkslonepj0m5qr8ttgchob5cj765g61dll65g6at9gedpj3ddk68rrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32t5lmdg7eob6e4obbcj7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmepb3cjie6or1c8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr1mjaqt8h48j2jbi0r26fb8j7vnbu4skjlujm38_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, I was one of the first "Top Guns" of the U.S. Air Force. In 1949, I was on a small pilot team at the Air Force's first Fighter Gunnery Meet. Over multiple days, we competed against other squadrons in dive bombing, skip bombing, rocket firing, panel strafing, and aerial gunnery at 20,000 and 12,000 feet - _and we won_. But the Air Force listed the 1949 competition winner as "Unknown" for 46 years because our team was composed of Tuskegee Airmen ... and they didn't want people to know we were so good.
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrlda2jr18mtba4a8l7gaqkgl5pibj8bkvjlfr60_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center recorded a special video documentary about my military service in World War II and the Korean War._
---
**I** '**m a proud 22-year military veteran who served in World War II and the Korean War with the 33rd Fighter Group, better known as the Tuskegee Airmen.** In addition to being one of the Air Force's first "Top Guns," I was the first African-American combat pilot to fly in Korea, and I went on to fly more than 125 missions there. I'm proud to share my story of patriotism, service, and hard work with the next generation and to see the Tuskegee Airmen I served with recognized for their skill and bravery - after so many years of stonewalling and silence. **I truly understand the importance of recording and sharing veterans** ' **stories so we can honor the men and women who served and inspire young Americans.** That's why, when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they needed to raise more funds to record veterans' stories - from World War II to today's Special Forces - I knew that I had to take action. [**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help support the American Veterans Center** '**s critical work to honor veterans** ' **legacies? As a non-profit organization, AVC depends on support from patriotic Americans like you.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7n1t5shc820a17t3praj6eslpdjou292qrc5i1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9u56l962loptd8ol00v79g3tinghrt75h1u7pn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7agpif5a30i41n3lvq6kbp8ub8211i4a3km64j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
_Above: I was honored to join AVC_ '_s Annual Conference - alongside my fellow Tuskegee Airmen and in the company of hundreds more veterans, students, and military cadets - in Washington, D.C. this year._
---
I was proud to partner with the American Veterans Center for a 37-minute video documentary about my service in World War II and Korea - and also about the Tuskegee Airmen's long journey to rightful recognition for our skill and service. **No other group does as much as the American Veterans Center to safeguard our veterans** ' **legacies and to let our veterans tell their own stories in their own words.** [**That** '**s why I** '**m writing to you today to ask for your support of the American Veterans Center** '**s critical work. Will you make your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z45t7efsfu8opj73q984135gk2uiq32vfopl656o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcva8ammcqf0vsqi50r2osojecsnbnggqm3m6f48_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
As a young man, I stood outside in my yard and looked up as a formation of P-40 Warhawks flew overhead. In that moment, I knew I wanted to become a pilot. **Today, I hope that my story of serving America - in World War II, in the Korean War, and as one of the first **"**Top Guns " in the Air Force - will similarly inspire the next generation of young people.** Every year, the American Veterans Center reaches _millions_ of Americans through their video documentaries ... their National Memorial Day Parade ... and their Annual Conference for veterans, students, and military cadets. [**Will you join me in supporting the American Veterans Center - and helping them reach even more veterans and young people with their powerful programs - and make a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zol50vfk4ragd8rjecevp8nc1i3vg4lj544qjcig_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zko49s1n9oi1hah8vherlh36lalqfb4j1hc3e0lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
Friend, your support will help the American Veterans Center pass on the lessons of veterans like me - lessons of service, sacrifice, patriotism, duty, and courage. Thank you for helping the American Veterans Center preserve the stories of American heroes so together we can inspire the next generation.
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z49r0pfbu756smbukm9vm7hf4c3i5nvekcosc8a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---
Lt. Col. James H. Harvey III U.S. Air Force (Ret.) For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0gbojgckh96jhcj9muk750eks1n9pioa4m7l8v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cdie9or3c5h2bs)
---

---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center

name: NextGen America
subject: Urge Congress to take action on the Youth Agenda
body:
| | | With a new year ahead, young voters are diving into our movement with renewed hope and energy. Join us in bringing our priorities to the forefront.
---
| [Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58351532/390808202/1807119236?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmNhNzViNS0zZmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6GfBD_nMPxDeJ_yHZEiMRZEPsc75OtVbe4nsgn8iWm0=&emci=d4172728-efa0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0bca75b5-3fa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**As a generation raised amidst a climate crisis, an unjust economy, and unrelenting attacks on our most basic rights, we understand clearly the stakes of the current moment. **
In the past two election cycles, we have turned out at historic levels to fight these crises — advocating for change on the streets and at the ballot box to make sure we create a nation that is more equitable for all. This work, built on the shoulders of generations before us, has garnered unbelievable victories in the past decade.
**However, it is not nearly enough. **
That’s why we’ve drafted the **Youth Agenda** , and we’ve asked our partners — other leaders in this fight with us — to sign on.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58351538/390808204/-518479592?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmNhNzViNS0zZmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6GfBD_nMPxDeJ_yHZEiMRZEPsc75OtVbe4nsgn8iWm0=&emci=d4172728-efa0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0bca75b5-3fa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58351539/390808211/-518479592?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmNhNzViNS0zZmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6GfBD_nMPxDeJ_yHZEiMRZEPsc75OtVbe4nsgn8iWm0=&emci=d4172728-efa0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0bca75b5-3fa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)
**The Youth Agenda is a list of our priorities, hopes, and vision for the future.** We’ve set a goal to strive toward that will truly uphold the largest and most diverse generation in American history. Now, all that’s left is to achieve it.
**Will you join us in sending a message?**
[**Check out our Youth Agenda and send a message to Congress urging them to take action on issue priorities that matter most to our generation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58351551/390808213/241035295?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmNhNzViNS0zZmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6GfBD_nMPxDeJ_yHZEiMRZEPsc75OtVbe4nsgn8iWm0=&emci=d4172728-efa0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0bca75b5-3fa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)
[Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58351552/390808226/-1325048646?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmNhNzViNS0zZmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6GfBD_nMPxDeJ_yHZEiMRZEPsc75OtVbe4nsgn8iWm0=&emci=d4172728-efa0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=0bca75b5-3fa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: You can't be trusted..
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62293210:J-8E3hGNi:m:1:3331421248:134EA4B99ACC63A086D783612C9126A0:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62293210:J-8E3hGNi:m:1:3331421248:134EA4B99ACC63A086D783612C9126A0:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62293210:J-8E3hGNi:m:1:3331421248:134EA4B99ACC63A086D783612C9126A0:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62293210:J-8E3hGNi:m:1:3331421248:134EA4B99ACC63A086D783612C9126A0:r)** ** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62293210:J-8E3hGNi:m:1:3331421248:134EA4B99ACC63A086D783612C9126A0:r) **
---

If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases. Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. Ours is a legal one. And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law? No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you, | | | | | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. ---
**Funded by the bipartisan infrastructure bill signed into law last year, this is a huge investment in our mass transit, which will create 30,000 jobs in Maryland and improve the speed and service of rail travel through our state.**
As a former transportation engineer, I was definitely nerding out a little bit. This is just one step toward putting Maryland on the right track (see what I did there?) to a 21st Century transportation system.
**[If you’re as excited about this infrastructure upgrade as I am, add your name to thank the Biden Administration for prioritizing this partnership with Maryland. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58352896/390813656/520786850?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230206railinvestment_am_odca90ds_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzlmMjhjYy00MmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME8zsTZ8jwIvaO5CkVpQ3z0rKR8ZtAyJbmVvjzjnNCU=&emci=fb877dc5-42a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2c9f28cc-42a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)**
[Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58352897/390813668/520786850?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230206railinvestment_am_odca90ds_SLA_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzlmMjhjYy00MmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME8zsTZ8jwIvaO5CkVpQ3z0rKR8ZtAyJbmVvjzjnNCU=&emci=fb877dc5-42a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2c9f28cc-42a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

body:
we’re at risk of financial catastrophe...

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58353077/390814223/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODEyYTk2NS00M2E2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf1h4r60JQ9P6SVd5XJgvqVSioO3_j6ZjVDyAZQuW1A=&emci=67e16f60-3ca6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4812a965-43a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Congressional Republicans are holding the U.S. debt ceiling hostage in order to get their desired budget cuts - but **they don’t even have an inkling of a plan**. They’re messing with a political hand grenade. Let’s acknowledge the reality of this situation. After years of big spending under the Trump Presidency, now House Republicans are demanding big spending cuts. But they can’t even agree on what funding they’re willing to cut. The truth is, Republicans have absolutely no place messing around with the debt ceiling. If they force us into default on our debt, it would be _devastating_ for our economy. We could see higher interest rates and increased payments for student debt and home mortgages. Experts say it could even spark an economic recession. **[_In the Senate, I’m doing everything in my power to prevent our government from defaulting on our debt. But right now, I’m asking you to stand with me and tell the House GOP to quit playing this dangerous game with our economy._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58353078/390814224/-1718467752?refcode=mw_em_230206_1&ms=mw_em_230206_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODEyYTk2NS00M2E2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf1h4r60JQ9P6SVd5XJgvqVSioO3_j6ZjVDyAZQuW1A=&emci=67e16f60-3ca6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4812a965-43a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)**
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58353079/390814225/-1718467752?refcode=mw_em_230206_1&ms=mw_em_230206_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODEyYTk2NS00M2E2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf1h4r60JQ9P6SVd5XJgvqVSioO3_j6ZjVDyAZQuW1A=&emci=67e16f60-3ca6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4812a965-43a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)****
Republicans putting the full faith and credit of the United States in jeopardy is just plain crazy. We’re finally starting to bring down inflation, and just this past week we got news that the economy is stronger than it’s been at any point since the COVID lockdowns. Now we’re facing a GOP-manufactured crisis that puts all that at risk. And if that wasn’t bad enough, a default would throw a wrench in key parts of the federal government – from military salaries to Social Security checks. That’s why I’m fighting to defuse this crisis, protect our economy, and make sure our government pays its bills and continues to serve the American people. **[_If you’re with me, I need you to add your name and stand with me against the GOP’s dangerous debt ceiling gamble._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58353080/390814226/-1718467752?refcode=mw_em_230206_1&ms=mw_em_230206_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODEyYTk2NS00M2E2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf1h4r60JQ9P6SVd5XJgvqVSioO3_j6ZjVDyAZQuW1A=&emci=67e16f60-3ca6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4812a965-43a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)** Thank you, Mark Warner ** ** ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58353081/390814227/-1718467752?refcode=mw_em_230206_1&ms=mw_em_230206_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODEyYTk2NS00M2E2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf1h4r60JQ9P6SVd5XJgvqVSioO3_j6ZjVDyAZQuW1A=&emci=67e16f60-3ca6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4812a965-43a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)****

clean_body: we’re at risk of financial catastrophe... | | | Derek, Congressional Republicans are holding the U.S. debt ceiling hostage in order to get their desired budget cuts - but they don’t even have an inkling of a plan. They’re messing with a political hand grenade. Let’s acknowledge the reality of this situation. After years of big spending under the Trump Presidency, now House Republicans are demanding big spending cuts. But they can’t even agree on what funding they’re willing to cut. The truth is, Republicans have absolutely no place messing around with the debt ceiling. If they force us into default on our debt, it would be devastating for our economy. We could see higher interest rates and increased payments for student debt and home mortgages. Experts say it could even spark an economic recession. ** Republicans putting the full faith and credit of the United States in jeopardy is just plain crazy. We’re finally starting to bring down inflation, and just this past week we got news that the economy is stronger than it’s been at any point since the COVID lockdowns. Now we’re facing a GOP-manufactured crisis that puts all that at risk. And if that wasn’t bad enough, a default would throw a wrench in key parts of the federal government – from military salaries to Social Security checks. That’s why I’m fighting to defuse this crisis, protect our economy, and make sure our government pays its bills and continues to serve the American people. Thank you, Mark Warner | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

[**Will you take a few minutes to share your thoughts with us? clean_body: Our 2023 Spring Survey helps us fight for the issues that matter to Ohioans. | Ohio Democrats look out for the needs of working families. That's why we want to hear from YOU! Your responses are incredibly important to us, and we promise it won't take long at all. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team ODP <info@ohiodemsorg> Date: Thu, Feb 2, 2023 Subject: [Survey]: Your voice matters — this will only take a moment = Team, So far this year, extreme Ohio Republicans have made attacking voting rights and helping their special interest buddies their top priority. For too long, Ohio Republicans have helped the wealthy and well-connected get ahead while leaving working Ohioans behind. Ohio Democrats are ready to go to every corner of the state and show voters we’re on their side – but to fight for you, we want to know what your top priorities are. While Republicans are only looking out for themselves, we're focused on fighting for the needs of working families. That's why we want to know your priorities, from strengthening our economy to protecting our rights. We use your responses to plan for the future of the party and ensure our officials and candidates are well-informed about the concerns of their constituents. Thank you, Team ODP The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. | = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

body:
We have a quick request today: [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1508%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qgJbw7zSrsIub7RafbY%2fyg&sysid=1)
