| | | Friend, Steve Scalise & Kevin McCarthy here.

We have a quick request today: would you be willing to chip in the cost of a cup of coffee to ensure House Republicans have the resources they need to expand their Majority?

_**[All we are asking for is $3.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658094%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4t4nJjtW%2frxrs9uUHIh1ig&sysid=1 "All we are asking for is $3.")**_

Our Republican House Majority is the only thing stopping the Democrats from rubberstamping Biden’s Radical agenda. And every dollar you donate will have a direct impact on our ability to fight back against their attacks.

Your support means the world to us. Just the cost of a cup of coffee could be the difference between freedom & prosperity and a Radical Socialist agenda. Don’t let America down now, Friend.

Thank you,

Steve Scalise & Kevin McCarthy.

---

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: We Need to Elect Justice-Centered Candidates in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
February 6, 2022
Dear friend,
Last week, Tyre Nichols was laid to rest by his family, loved ones, and local and national leaders. Memphis has and will continue to mourn the loss of Tyre alongside his family and all who loved him. Tyre should be alive today.
TVP will continue to keep Tyre Nichols and his family top of mind as we head full force into the City of Memphis election later this year. We also heard you loud and clear on our City Election Issues Survey that Racial Justice is a top priority for you as we consider the issues we prioritize and which candidates to support.
We need candidates in City office who will do everything in their power to ensure we don't lose another life to abuse of power. We need candidates who make criminal justice reform a top priority in their campaigns.
HELP TVP BRING CRIMINAL JUSTICE REFORM TO THE FOREFRONT OF THE 2023 ELECTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
If you would like to support TVP in its efforts to continue the pressure on City Candidates to fight for criminal justice reform, please consider supporting us through a contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] .
We hope you are taking care of yourselves as Memphis and the country grieve the loss of Tyre Nichols and all the lives lost to injustice.
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

clean_body: [] February 6, 2022 Dear friend, Last week, Tyre Nichols was laid to rest by his family, loved ones, and local and national leaders. Memphis has and will continue to mourn the loss of Tyre alongside his family and all who loved him. Tyre should be alive today. TVP will continue to keep Tyre Nichols and his family top of mind as we head full force into the City of Memphis election later this year. We also heard you loud and clear on our City Election Issues Survey that Racial Justice is a top priority for you as we consider the issues we prioritize and which candidates to support. We need candidates in City office who will do everything in their power to ensure we don't lose another life to abuse of power. We need candidates who make criminal justice reform a top priority in their campaigns. HELP TVP BRING CRIMINAL JUSTICE REFORM TO THE FOREFRONT OF THE 2023 ELECTION [] If you would like to support TVP in its efforts to continue the pressure on City Candidates to fight for criminal justice reform, please consider supporting us through a contribution [] . We hope you are taking care of yourselves as Memphis and the country grieve the loss of Tyre Nichols and all the lives lost to injustice. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Lewis, Tolkien, and the Inklings
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defense

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbqd9onddrnlie99j4kbvc9ls319s5ktqmbsrp2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg6epb4shh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2oiq7nid4eq7phpb1u356tfgcum2nualksjhvso_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg6epb4shh2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi6p8e7f4l3fikk20a6ln5pt747bqe91cj19q0co_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg6epb4shh2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr9c0em5g78iecb7fnvbkoe2shrsi47lqrcabb10_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg6epb4shh2bs)**

---

name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I just announced: I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were”
isn’t good enough.

It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits
while more and more families can’t afford necessities.

It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at
school after a shooting in a nearby church.

It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion
nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats.

Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans
funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game against families,
making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to
Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must
prove to voters that democracy can work for them. That’s why I’m running
for the Senate, and I want you on my team. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18879?t=1001&akid=2955%2E346206%2E_yU1iV ]Can you make a donation
today that will support my campaign for Senate and Charles Booker’s
progressive movement[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18875?t=1002&akid=2955%2E346206%2E_yU1iV ]?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18879?t=1003&akid=2955%2E346206%2E_yU1iV ]CHIP IN →

I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the
House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the
House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to
fund Members' pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional
stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings
is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional
hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass
bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are
driving inflation.

Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I
worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five
biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. I held the
banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks,
forcing them to pay California families billions.

I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and
more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth
Warren taught me, nobody wins alone. This will be a competitive and
expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18879?t=1004&akid=2955%2E346206%2E_yU1iV ]Can you
make a split contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our Senate
campaign?

Katie Porter

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230206-2955-footer&t=1005&refcode2=2955_346206__yU1iV&akid=2955%2E346206%2E_yU1iV

clean_body: Peter, I just announced: I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were” isn’t good enough. It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits while more and more families can’t afford necessities. It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at school after a shooting in a nearby church. It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats. Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game against families, making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must prove to voters that democracy can work for them. That’s why I’m running for the Senate, and I want you on my team. [ ]Can you make a donation today that will support my campaign for Senate and Charles Booker’s progressive movement[ ]? [ ]CHIP IN → I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to fund Members' pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are driving inflation. Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. I held the banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks, forcing them to pay California families billions. I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth Warren taught me, nobody wins alone. This will be a competitive and expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. [ ]Can you make a split contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our Senate campaign? Katie Porter Contribute to Charles Booker:

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fae294b-3ab7-4f20-b8b5-9c893ec5bdc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They’re lying to us
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9s9e5i5rni8up3511qho3k5l1s2prl4hmqsfmho_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4ub7otv1f2ub660bfn2h9ctsb8at6kd8pip2hf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrqdm2788p9k05f3duji1o1nogagdiq746ghj5qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zel05acrlhr87cho3d1n41el9sbljbgdjjh5iq80_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhlv5fn5mda3gtpfdu1s1ieopn98osb7o3ahk7s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9bq10gvh5ugvg9u4jusk9md10eivtj0u6dvatbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znk7e0s14sp3u02cv8osmgogdnu4pgl433ld5deo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zod6licjfl5835a5ge7q53dv9p0uhmc9k4bolfr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za4a4iqeduohof8u5j8l7h5147u93mpuenfa27jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctg69p36cjh2bs)
---

---

---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z92qqj3s5n868r06nb3v93n1er5f519iknaku6hg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cljm0p74cpie49fg)

name: Spot on Team Scott
subject: You have 24 HOURS to respond:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---

subject: Kiggans Assigned to the Armed Services Committee
body:
Helping those who helped us | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=a4df6849f5&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter,

I am honored to announce that I have been appointed as a member of the House Armed Services Committee and the Veterans Affairs Committee. On these committees, I will have the opportunity to serve our veterans and military families here in VA-02 and across the country. Additionally, I have been named chair of the VA Oversight Subcommittee.

I look forward to helping ensure our service members have the resources and support they need to maintain our nation's military readiness. I will also work hard to protect veterans’ benefits while prioritizing our military families.

As we look ahead to the future, I am committed to working with my colleagues in Congress to make sure our military is fully prepared to face the challenges of our changing world. I will ensure our veterans have access to quality healthcare, education, and job security.

We owe a debt of gratitude to the men and women who have served our nation in uniform and their families. I will be sure to keep you updated on my progress and the issues we are addressing...!
---
| [HELP ME SUPPORT OUR VETERANS](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=b5d003beef&e=4955722b3e "HELP ME SUPPORT OUR VETERANS")
---
| With gratitude, Jen Kiggans

When I ran for the U.S. Senate, I promised that I would ALWAYS defend our Constitutional rights. Joe Biden and the Democrats don’t see it that way — they want to rip away your rights. Their latest attack on the Second Amendment is a so-called “pistol brace” rule, which creates a national registry of firearms with stabilizing braces. This rule is our worst fear come to life, Friend. And Senator John Kennedy and I are taking action to stop it in its tracks. Our bill would stop this rule, roll back the federal government’s power to regulate firearms, and protect law-abiding Kansans and Americans. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2023-feb-kennedy-split-e mail?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023feb6hf I’m asking you to help us in this fight by splitting a donation between Senator Kennedy’s campaign and mine right now —> https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2023-feb-kennedy-split-e mail?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023feb6hf Senator Kennedy and I will not allow a bunch of tyrannical, unelected bureaucrats to take away our Constitutional rights. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2023-feb-kennedy-split-e mail?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023feb6hf I hope you’ll stand with us in this fight — because the future of our Constitution depends on winning it. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2023-feb-kennedy-split-e mail?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023feb6hf Senator Roger Marshall https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2023-feb-kennedy-split-e mail?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023feb6hf RUSH YOUR SUPPORT »  https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email-footer ?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023feb6hf Keep reading for a personal message from Doc: Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. | Friend
Americans have seen the federal government grow past its bounds and into their daily lives. Now, Kat's working to reign the Biden Administration back in!
Since taking office, here are just a few of the ways Biden has weaponized our government:

1. Sicked the FBI on innocent American Parents angry at Biden's handling of Covid.
2. Expanded the IRS to target lower-income and middle-class Americans.
3. Attempted to fix the Supreme Court.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658047%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Avi9SWn5WRdMQzqVMueTCQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658048%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2blR4hV2hDOb%2bkYKTf4NTqw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658047%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Avi9SWn5WRdMQzqVMueTCQ&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658049%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xvnx%2fjE0cpSFLB3grYpmdQ&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658047%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Avi9SWn5WRdMQzqVMueTCQ&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658040%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xbnlAFuZjTfg4dA%2b8DtZ%2bw&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658041%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MZSk6z%2bt8gP%2b4qbOrLKoyA&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658042%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OTecETD4O1ztzIEtsltEmg&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1501%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=p%2f1SRkjDPbzPeRj7NBt7sQ&sysid=1)_

That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | House member and Treason Enthusiast Marjorie Taylor Greene went on a rant recently about how "miserable" she is being in Congress, and how little the job pays ($174,000, which sounds pretty sweet to us). [**We've got a solution for MTG: QUIT.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted2678f2-f74d-4bfe-9d08-2c2f8acb1a2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) She says she's miserable? She's been making the rest of us miserable as well since she took office, with her wacko conspiracy theories, outrageous behavior, and refusal to govern within the bounds of reality. Let her leave, and let the rest of us get someone better (which is basically anyone). [**Please add your name, and tell MTG to quit.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40477226-0fbf-4129-8ce0-8d4cfd1f3f1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Candidate for Florida State House of Representatives
subject: CRITICAL SPECIAL ELECTION - I'm joining the fight
body:
Only a few weeks remain in this SPECIAL ELECTION...now is the time to push even harder!
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze04d941lug4qvcn40eqf34enpfs1jq05pb5qutg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj4cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u6oe3db66co7fctmmep75cpn6uqm9plgspjmaspjekp64tj7clp6ecblc6rb6o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphheiqrac3mctj39p5jcjjr1db5e8iv0)
We have precious little time... the Liberal Insiders and Establishment are doing everything they can to stop or slow down Governor DeSantis.

|
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeiqk3aaoic1tutrtuh9n2gkkmr0tvg66eour250_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj4cjh2bs)
---
|
---
| **Will you help me and Governor DeS****antis**** FIGHT for Florida?**
Friend,

Only a few weeks remain in this **SPECIAL ELECTION...**
And Governor DeSantis and I need your help **NOW**

_In order to**Keep Florida Great...**_

And make it **even GREATER** in the coming years!
**[-> Contribute Now!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zm6a3u5u184t4mv0sk112ancldml2g3v67j36ldo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj4cjh2bs)** [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9pr00aj26k7iogtdra8f7rei3i3u94dcmi1spj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj4cjh2bs)
**If we haven 't yet met, my name is Ryan Chamberlin. **I'm a husband, father, founder and CEO of the True Patriot Network.

I am in an urgent race for Florida's House District 24, and I'm up against career RINOs. We have precious little time...the Liberal Insiders and Establishment are doing everything they can to stop or slow down Governor DeSantis.

They know they can do that by filling up the legislature with weak-kneed Republicans who will buckle under the pressure.

_...But in spite of the opposition 's deep pockets, we're leading in the polls! _

**But now is the time to push harder than ever -- which is why I'm calling on all conservative Floridians to [TAKE ACTION NOW](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd4bkee7qi7io1gcglma61g3pl61rnfmd71uuq1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj4cjh2bs) for this Special Election.**

I will fight alongside DeSantis to tackle issues Floridians care most about, such as:

**-> **Protecting and Preserving our Gun Rights
**->** Banning critical race theory and queer studies in our classrooms
**-> **Protecting LIFE at all stages
**-> **Upholding Law and Order
**->** Standing Up for our Veterans!
**[-> TAKE ACTION for FLORIDA'S FUTURE](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdif6260vmucufl3k3nlj70pi9dv6rjej22muq6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj4cjh2bs)**
**Friend, Governor DeSantis and I are counting on YOU to bring us to victory this March 7th! **

Please make a donation, and spread the word to friends and family-- **there 's a critical SPECIAL ELECTION coming up in Florida, and we must do everything in our power to WIN the seat for Conservatives!**
**[For Florida's Future!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2baea5p118be66djroje5ntaedms0kdk86q1bog_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj4cjh2bs)**
Sincerely,

Ryan Chamberlin
Candidate for Florida State House of Representatives
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zaf75fpjjvrnfjtdc837vb9tsmvcre7i6ngi28m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj4cjh2bs)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Black History in VA-07
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| Peter,

Each year, Black History Month serves as an important time to reflect on, uplift, and learn from the stories of Black Americans. And as some states and school districts make efforts to erase this history and stop telling the stories of Black Americans, across Virginia's 7th district, there is much to be learned.

Black history is not only the story of the communities I represent, but in many cases the lived experiences of the people I represent. Their stories are present all across Virginia's 7th district, and if you ever want to explore and learn yourself, here are a few starting points.

The [_African American Heritage Trail_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/ECUyJCo4a6mDgBm0vybcgnc9OZ74LVgCQLcqq9KacrU=?bidId=) is a 75-mile tour cataloging Black Americans' history, experiences, suffering, perseverance, and courage dating back to the early 1700s. It winds its way through Spotsylvania County, and along the way, you'll visit the [_John J. Wright Museum_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/K0GqAOXyahxgcsAiJLrLxxnkJjmSOpIAGuqDM7gBSsk=), confront our district's history of slavery, and learn about the strength of community organizations, especially churches, that have been pillars of community life throughout history.

In neighboring Culpeper, the George Washington Carver Regional High School once served as a multi-county high school for Black students during segregation. The school's alumni remember the vital role of the school in their lives, and in recent years, the [_Carver Center_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/RAn-oLUGXWjrBfFMdggQFFKSxS2XvXpiCb2UxcQBphk=) has become a vital community center for educational opportunity, agricultural programming, and small business partnership, all while acknowledging and educating the community about its past.

The city of Fredericksburg has worked to record and teach its history and offers [_walking tours, historical guides, and educational events_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/onYSc_LTCrL4PNGQu0wuY4BMLFHgF5OvcaBj7Wr44RA=) to ensure its residents and visitors learn from its expansive history, from its early days as a city where enslaved people were traded to the [_first stop_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/22mQmEgqbuBOP4tdGBn_b1JMegg-2quNRfozsSzzBfw=) in the freedom rides.

A little further south is [_Caroline County 's Old Jail_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/_V_u8hb1eCIL0gfZO3zkDswtEk6FUz-OfSSCXhE1d8M=) where Richard and Mildred Loving were imprisoned after they were arrested and charged with violating Virginia's Racial Integrity Act of 1924. The Lovings went on to challenge their arrest and conviction for unlawful cohabitation and it was their Supreme Court case, _Loving v. Virginia,_ that rendered the law in Virginia - and 15 states across the country - unconstitutional and made interracial marriage legal.

This brief overview only scratches the surface of the rich Black history in our communities that we should all learn from. This month and every day, we must all learn the stories and histories like those that exist across our district, and we must commit ourselves - constituents and lawmakers alike - to pursuing policies of fairness, equity, and justice, always.

Sincerely,
Abigail
---

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/j3rPVXHpzcPrtWSQwqkPh19U_zA67cjI5ztoxSxC77A=)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
P.O. Box 3112
Fredericksburg VA 22402 United States
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/hJkSuwzzpEGGpoNrU5lgqYUj0byKeZNufXkCUTdpywY=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/m3NDeWdiLu-wgFPYg8SFGMKROiRycLWkY_a8ANU-igQ=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/Y_4sLeReT6APOq6iP7WEScPKlRWcTKegaNEnaXsbPhs=)
---|---|---
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/BQI4HUgyHX-ZiGR2sSatWvWRbbbNtDvlRqzlPbyGQGg=).
If you wish to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/0HoWNacJgrXwbUfVT-ygdwpoomJyEGFyVXTrN-K9T7s=). [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/qXMJAW4kuo7MQS9qQM48lcqieY2IlaNdRgnUHsDanXQ=/Z1P6YuxIxDuWt2r5fhpawhi20pb1QNy2-8ZXO_a-9QM=)
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdekmflmb47rhl6h87ohon9dcnhu9p63gt0rb868_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj2c1h2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z06l5snv9gqvf7188o5nsh8u45imui59cvk9b1a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj2c1h2bs)

---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7badp8f3o75kr938hviht4bmjhfvm0o429tpf38_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj2c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5a26gb804jnhvn1kvh5l2oh9atvg9ce656vumgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cti6eoj2c1h2bs)
---

body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._UGRM3-wBrxPcMdDJA) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://trk.readactnews.-Mk2NSuwI4yZw "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://trk.readactnews.)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution-including the Second Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://trk.readactnews.)**
---

name: A Black Conservative
subject: The CBC is a Prop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CURE AMERICA ACTION, INC
body:
We need to expose the Left's bigotry once and for all!

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62294526:6vWSahGJN:m:1:3367311000:175DEDF0B5AD12B8E05D44AE5822E13A:r "Headline") Peter With a name like "Congressional Black Caucus," you would think being Black and a member of Congress gains you entry. NOPE! The Democrats just denied Byron Donalds, a Black Republican, from joining their elite group of leftist props. To Democrats, Byron isn't Black... simply because he dares to be a Republican. Rather than let a Black Man rise, Squad Member Cori Bush literally called Donalds a "prop" and accused him of furthering White Supremacy! It's time America stands up to these grifters on the left who demonize the Black men and women who proudly call themselves Republican. **[But that's only going to happen if you join the fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62294526:6vWSahGJN:m:1:3367311000:175DEDF0B5AD12B8E05D44AE5822E13A:r "But that’s only going to happen if you join the fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** My name is Marc Little, and I am a pastor, attorney, Executive Director of CURE America Action, and proud Black Republican, and I KNOW that Black America needs people like Byron Donalds, a great example of the American Dream, who proudly stands as a Black Republican in Congress! We need Black conservatives in Congress because there is always a message [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62294526:6vWSahGJN:m:1:3367311000:175DEDF0B5AD12B8E05D44AE5822E13A:r "Banner")underlying every Democrat promise - you aren't good enough to do this on your own. **They tell Black Americans that they need the socialist state to solve their problems for them. But the facts demonstrate that when we elect Democrats, they fail Black America time and time again.** I'm sick of it. The CBC and Cori Bush's treatment of Byron Donalds is a slap in the face to Black America. They feel they must tear down Byron simply because he isn't a slave to the Democrats' will. **We need to expose their bigotry once and for all, but unfortunately, Black America won 't hear this from the media.** **[If you want to change the outcome of future elections and America's public policies, then I need your immediate donation to CURE America Action so we can go into these communities and expose the liberals for their decades of false hope.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62294526:6vWSahGJN:m:1:3367311000:175DEDF0B5AD12B8E05D44AE5822E13A:r "If you want to change the outcome of future elections and
America’s public policies, then I need your immediate donation to CURE America Action so we can go into these communities and expose the
liberals for their decades of false hope.")** You and I know the truth about the Democrats' agenda. We also know that Americans of all races, religions, and creed are suffering, and the Democrat Leadership is failing us -- again. **Democrats want Black America to fall in line, accept the failures of their progressive policies, and then remain ignorant when we 're told the Republican Party is to blame.** That's why they've come out so hard against Byron Donalds. The CBC, Cori Bush, and the Left think so little about Black Republicans like Byron Donalds and with him, Black America as a whole. With your support of CURE American Action, we can stop the cycle of lies and deceit by educating Black Americans on these facts and removing them from the 21st Century plantations. That's why when we bypass the liberal media and engage Black voters directly, we can save the next generation of Black Americans from being victims of the Democrat Party. **[Will you stand with us? Donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62294526:6vWSahGJN:m:1:3367311000:175DEDF0B5AD12B8E05D44AE5822E13A:r "Will you stand with us? Donate today.")** God Bless America,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62294526:6vWSahGJN:m:1:3367311000:175DEDF0B5AD12B8E05D44AE5822E13A:r "Marc Little")
Marc Little
Executive Director
CURE America Action
---
| **PAID FOR BY CURE AMERICA ACTION, INC.**
---

The Democrats just denied Byron Donalds, a Black Republican, from joining their elite group of leftist props. To Democrats, Byron isn't Black... simply because he dares to be a Republican. Rather than let a Black Man rise, Squad Member Cori Bush literally called Donalds a "prop" and accused him of furthering White Supremacy! It's time America stands up to these grifters on the left who demonize the Black men and women who proudly call themselves Republican. "But that’s only going to happen if you join the fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today." My name is Marc Little, and I am a pastor, attorney, Executive Director of CURE America Action, and proud Black Republican, and I KNOW that Black America needs people like Byron Donalds, a great example of the American Dream, who proudly stands as a Black Republican in Congress! We need Black conservatives in Congress because there is always a message "Banner"underlying every Democrat promise - you aren't good enough to do this on your own. They tell Black Americans that they need the socialist state to solve their problems for them. But the facts demonstrate that when we elect Democrats, they fail Black America time and time again. I'm sick of it. The CBC and Cori Bush's treatment of Byron Donalds is a slap in the face to Black America. They feel they must tear down Byron simply because he isn't a slave to the Democrats' will. We need to expose their bigotry once and for all, but unfortunately, Black America won 't hear this from the media. "If you want to change the outcome of future elections and America’s public policies, then I need your immediate donation to CURE America Action so we can go into these communities and expose the liberals for their decades of false hope." You and I know the truth about the Democrats' agenda. We also know that Americans of all races, religions, and creed are suffering, and the Democrat Leadership is failing us -- again. Democrats want Black America to fall in line, accept the failures of their progressive policies, and then remain ignorant when we 're told the Republican Party is to blame. That's why they've come out so hard against Byron Donalds. The CBC, Cori Bush, and the Left think so little about Black Republicans like Byron Donalds and with him, Black America as a whole. With your support of CURE American Action, we can stop the cycle of lies and deceit by educating Black Americans on these facts and removing them from the 21st Century plantations. That's why when we bypass the liberal media and engage Black voters directly, we can save the next generation of Black Americans from being victims of the Democrat Party. "Will you stand with us? Donate today." God Bless America, "Marc Little" Marc Little Executive Director CURE America Action | PAID FOR BY CURE AMERICA ACTION, INC. DONATIONS TO CURE AMERICA ACTION, INC. ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. THIS IS DUE TO OUR LEGAL STATUS AS A 501 (C) (4) ORGANIZATION. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. For more information . | mailto:unsub-52634775990-echo7-EFE68BDCEDBFD7FEEBC290B06D987E73@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbfnpe9odl8vek3vtdq60n0r8s5lc5ons515fvbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth68pr1cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs45vteke62uk07cunpi5eise4l29j670h1p0npo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth68pr1cjh2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1fo97i5ke8taph106mlsv6vq7kkdotf4bivjhp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth68pr1cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6g9efjdffh3cumc2ji47d1h0k3o64pde1ks6678_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth68pr1cjh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoqvmejna75nthta5cikc4mqqeatmercb5f8jeqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth68pr1cjh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8a8990nec2e89cj48m6pplanp65io6jv4jqtgp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth68pr1cjh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmi3vma6k8fu6r2vlephn59b54a6ise6a3h6f0i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth68pr1cjh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFnJZwavmPlIaoWkkhdNkOoxZ0rfPXBbbZsIDY3lcsxY7LHbX30VXSX_ibmYAHZZhUYZMeJwcTiBNR5QqdYswv0h1GrQyPZXR8_dZp7SYhyVfdErMMNZ5-WBolU2dFyM3EU1LVFcIYY9kwh77QT6Fzq01hgsZxG1sW5Zkh3H-Ksy07UAdmF3vIjC999xEUBDkrV9lA9ndbZkZFMcgDyWE4NOQxaoeDM-kktdnSS8L2zHo7xxJSLNishTTSfs5_e5LLaM5HcY0f3mCezMouURosZSJZuCnI-vXQajjKKY2ZXu4DjcqiRb7VcXuHajCH257wjgNs5HbSuuHhzxFqw29ZJgX4-t__AyhknLIoJ4X9pht/3th/WHpY8CxsRdGjjTxbNYCoRQ/h0/y5eahW2bejVO3WCykT-yPDFhYbNjkp4gX6GS3yiq-Os)
---
Peter, As the only meteorologist in Congress, I care deeply about how we can harness science and technology to combat climate change. That’s why I was proud to be named to the House Science, Space and Technology Committee, but you can probably imagine my shock and disappointment when Kevin McCarthy tried to seat confirmed con artist George Santos to serve on this committee as well.[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFjp9fmILQ_deZQ6ebndsZ42mchvxjaIm-PhpDIdKgB_Ced3Z5cEb12eJLwOcZ_j7PC-e8MSMQvDF6qxvUhJ2zNst9-VI4Ik---K9M1SJ_oIeOq7CLViDPXhjvJ15BesoDBkFArqvmCO0YKAUSXu051sO_QBKBiFxb1jmK_guTGf_fPau05n6hKrbJzTl17u8WdvIzzB4fVql6ffLmBoFGYJT0-7eI4--vpBU_2nKh6JTJR5Mmx_8NtRf79APFE8Lxg8ztGtzUMDfqXH6WVPoJrDPszGnEQb2CzeweNSYdPAuz9puqxdgIH6ICD6Qbc22Np_x5XmdVL0nj_2hmJLcSf2JCk98AtoxzemKA5qomaei/3th/WHpY8CxsRdGjjTxbNYCoRQ/h1/P_WJ3YlhJj6sMtzjFNwgVOb8ozWEg3q_ggJ02F3Zk-M)
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFnJZwavmPlIaoWkkhdNkOoxZ0rfPXBbbZsIDY3lcsxY7LHbX30VXSX_ibmYAHZZhUcAwIiew-pvoAw7OCA9zgAp4hyUbQ6py3D9aqN-1m-FffQB6Z8ktpxMH0SgoHCT9g7PY_kvEpxvTnOHCR8ZGGbYKGZBZcVqWW4Hb-0YgzL-KOjWhmdiYCGB5h-IuGAIdrbI5UkJ-3B3C5siW7EidVpFciMHpQwi1k5pCOGiALzT3EPLMB53FdXBUr7HolBwa2xzjId-Zgf2stNDtgWxHdujlzJHqnJR6tYxAlTyZirTd-HFC5ZJksU1tlHMU5i5mVUfbszCApEF1Cq9Np35SAilfKGgc2ic_4fq2PJwBvHm_/3th/WHpY8CxsRdGjjTxbNYCoRQ/h2/MHhY6PNX6uIY9kLft02xvSiLnfm6v2oIAlGjlM5r1y4)
---
By now, you know the story of George Santos. To win votes, he blatantly lied to voters about the jobs he held, the university he attended, and even claimed to be Jewish. The guy went so far as to change his own name! **But what’s almost worse is that his campaign actually railed against pro-environmental policies and at one point called renewable energy a “scam.”** Well, it turns out the real scam was George Santos all along. The fact that Kevin McCarthy tried to appoint Santos to the science committee speaks volumes about his priorities. The GOP could care less about the truth or science, but what they do want is a loyal rubber stamp for their terrible agenda. I’m relieved Santos was pressured to step down (at least for now 🙄), but the idea that Santos would have a say on science policy should concern everyone. **Santos and the GOP value politics over the truth, but I still believe in making science and facts a basis for decision-making. I suspect you do too,****Peter****, so I’m asking for your help to defend integrity and keep me in Congress for another term.** **[If you can, please contribute a grassroots donation to help me stand up to guys like George Santos and fight for science solutions for IL-17.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFnJZwavmPlIaoWkkhdNkOoxZ0rfPXBbbZsIDY3lcsxY7LHbX30VXSX_ibmYAHZZhUT1drI9mCopGrK71LJe5p9vMUpWRWhKvvs9vb8Dg2u_-USPVl4liyr7zmQKX_pcwhlHt7Z2EyUTX5Q9CR68NhZrvrw0EZEDDJiMH8uom2Tg1kMy6JfXbmzc-R2pwmhv02GycKZl0K0MreaR3HT2pXRnqDaHKxFO6C66IESlG2Mvx8Aal2OOrrufKxxH5DTh3GbO_livLOQ-M6FZzuMPiPRiK9EQKuHFsVBJQ64v9fUfla0NL0l2AKnm7VNwN6syF0POi2GCmMeW4TPMyOITfu06xSuZ0oqoIL2BJlAE1a-8w/3th/WHpY8CxsRdGjjTxbNYCoRQ/h3/6Gmm6cp6wpKjO1vMeUjAZKfcRE_kZgAEIlZTP30Ky1o)**
---
[ **Donate****$5** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFnJZwavmPlIaoWkkhdNkOoxZ0rfPXBbbZsIDY3lcsxY7LHbX30VXSX_ibmYAHZZhUXZ5P8ycr0ZRHPI5Q8gUCzEo9kLycf2fP31_F94iE6w0Fbn2BfdvTCeCkLRf68sr_9M3ldWNJG8TGlck4MMqNwEGIFLTj6ni5akXgHxDmGdxO6HiJfdnCAgqtpEUoAB1osT0OKCEycna5Er5GMbcLuOSdvJV4-uWpn8xawPQwyByxWofNKZc5bZCz9HmX92V0ye0Jt9sWsrqZb8Zcb70q0w4rR7UCsfRxVSHJlvjdYxgCaT2kbwnjo7eAukf53cezh0y-J8TGfKDzJ8kzv4xfcUm73AjfVCQHU6zOg8s-1YU/3th/WHpY8CxsRdGjjTxbNYCoRQ/h4/m9KJ2IPvdPKd5PMuDn8VS5SRaDYq_KBWnYq3nCYZsiY)
---
Thank you for all that you do, Eric
---

| Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: STOP THE CARTELS
subject: One Green Beret. One Navy Seal. One enemy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=2815334759e641e98e47708188e0e222&_e=pRlawTJ8HXzsV1iP8kK7WnynildCDpm-6XsFfDz0ibrXBFZLFb66OYJr2l7Zk83j03_Ot-IouqsZt_2Pe-pO-aJE9LFJMkeWeYx6E56c-svNpce1HF5NYkgj-8unXXkVGPX3IwNVfIS0b3xjNdCwJthN8sEpnmec_1MoohTpiyAy5RCfSG8jQ0H083XmjPgkPpPYmBsg7wbwF-0E3TWArUWT_9j82-821kKfURue8HsC-Ssbf3Bue7gBk0gHGwN6WENE_p7_2TwYDbdc9n1ObkuVPPx8BCXHKQbMOhl6cf-5XQLdu9m92Eyy3Qm6Vyo3cBFItHDQpr7tPpdZ9vFo4Iz5v97lhD4HAUgxkl7C2Dg%3D)
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=2815334759e641e98e47708188e0e222&_e=pRlawTJ8HXzsV1iP8kK7WnynildCDpm-6XsFfDz0ibrXBFZLFb66OYJr2l7Zk83j03_Ot-IouqsZt_2Pe-pO-aJE9LFJMkeWeYx6E56c-svNpce1HF5NYkgj-8unXXkVGPX3IwNVfIS0b3xjNdCwJthN8sEpnmec_1MoohTpiyAy5RCfSG8jQ0H083XmjPgkPpPYmBsg7wbwF-0E3TWArfZms0hJDUTFv4NQkkWAubbiNcbfc8OdODfEkpUd-cewzZ_g0wT_CW6IugkQAzfHXR7KtUJGuXYsfv7va0dEtpEwmi4juHliq7JOhmqezx746XhTAvEn5phEvp80S61-M3PTZM1Mpup2VWrE1LjyuNo%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Col. Mike Waltz and Dan Crenshaw know a thing or two about taking on America’s enemies.

As a Green Beret and a Navy SEAL, they pushed their bodies to the limit to destroy _ANYONE_ who wanted to harm our great country.

And now, they’re teaming up for a new adventure: taking on the Mexican cartels.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We need your help to defend parental rights
body:
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That 's why I'm asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f05e17102ea74a248670f8fa206353aa&_e=NLV-eHxUQwiZz4U6vhFDd5PVq0EYVMx49N7pqvM5Cpwo9lBinxNBWYxZQueK3AAAkFDQmi34-PkGePRkAUF3OMZXaNylQfg5_qugFkrT-mbu1-I5YONc7IDu5garypKa22cmljr6PA9mlPUaIDoXP0whEx5PCppFAXdXqdDdfhiBbm37D6wCM6i3baz3YMP6y4Jf7ZmC1O46t7YsPs48QzZQlza-jbQclVDVrm5V3O0ErnxZn58ut_JnzdK6_uph-PamexvdJD16ZEmlJV1LX4VBIkqlICKHaPSaDibv6P9axbYUbvq9mNHchTdfxiOfs83SgJLIN5KMWbh4xeP0fi4-lWUBeSg6na8ByKMcaKP38JUWbj1HM8kPiT3u8j6Z) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they're doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we're going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that's exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** 's great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter's school and told that her daughter was now a "boy". She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was "transgender" and "bisexual"... Her impressionable daughter didn't even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica's innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy's name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a "Gender Support Plan" and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother's knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn 't be "trusted"****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They're not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They're not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They're not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent's values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now. **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f05e17102ea74a248670f8fa206353aa&_e=NLV-eHxUQwiZz4U6vhFDd5PVq0EYVMx49N7pqvM5Cpwo9lBinxNBWYxZQueK3AAAkFDQmi34-PkGePRkAUF3OMZXaNylQfg5_qugFkrT-mbu1-I5YONc7IDu5garypKa22cmljr6PA9mlPUaIDoXP0whEx5PCppFAXdXqdDdfhiBbm37D6wCM6i3baz3YMP6y4Jf7ZmC1O46t7YsPs48QzZQlza-jbQclVDVrm5V3O2WesGawspNwOGYcAwiZw65LIXHmnNxqI1OhIBE7r8RHKWKzKxWzh9Sc6y12TEBjOYt4n-avXBN5Fgw2IzALdXUZAh2AumIs6LPM72LqMmWOR2lKEAcXsHmsFpy93edlqzzwb9xbIIlFWU6oiNrrMMM) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and "interviewed" her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it's happening in secret so parents, grandparents and the community don't know what's going on. Jessica's innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don't act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It's horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That's why our lawsuit names the individual "teachers" \-- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f05e17102ea74a248670f8fa206353aa&_e=NLV-eHxUQwiZz4U6vhFDd5PVq0EYVMx49N7pqvM5Cpwo9lBinxNBWYxZQueK3AAAkFDQmi34-PkGePRkAUF3OMZXaNylQfg5_qugFkrT-mbu1-I5YONc7IDu5garypKa22cmljr6PA9mlPUaIDoXP0whEx5PCppFAXdXqdDdfhiBbm37D6wCM6i3baz3YMP6y4Jf7ZmC1O46t7YsPs48QzZQlza-jbQclVDVrm5V3O0GOUPqHk6p5z173jc15PRNq5Zo1m2uLB5ayJ5B8pKQ4h4Suf-HNsX04PWoDVVmWfZjtnoIoQmSS65PfSdSRFC0-bieHNDeI41DE3opt0LyH52bejep_EvO7hagpNp8fTZezTwFXwC96C7pHqESHZCV) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today - $50, $100, $250 or more - I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits - we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we're fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we're going to make them pay for their actions... clean_body: | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they're doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we're going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that's exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on Laura Ingraham 's great Fox News show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter's school and told that her daughter was now a "boy". She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was "transgender" and "bisexual"... Her impressionable daughter didn't even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica's innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy's name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a "Gender Support Plan" and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother's knowledge! And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn 't be "trusted". These people are not real teachers. They're not concerned with teaching our children to read... They're not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic... They're not concerned with teaching history... They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent's values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and "interviewed" her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it's happening in secret so parents, grandparents and the community don't know what's going on. Jessica's innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don't act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit The Ingraham Angle , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It's horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That's why our lawsuit names the individual "teachers" \-- we must hold them accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today - $50, $100, $250 or more - I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits - we WIN them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we're fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we're going to make them pay for their actions... We're ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can't do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon | | | P.S. The grooming and indoctrination happening in our schools must be stopped - and making the schools and individual "teachers" pay is the only way! That's why I'm asking you to join our critical lawsuit today. | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. As you know, leaders come from everywhere, and every background. Is there a rising star in your community? Now is your chance to celebrate her on a national level!

Every year, EMILYs List recognizes a woman currently serving in a state or local office with our **Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award**. This award highlights a leader with a promising career in public service ahead of her, and honors her for showing the same dedication, determination, and commitment as the award's namesake.

[**We want to hear from you, Peter. Nominate a state or local elected woman in your community for the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58353251/390814786/31491281?sourceid=1048581&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjRiMDNlZi00M2E2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BE8Uj9RySS7uKXOHFBcV96OH-kWy3AIPTtNqJli74gg=&emci=52ceede6-43a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=124b03ef-43a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

The recipient of the 2023 Rising Star Award will not only be honored at our annual We Are EMILY event this spring, but will also know that we appreciate her work and hope to support her in whatever she does next in her career.

Past recipients have included **Stacey Abrams** , former **Georgia state Rep. Bee Nguyen** ,**Rep. Ayanna Pressley (MA-07)** , **Harris County, Texas Judge Lina Hidalgo** , and **Rep. Emilia Sykes (OH-13)**. These women have made a huge difference in their cities, states, and our country.

**We are so excited to announce our next Rising Star, but we need your help to find her. Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Joe Biden just created 517,000 jobs, yes you read that number right, in January alone! He absolutely destroyed expectations. Unemployment is the lowest since 1969, over half a century ago.
body:
The State of our Union is strong
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16a75fc4-06c7-4b98-a58e-be0288674239/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Tomorrow will be an incredible day! Joe Biden gives his State of the Union (SOTU) Address. ** _Even though the media won't tell you, we have a helluva good state of the union. Joe Biden just created 517,000 jobs, yes you read that number right, in January alone! He absolutely destroyed expectations. Unemployment is the lowest since 1969, over half a century ago._ [**_Can you join us in getting Biden's back, giving his reelection campaign $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, as we approach his historic address to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te95c5a23-bd1c-4688-8919-0648f1f40e26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Biden came into office on the heels of an attempted coup, has thwarted most GOP attempts at radical insanity, passed bipartisan legislation (infrastructure, guns), united Democrats on incredibly important measures (COVID stimulus, getting us back to work, and inflation reduction), and has handled the job with grace, class and dignity. **_ _Meanwhile, dimwits like Marjorie Taylor Greene and the guy who lost the last presidential election scream and yell about impeaching him and attack his son, a victim of addiction, constantly, cruelly and publicly, even as they know President Biden lost his first wife, daughter and son Beau, all to tragedy._ _They act like have no souls._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9cef4746-a23c-495d-bd85-4d7b2afb5036/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| _Meanwhile, the President IS the heart & soul of this country, repairing GOP damage while moving us forward. He's been incredible.
