| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: When I step up to the podium tomorrow, I will be thinking of folks like you, Derek​.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
My team and I are putting the finishing touches on my State of the Union address right now, but before I take the podium, I wanted to reach out to you. | |
---
My team and I are putting the finishing touches on my State of the Union address right now, but before I take the podium, I wanted to reach out to you, Derek. **You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation.** That is in no small part because of the strength of this grassroots team, Derek. Over the last two years -- and with your help -- Kamala and I have gotten our country back on track. Tomorrow, I’ll have a chance to speak directly to the American people about all of the progress we’ve made and what we still have left to do. **Before I step up to the podium tomorrow, will you chip in $7 to the DNC to say you’re still with me in the fight to deliver a better America?**

clean_body: My team and I are putting the finishing touches on my State of the Union address right now, but before I take the podium, I wanted to reach out to you. | | My team and I are putting the finishing touches on my State of the Union address right now, but before I take the podium, I wanted to reach out to you, Derek. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation. That is in no small part because of the strength of this grassroots team, Derek. Over the last two years -- and with your help -- Kamala and I have gotten our country back on track. Tomorrow, I’ll have a chance to speak directly to the American people about all of the progress we’ve made and what we still have left to do. Before I step up to the podium tomorrow, will you chip in $7 to the DNC to say you’re still with me in the fight to deliver a better America? From historic action to combat gun violence and climate change, to rebuilding our economy, beating Big Pharma, and ensuring the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations begin to pay their fair share in taxes -- I’m not shying away from the tough fights. After all, it’s why Kamala and I were elected: To fight for folks like you, Derek. And I am so grateful that you are just as committed to working for a better future as we are. I hope you’ll be tuning in tomorrow night, and I hope I make you proud. Thank you for all that you do, Joe Joseph R. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: A life-altering decision
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr9m8maig8kdv6s40uidcd274h7ao5crmg5aqldo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za75nitc3is775scnfnirngie0m7vh0g9b0a088o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5q7sb47hpv497k1hbo76esm448ska255lghafc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zttsiac6bg7iob4offfn33n9plfq3q86aa06bjho_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjkctbl6d450sqj5mj6mqe0qk33daj0vqri5oaig_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbc48k6bu851u8bs8hu3k9g6tf4hpnnehn12e4h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zau7krq9ia3p9hvgudiuo9o7jd342dakuk4j8uro_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7q4ni7b1pol8f4e9fsduknpe57m3rcmh1q2nsvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zte0cv0ll14mlclauii86eiscdd8tnvg45r9kr80_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth6coj2cjh2bs)
---

And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. subject: re: We have to DEMAND action

body:
It’s time for Biden’s open-border agenda to END.
| Peter,
---
Customs and border protection’s recent report states that fentanyl seizures at the border jumped more than 50%, in **JUST ONE MONTH** , between November and December of this past year.
---
And in December alone, we saw the **HIGHEST** number of migrant encounters ever recorded.
---
This administration’s blatant ignorance and disregard for the danger their open-border policies present is unacceptable and can’t continue if we want to ensure the safety and security of America.
---
**It’s time to hold the Biden Administration’s feet to the fire.**
---
And I want to know if you believe that the**impeachment of Secretary of Homeland Security** ,**Alejandro Mayorkas** , who has failed in his job to secure our southern border is necessary to get this crisis under control.
---
[**Please take our Official Mayorkas Impeachment Poll today to let your voice be heard and join our DEMAND for action from the Biden Administration to secure our southern border.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=a5db53569954400f9ba58e1718a93f13&_e=dbOCFN6JsaZaxJP8Ql_trQojkiZZkgJZhn88tVvmHY5NcyFIgFRlpoF652QZGkGxP0takqHpKvW2SOGQ_evwEqB_UouKCiqJLZH8Npo1PwXvRXdCZ3r2-D72gvx4_S-zL2bEIA7vSTHjBOoudxhVLt3qyTDDRAivm8rmPS79s2LRt67dUu5FIKBVhqld1eO6TX6N9HNxKWnm1uJrtUaXOvz9NCJh2CCLAG_wp0ckJ8G4lzNGM2C9KvD_Sq9vNRBUTbzA21p3At8nwXIgHzcKyP9tqS-9RdZf409A54iCU5ULoVNkNFwB6HM3HA4-cfuT60WliCkcUlBV-Md6ACs9Gv5AHOslPIpoxp_Df8itLYE%3D)

**From:** Scott Fitzgerald
**Date:** Wed, Jan 25, 2023
**Subject:** Secure our border!
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
[](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=a5db53569954400f9ba58e1718a93f13&_e=dbOCFN6JsaZaxJP8Ql_trQojkiZZkgJZhn88tVvmHY5NcyFIgFRlpoF652QZGkGxP0takqHpKvW2SOGQ_evwEqB_UouKCiqJLZH8Npo1PwXvRXdCZ3r2-D72gvx4_S-zL2bEIA7vSTHjBOoudxhVLt3qyTDDRAivm8rmPS79s2LRt67dUu5FIKBVhqld1eO6TX6N9HNxKWnm1uJrtUaXOtz5qoI9SVvAevn5evWbq_bLbzOqyqN675l2a7TV36Bl-qcsFlWE1Xzub0YRFLwdoUDwkiHI7jfaD-cH8taUNaVMqxak1FDKvGcPboYbNu7wwrmhkFOlRvODkaRNc4kAAmqyY1BS6FmJXT9hX6CUgwE%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Monthly encounters between U.S. Border Patrol Agents and migrants at our southern border remain at levels that have not been seen in more than **TWO DECADES!**
---
Yet, when the Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas, is questioned about the border he tells us, “ _our border is secure._ ”
---
It’s time that we held the people responsible for this crisis accountable and that starts with Mayorkas.
---
That’s why I need you to take my Official Mayorkas Impeachment Poll to let your voice be heard and help us **DEMAND** action.
---
[**Please take my official poll today to let me know if you think Mayorkas should be impeached >>**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=a5db53569954400f9ba58e1718a93f13&_e=dbOCFN6JsaZaxJP8Ql_trQojkiZZkgJZhn88tVvmHY5NcyFIgFRlpoF652QZGkGxP0takqHpKvW2SOGQ_evwEqB_UouKCiqJLZH8Npo1PwXvRXdCZ3r2-D72gvx4_S-zL2bEIA7vSTHjBOoudxhVLt3qyTDDRAivm8rmPS79s2LRt67dUu5FIKBVhqld1eO6TX6N9HNxKWnm1uJrtUaXOgf5IBRDTyKd2z-4SXitP6NTHF8_hdMWIIfaAMCkm6KIkudQixswwRInPV6eY_h_wA1W8cso8AoTy0TuzzNxRlvnQsm_N0Sgbd3CsW666Uw0Eqhcr_YPGmDhen6lUqiI51Uvx4bIP3fv6hQSh7N7mSg%3D)
---

[TAKE THE POLL](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=a5db53569954400f9ba58e1718a93f13&_e=dbOCFN6JsaZaxJP8Ql_trQojkiZZkgJZhn88tVvmHY5NcyFIgFRlpoF652QZGkGxP0takqHpKvW2SOGQ_evwEqB_UouKCiqJLZH8Npo1PwXvRXdCZ3r2-D72gvx4_S-zL2bEIA7vSTHjBOoudxhVLt3qyTDDRAivm8rmPS79s2LRt67dUu5FIKBVhqld1eO6TX6N9HNxKWnm1uJrtUaXOlA23JysCM3fJibQhafGXdy5U9P0EinHRF-_8py-oUUTTKYejN9miG8B0qrX5NYvskQkL4Wox_JMM0CFr4SC3ZnL36YA7bo4Ik1fOGu3uYz-DhHpG-NUH1JkPSz6-No-olg2DrfYwYATqdRN7h-2DGo%3D)
---

At least 98 suspected terrorists crossed the border into the U.S. illegally in the last year, putting Americans’ safety at risk.
---
And fentanyl is coming across the border at a record rate – more than 379 million deadly doses were seized in 2022 – more than enough to kill every single American.
---
**If we continue down this path of open-border policies and ignorance from those in charge, the consequences will be even more catastrophic in this new year.**
---
We have to secure our southern border to stop the flood of illegal migrants and drugs from threatening the safety of our country and YOU.
---
_And by DEMANDING action against Mayorkas and the Biden Administration, we will be one step closer to a secured border._
---
[**So please, take my official poll today to let me know if you think Mayorkas should be impeached >>**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=a5db53569954400f9ba58e1718a93f13&_e=dbOCFN6JsaZaxJP8Ql_trQojkiZZkgJZhn88tVvmHY5NcyFIgFRlpoF652QZGkGxP0takqHpKvW2SOGQ_evwEqB_UouKCiqJLZH8Npo1PwXvRXdCZ3r2-D72gvx4_S-zL2bEIA7vSTHjBOoudxhVLt3qyTDDRAivm8rmPS79s2LRt67dUu5FIKBVhqld1eO6TX6N9HNxKWnm1uJrtUaXOs6qWiWlne9bzH8gud6u0OB3jmsx8fLIReuMAVjI0gim3Kcgf-PgRg11yF9rdVsWaCe1P0t5PCqqLT0TarQQ4ygoABB1u_BRurCzh28Ccu1-ixhFO_r8fGS0KIKpmCZwYL-eWm2iSID243ZGzPwWJdg%3D)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: A life-altering decision
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlujebm9120nrsg449i9df42s95ima3ec4qnktg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg45tufqsrqjflm607fmampi4tpo8n50eed13da8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfv59goacab1ds4kumnlv6grb5eioa87gnn0vbg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z26dqg161q640r1ekt71jjn7csr7dlhap21g4o68_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhr4534gun6cjc5roj1h40lr1u7tjbhkjpk7r73o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdmn3ch0kq7b9v5tbsfegnf3j5n21mr1em5kvutg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh5jkd85rk31gjk8mieso0sf7hgsh70aj7njgf90_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi80gd2sbvc61magf1g16dljdmbq37i9kosnal30_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5a1eakt7fo1esl9nqkgg50fsv4ogt8nhnbv3il0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth62ob6cph2bs)

clean_body: My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.” | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?” This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The 5 lies of Critical Race Theory
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._Gw)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They'll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That's why I'm sending you this email today.
---
| | I'm told that you are an American who is concerned about the levels of indoctrination we've seen from Critical Race Theory-and what that could mean for the future of our country. **So, today,[ I want to send you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's latest eBook, ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**[**_The 5 Lies of CRT_****.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Inside this important resource, you'll not only learn the 5 lies Progressives have employed in their campaign to push Critical Race Theory, but you'll also discover that:
* None of CRT's policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.
* All of the biggest names pushing CRT have affirmed that they are promoting Marxism.
* The Left is using CRT to wage a battle royal for the soul of America-and even the West itself.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/5lies-of-crt-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** As the Left ramps up their campaign through the power of the media and Big Tech, it is crucial that we inform as many people as possible with the truth about what is really going on. I hope this is a helpful resource for you. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development, The Heritage Foundation

name: =?utf-8?Q?Anika=20R.=20Page?=
subject: A Women's Bill of Rights Luncheon
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132796?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
Riley Gaines is one of America's top female swimmers and a 12X American champion.

She will be speaking in Jackson, and I wondered if you might like to come and have lunch with her and hear what she has to say?

Riley knows from her own experience how radical "woke" ideologues are damaging women's sports. She knows what it is like for a top female athlete to suddenly find herself having to compete against someone born a man, but who then identifies as a woman.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1b5e6b6c62&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket_
| Riley will be joined by Mandy Gunasekara from the Independent Women's Forum, as they explain why Mississippi needs to adopt a Women's Bill of Rights.

**Riley Gaines, US swimming champion** Riley is a recent graduate from the University of Kentucky where she was a 12x All-American swimmer. This past year, Riley competed and tied with transgender swimmer Lia Thomas at their NCAA championships. Since directly experiencing the injustice of allowing men in women's sports, Riley has been outspoken on why this issue is blatantly unfair and harmful to females in so many ways. **Mandy Gunasekara, Independent Women’s Forum** Mandy served as Chief of Staff of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, helping set environmental policy priorities for the Trump-Pence Administration. In addition to IWF, she is a visiting fellow at the Heritage Foundation, she has also worked as a Senior Fellow for the Texas Public Policy Foundation, and regularly appears on Fox News. A sixth-generation Mississippian, she and her husband and two children call Oxford, Mississippi, home.

She knows what it is like for a top female athlete to suddenly find herself having to compete against someone born a man, but who then identifies as a woman. | Click on the image above to reserve a ticket | Riley will be joined by Mandy Gunasekara from the Independent Women's Forum, as they explain why Mississippi needs to adopt a Women's Bill of Rights. – Jacky

| | |

| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 6, 2023

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28803&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvam9lLWJpZGVuLXNlbmF0ZS1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Judicial Watch Continues to Push in Court for Testimony on Secret University of Delaware Deal with Joe Biden to Hide Senate Records](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28803&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvam9lLWJpZGVuLXNlbmF0ZS1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** “Congress should follow Judicial Watch’s lead and immediately move to subpoena, secure and examine the trove of secret Biden Senate records being held in the University of Delaware,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Judicial Watch, in the meantime, will continue fighting in court to overcome the university’s desperate secrecy over its deal with Biden to keep these records away from the American people.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28803&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvam9lLWJpZGVuLXNlbmF0ZS1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28825&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFyZ2luYWxpemVkLWNvbW11bml0aWVzLWluLWV1cm9wZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[U.S. will Pay $1 Mil to Empower Marginalized Racial, Ethnic Communities in Europe](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28825&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFyZ2luYWxpemVkLWNvbW11bml0aWVzLWluLWV1cm9wZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** The Biden administration’s costly, governmentwide effort to advance racial equity and support the nation’s underserved population through taxpayer-funded programs is going global. The administration recently disclosed that it is dedicating a million dollars to “empower marginalized racial and ethnic communities in Europe,” though details of how this will be accomplished remain ambiguous. What is clear is that the soon-to-be empowered minority Europeans are to include people of African descent and Roma people, according to the recently published grant announcement. This month the Biden administration revealed it is dedicating an additional $56.5 million to the failed initiative, explaining that the money is “for the people of Haiti in response to the country’s humanitarian crisis and cholera epidemic.” The announcement says Haiti’s alarming levels of gang violence have prevented people from accessing food, fuel water and other basic supplies but fails to reveal how this latest allocation will change that. ### [Obama signs off on Klain’s official departure, Biden taps controversial new chief-of-staff ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28826&F=H&) BizPac Review President Joe Biden made it official on Friday that White House chief of staff Ron Klain will step down next week, and announced that Jeff Zients, who ran Biden’s Covid-19 response operation, will replace Klain — Zients, a former Bain Capital consultant who served under Barack Obama, being known for declaring in 2021 that unvaccinated Americans were “looking at a winter of severe illness and death.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28826&F=H&)

### [Biden judicial nominee ridiculed after failing to recall parts of the Constitution: ‘Hoo boy this is bad’ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28827&F=H&) Fox News Judge Charnelle Bjelkengren, a Biden judicial nominee for U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Washington, went viral on Twitter for her failure to recall basic U.S. Constitution knowledge on Thursday.

The Senate Judiciary Committee met for a confirmation hearing earlier that morning when Sen. John Kennedy, R-La., began his time asking Bjelkengren about different parts of the U.S. Constitution. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62057&L=28827&F=H&)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a reply brief on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and itself in the Supreme Court of Delaware asking for limited discovery, including, at a minimum, deposing a university representative. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 6, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | “Congress should follow Judicial Watch’s lead and immediately move to subpoena, secure and examine the trove of secret Biden Senate records being held in the University of Delaware,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Judicial Watch, in the meantime, will continue fighting in court to overcome the university’s desperate secrecy over its deal with Biden to keep these records away from the American people.” ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for communications and records of the Surgeon General’s Communications Director’s contact with social media companies regarding COVID-19 vaccines = ---|--- | | | | == | == The Biden administration’s costly, governmentwide effort to advance racial equity and support the nation’s underserved population through taxpayer-funded programs is going global. The administration recently disclosed that it is dedicating a million dollars to “empower marginalized racial and ethnic communities in Europe,” though details of how this will be accomplished remain ambiguous. What is clear is that the soon-to-be empowered minority Europeans are to include people of African descent and Roma people, according to the recently published grant announcement. == ---|--- | | | | | Despite well-documented fraud and waste in the U.S. government’s costly and ineffective Haiti recovery campaign, American taxpayer dollars keep flowing to the poverty-stricken Caribbean island with no oversight. This month the Biden administration revealed it is dedicating an additional $56.5 million to the failed initiative, explaining that the money is “for the people of Haiti in response to the country’s humanitarian crisis and cholera epidemic.” The announcement says Haiti’s alarming levels of gang violence have prevented people from accessing food, fuel water and other basic supplies but fails to reveal how this latest allocation will change that. ---|--- | | | == BizPac Review President Joe Biden made it official on Friday that White House chief of staff Ron Klain will step down next week, and announced that Jeff Zients, who ran Biden’s Covid-19 response operation, will replace Klain — Zients, a former Bain Capital consultant who served under Barack Obama, being known for declaring in 2021 that unvaccinated Americans were “looking at a winter of severe illness and death.” == Fox News Judge Charnelle Bjelkengren, a Biden judicial nominee for U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Washington, went viral on Twitter for her failure to recall basic U.S. Constitution knowledge on Thursday. The Senate Judiciary Committee met for a confirmation hearing earlier that morning when Sen. John Kennedy, R-La., began his time asking Bjelkengren about different parts of the U.S. Constitution. == Newsmax There could be several legal issues at play with Newsmax being dropped from DirecTV’s satellite and streaming platforms, including whether AT&T; and DirecTV are lying about their reasons for dropping the network, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton says. == == == | CLIPS == | | | == | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved = |

If you’re anything like us, you’ll be tuning in to tomorrow’s State of the Union address (with popcorn, of course 🍿). It’s our annual opportunity to hear directly from President Biden about what the administration has achieved and what their major priorities are for the year ahead.
**Here’s the topic we deserve to hear more about: democracy and voting rights.** While extremists continue to introduce severe anti-voter policies across the country, the threat to democracy is more present than ever — and we hope that President Biden covers this important topic so even more Americans are aware of the injustices many experience on the way to the ballot box.
At Fair Fight Action, we know all too well that without a functioning democracy and elections system, making progress on any of these other vital issues simply isn’t possible. And until Congress passes federal democracy and voting rights protections, bad actors in state and local governments will continue to pass laws that undermine our democracy and silence our voices. That’s why we need sweeping, national change.
[_**A**_ _**dd your name to show that local**a** ctivists across the country are demanding that democracy and voting rights become a national priority once again:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372426/390858631/1346620699?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230206_e_sotu_v1s1&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230206_e_sotu_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTMxYzAxYS03OGE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-mfwR02UnQDcxLk2mx0KmfOkxdhioz5rLev5nQlqxY=&emci=c331c01a-78a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c531c01a-78a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

Friend,

_It 's a new year, and I'm thrilled to get to work for you both at home in NY-11 and here in Washington. _

| | Good afternoon, Dr. Bob Lorinser here, running for US Congress in Michigan's 1st District. I know the political cycles of fundraising can be exhausting for both of us. Unfortunately, without campaign finance reform, my competition and their corporate PAC money can create start-up obstacles. I come to you today seeking funding to get my Congressional campaign and our '[Rural Fund](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/4cOOdqlIK/c?w=js7NGsorjJOZnSSsKHwoVyIoXbPsXYS4eqJhzwN29mc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3J1cmFsZnVuZCIsInIiOiJkYTc1MmUxZC05ZWFkLTQxNTMtYjBlYi0wZWUwNzQxNDdmMDYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)' off the ground. I may be running for an open seat. I may be running against the winner of a strong Republican field of at least four candidates. I know August 2024 is far away, but I'm asking you to be a [founding donor](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/4cOOdqlIK/c?w=UHwzwqgmMs4OB5Goy3orBhgf_9m1fwHPoKz0eRz8K8c.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhNzUyZTFkLTllYWQtNDE1My1iMGViLTBlZTA3NDE0N2YwNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) of my campaign. Currently, my team is building a robust campaign infrastructure and the beginnings of a strong field team. We're working to partner with other quality candidates, important initiatives, and 36 of Michigan's 83 county parties. I'm asking for your support in the endeavor to advance Democratic principles and hold legislators accountable across this district. I hope you agree our large network and the groundwork we established in 2022 gives my campaign the unique opportunity to be a driving change this cycle. My work starts now. We're in discussions with organizations that give grants to rural counties, eliminate medical debt, create democratic resolutions for party leaders, and so much more. I hope to announce some serious progress on these fronts in the next few months - all will help hard-working, rural families across Michigan and America's heartland. I desperately need your help getting there. If you can contribute anything now, I would greatly appreciate it. Here's a link and more information:
---
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/4cOOdqlIK/c?w=WA-8NNn3Mh6d3XtNjoGxkLNMEYkoRC4zQDNCYu7tnQU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImUyOWE3MGUyLTRkY2MtNDYyYy05NDBmLTg4ZTI5MjZlYzc1YyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)

Candidate for US Congress (D, MI01)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: We must invest in workers and families now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58361056/390824130/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWIxOGM5YS00ZmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0exZmNV-RyVgq7rfVgRGYLoFrGB3RAj7Y0ItiZQa29Y=&emci=3376d8bc-3fa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=19b18c9a-4fa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **Thirty years ago the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) was signed into law.** It was a huge step forward and has been a lifeline for countless workers nationwide. For the first time, workers facing a personal or family emergency could take leave without fear of losing their jobs. **Now it's time to take the next step forward: we must build on the progress of the FMLA by guaranteeing paid leave for everyone.** We are the only industrialized nation in the world that does not guarantee workers paid time off. This forces parents to choose between caring for their sick child or being able to pay bills and put food on the table. It forces workers to choose between caring for an aging parent or paying their rent. Poverty is a policy choice. And by not guaranteeing every worker in our country the right to paid leave, we are forcing countless Americans to make impossible decisions. It's past time our labor laws meet the needs of our 21st-century workforce and economy, so all of us can thrive. That's why I'm on the front lines advocating to get paid leave over the finish line. The road may be tough, but the battle for the FMLA thirty years ago is proof that progress _is_ possible. **We must invest in workers and families now, and you can count on me to stand firm in this fight.** _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | Thirty years ago the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) was signed into law. It was a huge step forward and has been a lifeline for countless workers nationwide. For the first time, workers facing a personal or family emergency could take leave without fear of losing their jobs. Now it's time to take the next step forward: we must build on the progress of the FMLA by guaranteeing paid leave for everyone. We are the only industrialized nation in the world that does not guarantee workers paid time off. This forces parents to choose between caring for their sick child or being able to pay bills and put food on the table. It forces workers to choose between caring for an aging parent or paying their rent. Poverty is a policy choice. And by not guaranteeing every worker in our country the right to paid leave, we are forcing countless Americans to make impossible decisions. It's past time our labor laws meet the needs of our 21st-century workforce and economy, so all of us can thrive. That's why I'm on the front lines advocating to get paid leave over the finish line. The road may be tough, but the battle for the FMLA thirty years ago is proof that progress is possible. We must invest in workers and families now, and you can count on me to stand firm in this fight. name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
February is Black History Month, an opportunity to celebrate the cultural, political, and economic contributions of Black Americans, and to reflect on the work still ahead of us.

| Peter,

February is Black History Month, an opportunity to celebrate the cultural, political, and economic contributions of Black Americans, and to reflect on the work still ahead of us.

Growing up in North Carolina taught me the value of hard work, community, and service. But it wasn’t always easy.

I saw my parents work hard to set my five siblings and me up for success at a time when it was difficult to get an equitable education. It is thanks to my family’s hard work and determination that I am here today.

Though we’ve come a long way, the impacts of systemic racism reverberate in nearly every facet of our lives. We see it in restrictions on voting rights, our criminal justice system, healthcare inequity, and disparate impacts of climate change.

But this doesn’t mean there isn’t hope. Across the country, we are coming together to tackle these issues with the urgency they require.

I’ve done it before. As a state Senator, I fought to expand voting access across North Carolina and championed the fight for environmental justice in the Orange County Board of Commissioners. And in Congress, I plan on continuing my lifelong fight against systemic racism.

This Black History Month, let’s reaffirm our commitment to ending inequality and ensuring a more equitable future for our children and grandchildren.

With gratitude,

Valerie Foushee
---

name: Becca Balint
subject: What I’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
From the campaign to Congress, we’ve done a lot in our first month! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372581/390859438/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBkOWRmNi03OWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z8flkL2fXk4tQTef7Pq5wE4OMOBPCpa-5R6CDY9Ea8=&emci=796152db-51a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=df0d9df6-79a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Hi Peter, What an incredible first month it’s been serving Vermonters in Washington! From my committee work in Congress, to campaign stops back home, I wanted to share what I’ve been up to in the first month of 2023. Here’s a recap: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372582/390859439/225570094?refcode=E20218-20230206-CampaignUpdate-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBkOWRmNi03OWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z8flkL2fXk4tQTef7Pq5wE4OMOBPCpa-5R6CDY9Ea8=) After being sworn in, signing my oath of office, and nominating our new Democratic Leader Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, I began to receive leadership roles, committee assignments, an official ID card (pictured above – pretty cool!!), and work with my staff to set my legislative agenda for the 118th Congress (more coming on that soon). The photo above was taken by James Buck to accompany a Seven Days profile on my first days in Washington. [_**If you haven’t already, you can read that piece here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372583/390859440/949398223?oid=37442274&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBkOWRmNi03OWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z8flkL2fXk4tQTef7Pq5wE4OMOBPCpa-5R6CDY9Ea8=&emci=796152db-51a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=df0d9df6-79a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372584/390859441/225570094?refcode=E20218-20230206-CampaignUpdate-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBkOWRmNi03OWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z8flkL2fXk4tQTef7Pq5wE4OMOBPCpa-5R6CDY9Ea8=) A highlight has also been being welcomed into the Congressional Progressive Caucus, where I will be serving as a Freshman Co-Chair while working alongside an incredible group of freshman members who share my progressive vision and values. Reps. Delia Ramirez, Maxwell Frost, and Robert Garcia – three of my new CPC colleagues and friends in the selfie above – will be some of my closest collaborators during my first term! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372585/390859442/-273067136?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBkOWRmNi03OWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z8flkL2fXk4tQTef7Pq5wE4OMOBPCpa-5R6CDY9Ea8=&emci=796152db-51a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=df0d9df6-79a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) Finally, in one of my proudest moments of the month, I was appointed to the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Accountability under the leadership of Rep. Jaime Raskin. There, I am serving alongside strong progressive voices like Ro Khanna, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Katie Porter to defend our democracy, investigate bad actors, and make our government as transparent as possible. [_**If you haven’t already, take a moment to watch me speak on MSNBC about my work on the Oversight Committee now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372586/390859443/-278481461?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBkOWRmNi03OWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z8flkL2fXk4tQTef7Pq5wE4OMOBPCpa-5R6CDY9Ea8=&emci=796152db-51a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=df0d9df6-79a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) Even with Month One in the books, calling myself your Congresswoman still feels surreal. Please know that every day that I step into this work, I feel the weight of my responsibility to our state and to our country, **and I will _never_ take the trust, support, or power that Vermonters have vested in me for granted. ** Thank you for your continued support of my work in Washington. Onward to Month Two! Yours, Becca Balint

clean_body: From the campaign to Congress, we’ve done a lot in our first month! | | Hi Peter, What an incredible first month it’s been serving Vermonters in Washington! From my committee work in Congress, to campaign stops back home, I wanted to share what I’ve been up to in the first month of 2023. Here’s a recap: = After being sworn in, signing my oath of office, and nominating our new Democratic Leader Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, I began to receive leadership roles, committee assignments, an official ID card (pictured above – pretty cool!!), and work with my staff to set my legislative agenda for the 118th Congress (more coming on that soon). The photo above was taken by James Buck to accompany a Seven Days profile on my first days in Washington. = A highlight has also been being welcomed into the Congressional Progressive Caucus, where I will be serving as a Freshman Co-Chair while working alongside an incredible group of freshman members who share my progressive vision and values. Reps. Delia Ramirez, Maxwell Frost, and Robert Garcia – three of my new CPC colleagues and friends in the selfie above – will be some of my closest collaborators during my first term! Finally, in one of my proudest moments of the month, I was appointed to the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Accountability under the leadership of Rep. Jaime Raskin. There, I am serving alongside strong progressive voices like Ro Khanna, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Katie Porter to defend our democracy, investigate bad actors, and make our government as transparent as possible. Even with Month One in the books, calling myself your Congresswoman still feels surreal. Please know that every day that I step into this work, I feel the weight of my responsibility to our state and to our country, and I will never take the trust, support, or power that Vermonters have vested in me for granted. Thank you for your continued support of my work in Washington. Onward to Month Two! Yours, Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, ** = If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P.O. Box 291, Burlington, VT, 05402

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Honoring Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
We can, and must, do better to ensure we live up to the American values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for all.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58362401/390826133/464750089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmQxNjM3ZS01MGE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-J65UZA4XyA19C33s_MCDqvYMYCE_CKyENlrAVXXJ8k=&emci=e653a0fe-33a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=efd1637e-50a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894) Dear Derek,

February is Black History Month, a time to honor the contributions of Black Americans to our country’s history, culture, and communities.

**But this month also gives us time to reflect on the fight for justice and equality that is far from over.**

We must ensure equal access to health care, education, jobs, and more – no matter what you look like. We must protect voting rights and combat the GOP’s undemocratic attempts to suppress voters, particularly Black voters. We must respond to the racial injustices that so many are speaking out against and address systemic racism in our country. We must defend our public schools and universities from the radical right’s attacks that seek to undermine and erase Black history from our curriculum.

**We can,_and must_ , do better to ensure we live up to the American values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness _for all_.**

[**If you agree, I hope you’ll add your name next to mine to join my call to demand justice and equality for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58362405/390826138/-1906779041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmQxNjM3ZS01MGE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-J65UZA4XyA19C33s_MCDqvYMYCE_CKyENlrAVXXJ8k=&emci=e653a0fe-33a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=efd1637e-50a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=13185894)

Thank you, and happy Black History Month,

Chris __ |

Thank you, and happy Black History Month, Chris | | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. subject: How the new House majority spent the first month of the year:
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
As we expected, this is how House Republicans spent the first month of their new majority:
*
Failing
to
organize
and
fighting
over
leadership.
It
took
them
multiple
days
and
15
votes
to
elect
their
new
Speaker,
delaying
swearing
in
members
of
Congress
and
keeping
them
from
doing
the
jobs
they
were
elected
to
do.
*
Threatening
to
default
on
the
national
debt.
It
is
a
move
that
could
put
millions
of
Americans’
retirements,
seniors’
Social
Security
payments,
and
veterans’
benefits
—
as
well
as
our
economy
—
at
risk.
Why?
So
that
they
can
make
massive
cuts
to
programs
Texans
and
American
families
rely
on
every
day,
like
Social
Security
and
Medicare.
*
Spreading
dangerous
misinformation.
Some
of
the
first
bills
they
brought
to
the
floor
were
based
on
false
claims
about
abortion
care
and
tacitly
condoned
violence
against
reproductive
health
care
providers.
*
Passing
bills
that
would
actually
hurt,
not
help.
They’ve
advanced
measures
that
would
increase
the
burden
on
taxpayers
by
cutting
much-needed
IRS
resources
to
help
families
and
small
business
owners,
and
limiting
the
White
House’s
ability
to
lower
gas
prices.
They aren’t doing it without a fight. Lizzie’s been fighting the bad ideas every step of the way. And she is going to keep fighting for the priorities of TX-07, our state, and our country.
And together, #TeamLizzie is going to keep fighting to re-elect Lizzie and win back the House majority so we can return to leadership that’s focused on getting the things done that Americans want done. Your contributions support our efforts — will you make a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230206?refcode=folf230206]

Team Lizzie

It took them multiple days and 15 votes to elect their new Speaker, delaying swearing in members of Congress and keeping them from doing the jobs they were elected to do. Threatening to default on the national debt. It is a move that could put millions of Americans’ retirements, seniors’ Social Security payments, and veterans’ benefits — as well as our economy — at risk. Why? So that they can make massive cuts to programs Texans and American families rely on every day, like Social Security and Medicare. Spreading dangerous misinformation. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: This win has been years in the making
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Updates on our fight to protect Puget Sound
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372773/390861060/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZiNWI4ODUtN2FhNi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7QLDI7F7hntNDMZiCxa5VV3Fc3VGGOAXtxUHI9bp-H4=&emci=a7b5b885-7aa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=afb5b885-7aa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

BIG news, Peter!

President Joe Biden has officially signed the PUGET SOS Act into law as part of the _National Defense Authorization Act of 2023!_ As Co-Chair of the Puget Sound Recovery Caucus alongside Rep. Marilyn Strickland, I'm especially proud to play a role in making this victory for environmental protection possible.

The _PUGET SOS Act_ will enhance the federal government's role in the protection and restoration of Puget Sound by increasing its involvement and investment in the heart and soul of Washington State. This includes establishing a Puget Sound Recovery National Program Office within the Environmental Protection Agency.

**[I want to be clear, Peter: This is a major step forward and a huge win for Puget Sound's recovery. As our state's economic engine and a large part of Washington's identity – this marks a years-in-the-making win for our home state. Will you take a moment to sign on in support of the _Puget SOS Act_ to endorse these crucial investments?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372774/390861062/-321691004?ms=em23_230206_pgtsos_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em23_230206_pgtsos_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em23_230206_pgtsos_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230206_pgtsos_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=noneY7RkM1A9NTSLGjEGCPwfYpVGyfuEw1F3hcUfVdwxJ%2B%2BI9DH3VTayITAFQBL3uDeLhKOq520b1HEXS09gzVPhKwlx%2FWoLcRq7nDfcpnrJWODLwDwR1qY5aSG0XpWOjzGUpNV5VyGN3iVzReXkD7fHlRwyQbpS%2BDdczswv7uU%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZiNWI4ODUtN2FhNi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7QLDI7F7hntNDMZiCxa5VV3Fc3VGGOAXtxUHI9bp-H4=&emci=a7b5b885-7aa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=afb5b885-7aa6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

This law will ensure that the federal government treats Puget Sound the same way other bodies of water of national significance are treated. It will also ensure that we can continue to count on this natural treasure _for generations to come._

I want to ensure that future generations will be able to thrive and enjoy the same economic opportunities afforded to past generations. **Laws like the _PUGET SOS Act_ play a key role in doing just that!**

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58372776/390861063/-1919651591?refcode=em23_230206_pgtsos_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230206_pgtsos_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZiNWI4ODUtN2FhNi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7QLDI7F7hntNDMZiCxa5VV3Fc3VGGOAXtxUHI9bp-H4=)

name: Breaking News via [AOTL]
subject: The North Carolina Supreme Court is taking action… and it isn’t good.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Let’s be clear. The content of the Harper v. Hall case or state law has not changed.
|
---

Team -- North Carolina Supreme Court decisions in _Harper v. Hall_ in 2022 were monumental in our fight against gerrymandering and for protecting North Carolinians’ ability to exercise their right to be heard.
But last week, newly sworn-in justices on North Carolina’s Supreme Court showed their extremist views by agreeing to reconsider the _Harper v. Hall_ ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map.
[**‘’This is not a function of legal principle -- it is an indication of political opportunism.’’**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58372769/390861012/2105777232?refcode=20230207_AOTL_F_NCRR_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNzA4NjVkLTdhYTYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=plmr32p-uAckbmLJrrHj3uWYtio_sazlfjLdEs0hvkE=)
**\-- A.G. Eric Holder**
| [**HELP US ADVOCATE FOR FAIR MAPS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58372771/390861049/2105777232?refcode=20230207_AOTL_F_NCRR_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNzA4NjVkLTdhYTYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=plmr32p-uAckbmLJrrHj3uWYtio_sazlfjLdEs0hvkE=)
---
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), has been in North Carolina fighting gerrymandered maps for the past five years. And amidst this attempt to politicize the state’s judicial branch, the NRF remains steadfast in its support of the plaintiffs in _Harper v. Hall_ , who are standing tall against gerrymandering.
_**So, what’s changed?**_

[**Let’s be clear. Nothing in state law has changed.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58372775/390861057/2105777232?refcode=20230207_AOTL_F_NCRR_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhNzA4NjVkLTdhYTYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=plmr32p-uAckbmLJrrHj3uWYtio_sazlfjLdEs0hvkE=) But Republican legislative leadership filed their petition to **_undermine the state’s system of checks and balances_** , under their belief that new justices on the state supreme court would side with them simply because they have the same party affiliation.

clean_body: Let’s be clear. The content of the Harper v. Hall case or state law has not changed. | Team -- North Carolina Supreme Court decisions in Harper v. Hall in 2022 were monumental in our fight against gerrymandering and for protecting North Carolinians’ ability to exercise their right to be heard. But last week, newly sworn-in justices on North Carolina’s Supreme Court showed their extremist views by agreeing to reconsider the Harper v. Hall ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map. = \-- A.G. Eric Holder | = Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), has been in North Carolina fighting gerrymandered maps for the past five years. And amidst this attempt to politicize the state’s judicial branch, the NRF remains steadfast in its support of the plaintiffs in Harper v. Hall , who are standing tall against gerrymandering. So, what’s changed? = But Republican legislative leadership filed their petition to undermine the state’s system of checks and balances , under their belief that new justices on the state supreme court would side with them simply because they have the same party affiliation. We can’t stress enough that the fair maps movement is about putting people over politics. And we won’t stand for lawmakers continuing to damage our democratic infrastructure that safeguards people’s rights. We need your help. name: Dan Kildee
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi,

I wanted to take a moment to thank all those who chipped in last month to become Founding Members of Team Kildee 2023 around our January fundraising deadline.

Your support helps us keep up our around-the-clock organizing here in mid-Michigan. We know that our district will remain one of the most competitive House races across the country, and that Michigan will be a major battleground state in 2024 with a presidential race and an open U.S. Senate race. I’m so appreciative of supporters like you who help us keep doing this important work.

Last November, we saw what Michigan Democrats can do when they invest early and run smart campaigns. Thanks to your support, we’ve started this cycle strong and are on our way to another blue wave here in Michigan going into 2024!

Thank you so much for your support,
Dan

_P.S. If you didn’t get the chance to donate before our deadline, or you want to double down on your support of our campaign,**[click here to chip in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58373080/390863056/-630486075?amount=15&contactdata=%2FMgXBCGgFiFUzKKlamfLmnpKqB7KpkFDMu%2F2GELS9s%2FVNxWf9LQfdNvbvfgtMdc6N1LAO%2Fo%2Bz0aMtkcsS4gYTHThK4uY5i0w4I41N%2F%2F0rfUlOj8qWXu8qnlMVvoD4FJNaIM0Z40reHsEv%2FrQvO%2B6EA%3D%3D&refcode2=024d021f-7ba6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230206_TY_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjRkMDIxZi03YmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4IEKIFHH_YvKFEZyHEvR2yrBpX7fPhssyKmsBdX7kE=)**_

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: My thoughts on Ilhan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is a dangerous and false conflation designed to threaten and prevent us from taking the matter of human rights in the region seriously.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230206-3861-header&t=1&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)
**_Let’s examine one of the GOP’s core arguments in removing Rep. Omar from the House Foreign Affairs Committee_** : that criticism of the U.S. and Israeli government’s role in the Palestinian human rights crisis — which organizations from Human Rights Watch1 to Amnesty International2 are sounding the alarm on — is equivalent to antisemitism.
It is important to recognize that this is a dangerous and false conflation designed to threaten and prevent us from taking the matter of human rights in the region seriously.
**_Jewish members of Congress themselves, of all positions and takes on the matter, conveyed horror at the charge of antisemitism being cynically weaponized_** to silence people in this fashion and testified to Rep. Ilhan Omar’s character. They asked the GOP to not do this in their name nor on their community’s behalf.
**_It also gets to one of the actual core reasons they sought to strip Rep. Omar of her committee assignment to Foreign Affairs: because her experience as a refugee, Muslim, immigrant, mother, and survivor of war gives her a unique and special credibility_** to challenge a U.S. foreign policy consensus that has too often failed both Americans at home and human beings abroad. Her presence, identity, and experience forces us to look in the mirror and sit with our policy decisions and costs of war, and center the victims, survivors, and those who are most impacted.
That is why it is important to show up and support in this moment, and see this cynical political attack for what it really is: fear of inspiring a larger shift towards accountability and transparency by everyday Americans regarding our own foreign policy.
[If you’re able to, will you split a contribution — of $6 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Ilhan’s so that we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-ilhan-email-20230206.z4OJRU&refcode=em20230206-3861-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)
**Together we will continue to fight for just foreign policy that supports human rights for all.**
**[Contribute $6](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-ilhan-email-20230206.z4OJRU&refcode=em20230206-3861-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria
1 - [Human Rights Watch
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16307?t=22&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)2 - [Amnesty International](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16308?t=23&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-ilhan-email-20230206?refcode=em20230206-3861-P&t=24&refcode2=3861_2526796_tSGTeo&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230206-3861-P&t=25&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=3861%2E2526796%2EtSGTeo)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Denisha Allen
subject: What COVID-19 exposed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
This was a huge wakeup call for a lot of parents
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj8i177dv7sja7q4chls0b2b3beb60bn1dea5cng_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs)
---
| | Friend, I’m Denisha Allen, and I'm reaching out on behalf of the American Federation for Children. Do you have a second for a quick story?
---
| | _“As a former public school teacher, Kat S. deeply values education. She was glad her local public school had a good reputation for quality. But even though her son made honor roll consistently, Kat suspected something was wrong. She never saw him writing, and she felt he wasn’t getting the help he needed at school for his ADHD.”_ _“When her son’s school closed during the COVID-19 pandemic, she learned just how bad things were. Assessments showed that her "honor roll student" was three years below grade level in math and could barely write more than a few sentences.” _ _-_[Fox News – 1/9/23](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zulsrtv8mudaklpvrlouv0r707ta3tcbj0ipgipg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs)
---
| | **Unfortunately, stories of parents like Kat aren’t unique**. The COVID-19 pandemic gave parents a glimpse into their kids' daily lives at school and exposed the failings of a one-size-fits-all approach. For many families, looking at their child’s curriculum over Zoom was all it took to want a change. For countless others, _distance learning just didn’t work._ Thankfully, Kat was able to utilize Arizona’s Education Saving Accounts and move her son into a learning environment best suited for him. The American Federation for Children believes every child and parent deserves access to these programs. And we’ve just successfully led an effort to pass Education Savings Accounts in Iowa! [_**Friend, will you help us continue bringing Education Savings Accounts to families across the country by chipping in a critical donation to the school choice movement?**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp0er29qnhreopqpqfr7iv1e0c90mgr5qlbv64k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs)
---
| | [**CHIP IN $100**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhvphedncp51e69uno3jpsfps4cd38pedb1cgdsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $75**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb36o9imc9q5368n451mnrahf2mgar3sk49p56n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ouiinoj6duaj0th4jodn1sar8okfuii09pj79g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs)
---
[**CHIP IN $35**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb9jlhvaltgjkcgpl9icu8anet6e3k32d4gmjaig_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs)
---
Friend, our organization is on the front lines of the school choice fight and in just the past few years, we’ve seen HUGE results.
* School choice is now supported by **72%** of Americans
* Our organization has rallied grassroots choice activists across the country
* Over **700K** students are now in school choice programs nationwide**

Now, we’re gearing up to take the next leap and deliver school choice wins in EVERY STATE in America. **That’s why we need your support –** our school choice opponents are working overtime to undo the hard work we’ve already accomplished. **For students across the country, we can’t afford to give up on this fight. **
We’re asking you to join the fight for students, parents, and school choice by making an [_**initial donation**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuq05l872on9shma2sb5pa2k43om7qnvmeoc7ho8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs) today.**[_Friend, are you a part of the 72% willing to fight for school choice?_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9mk0bf5qjagp1r2vblsicrt4dlc7v2kt2v4tcs8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cth61o34cth2bs)**
---

subject: Hail Mary

body:
| |
---
| | |
Friend, Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief.

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - but if we miss our critical fundraising deadline _we are going to fail._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans today to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

I'm only sending this hail mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. This is your _last chance_ to help House Republicans make it to the endzone.

**It 's game over without you.**

It's all up to you. If you ignore our pleas and drop the ball, then our chances of stopping Biden and Schumer's radical agenda are gone.
