subject: the 5 worst things in the parole board report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Guess what happens when you let murderers, rapists, and robbers out of prison?| | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2260c31c197f4fc7b3abc684637c8c47&_e=6Ve4D4H7GZJUb1KFjdx46ylNIK8UV8PUxX8SWGZ_3ZJMqOiX6m6_oVRF0rPCu3z5O0PKTu4aSTV6rKyhy-6pjCFe1Mz8JODOu12GS28ZUWLR1j8yQ4J7KeYc7FG5EOzO82B3J-TQnSH-qeIU1Wt9xma6_fIFycgD4awFfwXhpucAQkM8NBvV0X3L5eLH7Huy6aXWLTNkSNs4qBYupiGlGUC0GTj7wq8sFAf9xK_zLMn4XODPUGZcI7wIYvVkY9Fq)
---
Friend, Murderers. Rapists. Robbers. As Chair of the Virginia Parole Board, Adrianne Bennett stretched the rules to release so many of them... _...and they went on to re-offend again and again._ **The horrifying details are in our 69-page report on the sad state of the Virginia Parole Board.** In case you missed its release, I _**[took to Twitter](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2260c31c197f4fc7b3abc684637c8c47&_e=6Ve4D4H7GZJUb1KFjdx46ylNIK8UV8PUxX8SWGZ_3ZJMqOiX6m6_oVRF0rPCu3z5O0PKTu4aSTV6rKyhy-6pjCFe1Mz8JODOu12GS28ZUWKZp-kF7MmKPa1YO4NiMTsU4yxOcihrcNjclgFuHYFk3zfyGTf1cMRe6xZkXnNYxig3gSH_BU1FH-8tQ1-YAzsn7rWKuH6zfgttGn-zPTYaLPteOrtnE8FB_XIv229S0Oix_-XcN5OOGxTtfD7D51g-)**_ to recap the lowlights of this disturbing report:
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2260c31c197f4fc7b3abc684637c8c47&_e=6Ve4D4H7GZJUb1KFjdx46ylNIK8UV8PUxX8SWGZ_3ZJMqOiX6m6_oVRF0rPCu3z5O0PKTu4aSTV6rKyhy-6pjCFe1Mz8JODOu12GS28ZUWLFUF1QNqdlgQEUjSALTdGsthYxaScwlMlo-xxxiMI6dKF85DSwi-FDklOgbdh8IBqe5cgoSyqM3OKXMFpNZuyEO93-7xNzI1fCGPhy96dJlrWfMgMB88gbuSAE_mhxECH4yeiUr7bcdUczkyGYhNrs)
---
[**_Get the summary of the report here_**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2260c31c197f4fc7b3abc684637c8c47&_e=6Ve4D4H7GZJUb1KFjdx46ylNIK8UV8PUxX8SWGZ_3ZJMqOiX6m6_oVRF0rPCu3z5O0PKTu4aSTV6rKyhy-6pjCFe1Mz8JODOu12GS28ZUWLrVLGjLohSaqE8igtorqc1-cNftQvHq_fIH2W8AWPKBNUoyOptnTMomXhpPNiMFiTwuSSU4RJiwoYxttn3pysHtT4Jp0afkJGjAgGAR-aeyULAzedcpGorpJZTM_mEFjjiMeSArPnpP_lOjMM6iRuI). It’s worth your time. I’ll keep fighting to make sure that every part of our justice system is doing its job — and I’ll hold accountable those who put our safety at risk. Thank you for your ongoing support,Jason MiyaresAttorney General
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | _**A Personal Note from Jason:**_
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2260c31c197f4fc7b3abc684637c8c47&_e=6Ve4D4H7GZJUb1KFjdx468eKvyeQF5XlDYA27TOU_bpu7H96KSxi10SabdMlYEHMqjyT_yJuKiYhr5L3W9ss_z7PUf1Rz3EtTec4QWdpjQr8vtSPs_rKf8BBKliHRVyYctVRl9cx_x_S_Ur3DC78RpXdIObaKluU7bDPDwuq4j-83T1v561lAKfvue9fSR6mgh-GWOe-P-vJPfuumYxHtaoVbFVeUNSaQ0u-phVjS6c3WJ63JQ2mFp447H8Aqvh4)
---
50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. **Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.**
---
[**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2260c31c197f4fc7b3abc684637c8c47&_e=6Ve4D4H7GZJUb1KFjdx468eKvyeQF5XlDYA27TOU_bpu7H96KSxi10SabdMlYEHMqjyT_yJuKiYhr5L3W9ss_z7PUf1Rz3EtTec4QWdpjQqnoiB5KiVyX5WHxJRTFC4zVG3gfjVOiUAqOYlvEOOpnCDN243Cuens779Rp_6p_efcBI58o6E8ZIdzsYoMco2bIHItvg35fMTLKoP6FNPOQGqbwUs6Aw673eAZwNBhys_UVtsZ6VKFyg5TvOMuwaCg)
---
Want to make a positive impact on the Commonwealth’s future? clean_body: Guess what happens when you let murderers, rapists, and robbers out of prison?| | | Friend, Murderers. Rapists. Robbers. As Chair of the Virginia Parole Board, Adrianne Bennett stretched the rules to release so many of them... ...and they went on to re-offend again and again. The horrifying details are in our 69-page report on the sad state of the Virginia Parole Board. In case you missed its release, I - to recap the lowlights of this disturbing report: . It’s worth your time. I’ll keep fighting to make sure that every part of our justice system is doing its job — and I’ll hold accountable those who put our safety at risk. Thank you for your ongoing support,Jason MiyaresAttorney General | | | | | | A Personal Note from Jason: 50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream. Want to make a positive impact on the Commonwealth’s future? and provide him with your thoughts. | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23451 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
Friend,

It’s one of the best kept secrets in politics...and it’s all in THIS VIDEO! (https://secure.winred.com/1776-project-pac/2023-quote-video-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230206_e000320-ss_2023-quote-video-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

Ben Shapiro, Tucker Carlson,

Laura Ingraham, AND Glenn Beck

have already caught on to this secret...

In fact, they all can’t stop RAVING about the new Political Action Committee called the 1776 Project which is using this knowledge to save MILLIONS of children!

SEE WHAT THEY HAD TO SAY HERE >> (https://secure.winred.com/1776-project-pac/2023-quote-video-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230206_e000320-ss_2023-quote-video-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

So, what’s the big secret?

Well, few will admit it, but local school elections are likely the MOST IMPORTANT elections!

What the left doesn't want you to know is that electing conservative school board candidates is our best and ONLY hope of stopping their plan to indoctrinate our children and turn them into marxist foot soldiers.

Friend, we’re trusting you with EXCLUSIVE ACCESS to this information because we need your help. (https://secure.winred.com/1776-project-pac/2023-quote-video-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230206_e000320-ss_2023-quote-video-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

You see, Tucker, Ben, Laura, and Glenn all know that OUR team at the 1776 Project PAC is the leading Conservative School Board political action committee in America.

And as I write this message, our team at the 1776 Project PAC is gearing up for its BIGGEST year yet.

31 states have school board elections this year and we’re on the ground working on 250 races to get strong conservatives elected!

And during an odd year like 2023, this is even more important. Turnout is typically extremely low which means every vote and every dollar has MORE impact than EVER.

We’re counting on you to keep this information TOP SECRET from the leftists invading our schools. If they catch on, they will not hesitate to get their billionaire buddies like George Soros involved and crush our hopes of taking back our schools quietly at the local level.

That’s why we NEED you to take advantage of your EXCLUSIVE access to this valuable information. (https://secure.winred.com/1776-project-pac/2023-quote-video-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230206_e000320-ss_2023-quote-video-av_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

Your access expires at midnight tonight, so PLEASE make sure to watch the video before it’s too late!

Sincerely,

Ryan Girdusky,

Founder, 1776 Project PAC

name: Giffords
subject: ICYMI: The New York Times wrote a feature on Gabby and our organization
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/33338?refcode=em230206-1-15&t=1&akid=4224%2E3935704%2EzABOD_)
Friends -
The New York Times just released an article featuring Gabby, her road to recovery, and our organization.
We hope that if you haven’t seen it yet, you’ll take the time to [**give it a read.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/33338?refcode=em230206-1-15&t=2&akid=4224%2E3935704%2EzABOD_)
In the article, Gabby said that much like her own recovery, the progress to prevent gun violence happens “inch by inch.” Recently, we’ve seen some great triumphs for our movement. Last summer, Congress passed the most significant gun safety legislation in nearly three decades, and President Biden signed it into law. This year, we’ve seen members of Congress who have had the courage to act by introducing the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2023.
But we need far more solutions to solve our nation’s complex gun violence crisis. In the first short weeks of 2023, we’ve already seen dozens of mass shootings. And instead of working to prevent these tragedies, extreme Republicans in the Florida legislature just introduced permitless carry legislation, which would allow almost anyone to carry a gun in public without a background check or training.
Gun violence continues to be an epidemic in our nation. But together, we can follow Gabby’s lead and chip away inch by inch towards a better future. That’s why we hope we can count on you to stand with us today.
Because the only way we can cut through the noise is through our collective hope and vision for a better future—a future where our communities are safe from gun violence.
[**If you’re able, please make a contribution to Giffords today to help us fuel our work towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230206-1-15&t=3&akid=4224%2E3935704%2EzABOD_)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230206-1-15&t=4&akid=4224%2E3935704%2EzABOD_)**
Thank you,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=4224%2E3935704%2EzABOD_) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Indiana Republican Party HQ
subject: We can already tell you what he’s going to say
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
On Tuesday, we’ll hear more of the same from Joe Biden. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/a606cace73f48a2c/ddf6eb5c2ec6759ec3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican, President Biden has shown over and over again that he’s out of touch, living in another reality. Just last week he tweeted a picture of him in a GMC Hummer electric vehicle that ranges in cost from **$87,000 to $110,000** attempting to promote a **$7,500** tax credit for those who purchase certain types of vehicles — a credit the Hummer doesn’t qualify for because it’s too expensive. Americans just want to be able to afford gas! That same week he repeatedly stated that the country was on the right track at the same time NBC released a poll stating 71% of Americans say the county is headed in the wrong direction. NBC even noted, **“We have never before seen this level of sustained pessimism in the 30-year history of the poll.”** Despite that, President Biden will say “we’re on the right path ... my plan is working ... Republicans will only make it worse.” He’ll double-down on everything he’s done. But, with your help, we can use our new Republican majority in the U.S. House to**BLOCK his destructive agenda backed by Democrat majority in the U.S. Senate**. It’s going to take every conservative Hoosier working side-by-side to get the job done. And we’re asking you to do your part by chipping in a generous donation to make sure we have the funds to **fight and win** the battle ahead.

body:
Join the fight to stop the liberal agenda

| [ ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=3f4255bc43ac4da68caa7b7abdebee91&_e=XHx7fEkz3sqXi-O2pX_zQs7LUufgB4u0X6VYaCT_QQ51BuktoWXETptvW3l66HU6FRYP0wit12QaKanJMh1ccw25usaS8Z6DsFs0jPoPoPfuRl654DPLp0i3pI7wqYHTXQ94h2qkTIBQCCSKOhGXyCenYA-zwsdoaP700pHfIhz40iEiLcQxLSN_sfKRoWTHwpPXEK7j6_SM438plYBBL6YbNfAX_IEbMEx2EFmsov2yePHUbqE1ibvWWAGtvaO4Hg0_7eoY9T2tuFjsBSCM68OqQSU96ulPYO3lkyaYhoJbdCRjl-VAGmGr1C5iqqbJ04BJwYCQfmymmbh6k-woL1ApuyiUfNO9Z1LnVSYBEykSuItUS7HlN53Yqg13MGtUPlzH8rDVZ26-gELvpaMEwkfhP3b1ADeCDbRUpEAO1lymLMa1kkWsftvzF4yDnhkigraFPxpo80i_cVEYRtSkyfWVg2abAJ7c7bxVPy0KbX7Mrse3hFCYMVbBIx3IOEbblzlfSEsuQJ7_svdDJZAykNc62SeoRj3T2F5ytOhh4Do%3D)

clean_body: Join the fight to stop the liberal agenda | Dear friend, As you know, President Biden is set to deliver his second State of the Union address tomorrow, and we are all anticipating how he can embarrass our country any further during his speech. | As a Republican running for Senate, I am deeply concerned about our country's direction under Biden's disastrous leadership. The Biden administration has been an embarrassment to our nation. From the border crisis to the tanking economy, Biden has failed to deliver on his promises. He has instead chosen to pursue a divisive, radical agenda that is out of touch with the American people. It is time for a change. We need a leader who will put the American people first, stand up for our values, and stop Biden's disastrous policies. I can be the leader America needs. I will always fight for the American people and restore our nation's greatness. Together, we can make a difference and restore our country as a beacon of hope and freedom. Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Biden: Call the IRA what it is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Here's what Biden needs to say tomorrow.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=2&akid=13275%2E53494%2Ei1q0i8) Friend, Two things are true: In the last year, President Biden made more climate progress than any other U.S. president in history—and there is still so much important work to get done before the end of his first term. The Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) will deliver for the American people with more good-paying jobs, stronger American clean energy manufacturing, lower costs, and less pollution—particularly in historically disadvantaged communities. But too many voters are still unaware of the IRA and everything it will accomplish. **This State of the Union is Biden's chance to call the Inflation Reduction Act what it is: a popular, transformative, job-creating, cost-lowering, world-historic victory in the fight against climate change.** He can't stop there. The IRA was just the beginning. It's now incumbent upon Biden to chart a clear course forward to finish the job and fulfill his climate commitments. **Biden must also use the State of the Union to make the case for effective, equitable IRA implementation and ambitious executive climate action to keep his climate and environmental justice goals within reach.** [_**We'll be watching Biden's State of the Union and live-tweeting our reactions. Join us tomorrow, Tuesday February 7th, at 9 p.m. ET / 6 p.m. PT for the climate perspective on the speech! (You don't need a Twitter account to follow along.)**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=3&akid=13275%2E53494%2Ei1q0i8) | [Join Us @EvergreenAction](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=4&akid=13275%2E53494%2Ei1q0i8)
---
Onward,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Democrats are getting better and better at responding to GOP lies and messaging about Republican lies and Democratic successes. Watch Rep. Eric Swalwell here. An absolute masterclass!!
body:

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6dfee4c-c002-4190-997e-c40e1f558610/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Amp Action "BlueLetter" (Newsletter) Is Here!_** * **SICK REPUBLICANS [wear "assault weapon lapel pins," because they're sadistic.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73fb9f5b-0ad4-4b5f-a880-62795427305e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** And for other reasons, [which we explain here. PLEASE WATCH](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6a2e42c-9d85-4295-afad-668a1562df3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1BzhTGcgR_k&t=5s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a0fdff3-51a2-402a-b395-708f8983e194/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * [Why It's SO DAMN OBVIOUS Trump's a Russian Pawn](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf436ae3-1ccd-4ade-a955-7658df36a935/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/lH14y9C3oDw](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e0e7937-468c-4cb1-9029-41919c704fc1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **Republicans are TRYING TO DESTROY OUR ECONOMY **[**by taking us over the debt ceiling--ie not paying Trump's bills.** Please watch more here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b9188f6-ae77-4053-8304-972fd352f313/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FlGTLGBYZuo](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94df629a-2dc5-40d5-b1f5-53971a8b69b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ******************* **Have [you visited our sponsor Dissent Pins yet?? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce323edc-23ff-4123-80ec-ce4524d567ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)Need a ["Mazel Tough" t-shirt? A "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie" sticker or something from their Pride Collection?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ab85ab0-261c-41f0-820f-d730073abcf4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** **It's all [here at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde097274-cc90-4389-bb6a-79099830e7ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ******************* * **Democrats are getting better and better at **[**responding to GOP lies and messaging about Republican lies and Democratic successes**. Watch Rep. Eric Swalwell here. An absolute masterclass](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9007cfd-c7fc-43dc-824f-03e53ca5e83b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpr3mNMkbqfd2E4vTIRVMIg](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e33d598-1979-48d8-bb59-d1407f67ae89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * Don't forget to watch the State of the Union tomorrow! Joe Biden has had one of the most impactful presidencies of the past 100 years. You'll wanna see him tell us about it, and watch Republicans whine and whimper. ******************* Thank you my friends! Cliff ******************* **PS[: Go shop for gifts or yourself at our new sponsor, Dissent Pins! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4df10225-b144-458c-8f3b-245ed5a277d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)They give half their profits to great causes, which comes out to nearly $1 million since they began!** Also: [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0065f42a-979e-4d89-bbbd-ba6eedc90165/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! [Follow ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta59d14f5-3ff7-464e-a382-91ee530809f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[@cliffschecter](?) on Twitter [Follow @cliffschecter on Post](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdedb6421-755b-46c4-832c-252bc8780222/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks again!

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19f16be8-e33c-4e94-b732-ef7aea9fc966/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58367366/390839972/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M5Y2RiOTktNWRhNi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y_ITx-3LxduatS8lRz1H8D8vWODJuPF6kzCHhn9vXCY=)

Peter, Not only was Elissa Slotkin’s election for Michigan’s Seventh Congressional District super close, it was the ***MOST*** expensive race in the country. Outside groups were pouring millions of dollars into her district in an effort to flip her seat, but she had an advantage: _early money. _ The cost of television ads skyrocketed as they got closer to Election Day, but luckily Elissa had started fundraising early, so she was able to buy her airtime much sooner than her opponent, before the price went up. That meant she had more money to do things like canvassing, voter registration drives, and digital ads. But that was only possible because folks chipped in months and years before Election Day, and her team was able to craft an effective, long term strategy because of it. [_**That’s why we say a $10 contribution now is more powerful than $10 in October 2024. Please, if you’re able, chip in $10 today to help us protect Elissa Slotkin and our other frontline candidates in competitive and expensive races around the country.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58367368/390839974/-1909562274?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M5Y2RiOTktNWRhNi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y_ITx-3LxduatS8lRz1H8D8vWODJuPF6kzCHhn9vXCY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58367370/390839976/-1909562274?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M5Y2RiOTktNWRhNi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y_ITx-3LxduatS8lRz1H8D8vWODJuPF6kzCHhn9vXCY=)

clean_body: | = Peter, Not only was Elissa Slotkin’s election for Michigan’s Seventh Congressional District super close, it was the *MOST expensive race in the country. Outside groups were pouring millions of dollars into her district in an effort to flip her seat, but she had an advantage: early money. The cost of television ads skyrocketed as they got closer to Election Day, but luckily Elissa had started fundraising early, so she was able to buy her airtime much sooner than her opponent, before the price went up. That meant she had more money to do things like canvassing, voter registration drives, and digital ads. But that was only possible because folks chipped in months and years before Election Day, and her team was able to craft an effective, long term strategy because of it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In December, we launched our 2024 Candidate Recruitment and have been
accepting nominations from across the country. Last cycle, we recruited
Summer Lee to run and stood by her campaign from launch to victory.

Our next slate will challenge the political establishment. But we have a
lot of decisions to make about our work for 2024. That’s where you come
in.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/survey/jdem-20230202/?source=em20230206-27420&t=1001&akid=27420%2E1203867%2EACMcvX ]Can you help us think through our strategy,
Peter? Take this survey on what
you’d like Justice Democrats to focus on for next year’s primaries!

recruit?

[3]( ) Activists
[4]( ) Teachers
[5]( ) Nurses
[6]( ) As long as they don't take corporate PAC money, I'm good!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/survey/jdem-20230202/?source=em20230206-27420&t=1003&akid=27420%2E1203867%2EACMcvX ]Take the Survey

We have some big decisions ahead of us to ensure we’re strategic in our
mission to transform the Democratic Party and elect more Justice Democrat
recruits like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and
Summer Lee.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/survey/jdem-20230202/?source=em20230206-27420&t=1004&akid=27420%2E1203867%2EACMcvX ]Can you give your input today so we know what our movement base is
thinking? It will really help us chart our path towards 2024 and will only
take a few minutes!

Thank you so much for your input,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: What kind of intelligence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| After Donald Trump threatened Adam for holding him accountable, his loyal acolyte Kevin McCarthy executed on his threat to kick Adam off the House Intelligence Committee.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1760%2E5257348%2EU3RZXY)
Derek —
After Donald Trump threatened Adam for holding him accountable, his loyal acolyte Kevin McCarthy executed on his threat to kick Adam off the House Intelligence Committee.
After just one month in power, Kevin McCarthy hasn’t wasted a day putting partisanship over the American people. **It begs the question: what kind of Intelligence does Kevin McCarthy need to do the hard work and actually deliver results for the American people?**
What kind of Intelligence does Kevin McCarthy need to do something about gun violence?
What kind of Intelligence does he need to do something about the climate disaster?
What kind of Intelligence does he need to realize that America’s middle class made this country, and Republicans policies have decimated it?
What kind of Intelligence does he need to stand up to rampant voter suppression?
What kind of Intelligence does he need to enshrine reproductive freedom as a fundamental right?
What kind of Intelligence does he need to recognize January 6th was an attack on democracy itself?
What kind of Intelligence does Kevin McCarthy need to take action on the real issues — instead of carrying dirty water for the former president?
What kind of Intelligence does he need to stand up to George Santos for lying about virtually every “fact” that’s ever come out of his mouth?
What kind of Intelligence does he need to stand up to MAGA extremists in his own party who are spreading lies and conspiracy theories — like Lauren Boebert and Matt Gaetz?
It turns out, a whole lot. And he’s got absolutely none of it.
**If Kevin McCarthy thinks kicking Adam from the Intelligence Committee is going to stop us from holding him and his allies accountable, he’s sorely mistaken. It’s our time to prove it.**
**[Please make a donation of $3 or more to help Adam fend off MAGA Republicans and become the next U.S. Senator from California:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=feb2023_abs_em.nEPr_T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20230206_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1760%2E5257348%2EU3RZXY)**

name: Replace Sinema
subject: NEWS: Sinema’s finances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter,
Sinema's new campaign finance report has been posted–and she’s raking in the cash. This quarter alone she raised $311,000 from private equity. Of course, they owed her big time after she saved the carried interest loophole – an $18 BILLION annual gift to private equity and Wall Street. Here’s a quick breakdown of where Sinema’s latest campaign cash came from: 🚩39% of her total haul is from private equity 🚩15% from corporate PACs 🚩 5% is from Arizonans 🚩 1% is from small donors _For those who need a primer on what private equity is:_ the private equity industry is one of the most harmful destroyers of American jobs and the economy. They don’t care about long-term outcomes, they’re only interested in how much profit they can immediately wring out of a business — so when private equity takes control of a company, that often leads to layoffs and dismantling of businesses for parts, so that a very few investors at the top can make a short-term profit. Arizona needs a Senator who cares about the businesses that create jobs and that are invested in our communities — not about the faraway investors who squeeze every bit of profit they can out of Arizona employees and then take the money home to New York. **[Chip in now to help us hold Sinema accountable for her private equity and Wall Street ties >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcsQw4SGM7PlUcItAQCDnaQ1CqrQx9OFjwZa4CGlj6UM0lXujML_PSpgaqB5GFXOp6zxZHAA6s5KPzT-8p_mfU7j3aMEdH4tk1f-feUw-ydKbUBbwylqoqTTpbUNcO7a-Ki03fvKeb6dQ4kzrGoSw8Vy0fttv0p2fejM5BDZ5ZmdeTe9F0vopMHqdtYeovkbPv5_zB5g60C_Ndeb53Ok4Lm1IyAh8z-CRZfiREuSkUtU87E354oMw43qfmRiBbFdBWYP50Yeh0sPi0K5MxyIXdVQ_lR-yL7Ye5dLJihqoeLVaQMe58vJ8SsIKhTlE8779P/3th/x1WVVESRRX-gmtYFMjLgmA/h0/PspogioX825w-E4uYuDYNC6g8fuBbfSXDat6mtVsUkI)** Remember, Kyrsten Sinema has gone to bat for private equity – AKA job killers – time and again. Most prominently when she interfered at the last minute in the Inflation Reduction Act to save the “carried interest loophole.” This loophole is widely unpopular – no one likes it. No one except private equity, which benefits to the tune of $18 billion per year. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcsQw4SGM7PlUcItAQCDnaQwH4XogwXbcptYDVR9hZ_IzJoLkd8OGVmu6mCqqDeSAecA9r8cTK1xuDIGh3byWJENKncH6r2hf6-YIGRbfKd5iX0znv_WN_jsr75DPesGhSubDTg0LAPA4_f8K3C0al-8bHJ4ogcCJ8gTIwx01L5K4wW40-EqC3gXXmkqW65dGTjpngSbzahAUprTU3_suJNDurK8OAnb064fp8_6Ey7k1jlKw-xwoEFMUenS_wxooDz2xTtuhH8TSOZ9qGYhbFxL7pt5bICl6L-3b0DDV-M0bh_jeBdvpLB3NOn7PF2Ar2/3th/x1WVVESRRX-gmtYFMjLgmA/h1/fJsvUESRpRDWHZsXvJtiMRNKWP7HPeD5fuYLwwcQpOI) Sinema likes to claim she’s an Independent now – but the only people she’s independent from are her constituents. She’s certainly not independent from Wall Street, Big Pharma, corporate PACs, or the other special interests writing her checks. It’s no wonder that Kyrsten Sinema is one of the most unpopular figures in Arizona – and in America – right now. That’s why the polls show Sinema can no longer win this Senate race. But she can still hurt the Democrat and throw the election to a Republican like Kari Lake. clean_body: | | Peter, Sinema's new campaign finance report has been posted–and she’s raking in the cash. This quarter alone she raised $311,000 from private equity. Of course, they owed her big time after she saved the carried interest loophole – an $18 BILLION annual gift to private equity and Wall Street. Here’s a quick breakdown of where Sinema’s latest campaign cash came from: 🚩39% of her total haul is from private equity 🚩15% from corporate PACs 🚩 5% is from Arizonans 🚩 1% is from small donors For those who need a primer on what private equity is: the private equity industry is one of the most harmful destroyers of American jobs and the economy. They don’t care about long-term outcomes, they’re only interested in how much profit they can immediately wring out of a business — so when private equity takes control of a company, that often leads to layoffs and dismantling of businesses for parts, so that a very few investors at the top can make a short-term profit. Arizona needs a Senator who cares about the businesses that create jobs and that are invested in our communities — not about the faraway investors who squeeze every bit of profit they can out of Arizona employees and then take the money home to New York. Remember, Kyrsten Sinema has gone to bat for private equity – AKA job killers – time and again. Most prominently when she interfered at the last minute in the Inflation Reduction Act to save the “carried interest loophole.” This loophole is widely unpopular – no one likes it. No one except private equity, which benefits to the tune of $18 billion per year. Sinema likes to claim she’s an Independent now – but the only people she’s independent from are her constituents. She’s certainly not independent from Wall Street, Big Pharma, corporate PACs, or the other special interests writing her checks. It’s no wonder that Kyrsten Sinema is one of the most unpopular figures in Arizona – and in America – right now. That’s why the polls show Sinema can no longer win this Senate race. But she can still hurt the Democrat and throw the election to a Republican like Kari Lake. We can't let that happen. name: Yolanda Bejarano, AZ Dems
subject: Hello, I’m the new chair of AZ Dems!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Winning in 2024 starts right now. | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sRc1RxOHj1CRpGI7iQyKm6prOt9TUCKc1VA3s6d0L5onnqyIxGg7vLl86RJklCYAVZOK4umJVXFXECdHlm3eIM82R63fPYJG3HfzbjOvQE_SKvpGQhxJh5O-JdFdqkEipfbUmUOToIuMYE5xL_7iStx0MrTLb7DCMdy1AXNOfclTPa2935kgl1wOcTXOXe936JPNkrSnvUndS7-t7Ii0SevTWCaW7miiv0cC7x51DXJIKEgRvCsjnmdu1k6x4YacUrVLGDfta8q0fqPqVmFSL99QCJtNShrM-lH_LwSh3jJ_to9t-7Cq3boArlP3XldwqGo2Bl9tEl9SXdCPefg140RmVmC63Lp4_XYUKtWmgNtt/3th/7ev6w9IoS-aAGTgX3nLPXQ/h0/nX6_EOubUckvaAvSMcebmH5XK7xdjAFcgSFhx3pxnZc)

---
| Team,

My name is Yolanda, and I was recently elected as the new chair of the Arizona Democratic Party.

You may not know who I am, so let me introduce myself quickly. I’m currently the field director for the Communications Workers of America, where I recruit and train union members to build more power. As the daughter of immigrants, I ran on continuing to invest in and empowering people of color, young Arizonans, and rural communities to continue to strengthen the AZ Dems and continue to win elections.

I’ve spent my career organizing in every community, fighting for Arizona families, and successfully supporting Democratic candidates across the state. That’s why I ran for this job, and that’s why fellow Arizona Democrats entrusted me with this job.

In 2022, we saw historic wins due to early investments and Democrats working together to make sure Arizonans knew what we stood for and got out to vote. **But we also know there’s more to do** — in 2024, we have to flip the State House and State Senate and elect more Democrats to Congress, in addition to securing our U.S. Senate seat and Arizona’s 11 presidential electoral votes.

**2024 is a big year. With the right resources, it can be the year everyone sees Arizona goes completely blue.**

**[Team, I may be new to this position, but I’m not new to fighting for Arizona, and trying to flip it blue. Will you join me in the fight by making a donation today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sRc1RxOHj1CRpGI7iQyKm6prOt9TUCKc1VA3s6d0L5onpxjQIxlRLWyf22gaRYrBWF1xGkl7A-6wCPwr-KQL7sDG7Po_wXnVhVIBkoqDAgCdpPHzelNh7jAIb0fz_GqnSp189VchDB_9T5pEdbB2YXlEyOcqsdOA87SIUvXhcatSwGCOw5PmGOeDQrbceTTcki66zlYfaQwHyA6kzmuXJtN3wvrdPxYrk44aE7p0k7QaUFDo4x41crU3x2NdM3FjINCcPdCKDilmEswma0-E9E4oinjHk-3FSDi5R7B9QFIIkCyHqVvbqEmBTDlES43xOFCW6pi5A1u8L-AtEeismWg/3th/7ev6w9IoS-aAGTgX3nLPXQ/h1/T910DZG-Vbl0HuEUs1UaPZbdsi9ruOna6tCmOosrT7E)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QZ8qye5TB3xowGYXwLTwGP_MQp50JGfT5s8uROXzb_DQIvoWIkkMp99avXg57mJMQ1fn_AQ8acUIIsNIg_EJA_n3mzxLHJqXaUqop1iFowArXz156PAuLqQTAcdzmsWPCNHRzTr1so00G8GENSlgCtsszGHonx-rC4Azs42dPWIu9i0EhfcLlhZUyK-6yDrLjmqyNePsoYc4vImtH4dwcECH7Mv0-ZaExmba5R2A6AoGjdiauv01VswJ36ugKYcmPoctZnp5zWxmwIViOHPd1uXhd6bTfjD_PH6NSnIevKy1PPbh-j6KBnCDsQt9udxWvmNj2r7HUENfC4gORI0Yz4oVT_j_3UOxilQL8kpBmWQ96EtlE4vOzP4JQdq8mANskTf3xaiDPetuBFBh596mp9g/3th/7ev6w9IoS-aAGTgX3nLPXQ/h2/y9vQ5j3pUJOAJach7v7x849qaBLZgNJ8nFlDaU8b5sU)

clean_body: | | | Winning in 2024 starts right now. | | | Team, My name is Yolanda, and I was recently elected as the new chair of the Arizona Democratic Party. You may not know who I am, so let me introduce myself quickly. I’m currently the field director for the Communications Workers of America, where I recruit and train union members to build more power. As the daughter of immigrants, I ran on continuing to invest in and empowering people of color, young Arizonans, and rural communities to continue to strengthen the AZ Dems and continue to win elections. I’ve spent my career organizing in every community, fighting for Arizona families, and successfully supporting Democratic candidates across the state. That’s why I ran for this job, and that’s why fellow Arizona Democrats entrusted me with this job. In 2022, we saw historic wins due to early investments and Democrats working together to make sure Arizonans knew what we stood for and got out to vote. But we also know there’s more to do — in 2024, we have to flip the State House and State Senate and elect more Democrats to Congress, in addition to securing our U.S. Senate seat and Arizona’s 11 presidential electoral votes. 2024 is a big year. With the right resources, it can be the year everyone sees Arizona goes completely blue. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let’s turn Arizona completely blue, Yolanda Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fbc76c86bea48fd9fdadfbe7b12eeea&_e=XMItPcGZBi3ubg-O6DK72-1_L6ppZnJzPVOgxAsBJUjam3RbKxzkrJZn6uM1VxZycWBrI7_5rdVWR4UUxz8CC9uD-0H25SjAvVEbk86Dw6yUHuSyk4wxxsoZbGUOyVX_2o2LaRG9GGABvo3G0sivY100f_wwGOT4q1lchfJko_WqUC9mPHVe_L3WwoQgwjS0QQuuNbv57FOqQVqnvzWVmuyTdMzfMe4OGXgD79C-Jbq_GSISO-CnDvnxaMQBHFTppl5cI8kYotCAEsq6HP7EyJt6g_ASwIPHA4OOjjiGhKSLGoiiAjEYe1FjVqGNlnhPj87O2aUeMJ2jlFyILV-9bg%3D%3D)

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fbc76c86bea48fd9fdadfbe7b12eeea&_e=XMItPcGZBi3ubg-O6DK72-1_L6ppZnJzPVOgxAsBJUjam3RbKxzkrJZn6uM1VxZycWBrI7_5rdVWR4UUxz8CC9uD-0H25SjAvVEbk86Dw6yUHuSyk4wxxsoZbGUOyVX_2o2LaRG9GGABvo3G0sivY100f_wwGOT4q1lchfJko_WqUC9mPHVe_L3WwoQgwjS06LsKE8OP8ZelNkovcD7nRN5hO0KmCTJegrEp4p2s80IxvVCYf50FJcrRTK8iOBbx3Sf7gPYm10NKXkg94RCwPi_9AC3ErpLJe0AdvmXnBYHIV1ZeaSNcALpHw2epOKkgrRJzcwZZjzykZ8sVQzyw4w%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fbc76c86bea48fd9fdadfbe7b12eeea&_e=XMItPcGZBi3ubg-O6DK72-1_L6ppZnJzPVOgxAsBJUjam3RbKxzkrJZn6uM1VxZycWBrI7_5rdVWR4UUxz8CC9uD-0H25SjAvVEbk86Dw6yUHuSyk4wxxsoZbGUOyVX_2o2LaRG9GGABvo3G0sivY100f_wwGOT4q1lchfJko_WqUC9mPHVe_L3WwoQgwjS0jb5mdhlwltVKZUlxhgdN0VU9Hxd_KWy-OkMpzsHNBu5lQbBNOXfHRleJIbWIrm7sP_2rJqof-YeFVYs-BcZWwX1aFasFf7OiQxDC0kuwBAr-JRIBP3eFxd0P9VXNvwvaSbv2mW17fih_GxFGSi1Tag%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fbc76c86bea48fd9fdadfbe7b12eeea&_e=XMItPcGZBi3ubg-O6DK72-1_L6ppZnJzPVOgxAsBJUjam3RbKxzkrJZn6uM1VxZycWBrI7_5rdVWR4UUxz8CC9uD-0H25SjAvVEbk86Dw6yUHuSyk4wxxsoZbGUOyVX_2o2LaRG9GGABvo3G0sivY100f_wwGOT4q1lchfJko_WqUC9mPHVe_L3WwoQgwjS0VhbErjXJjHNWrOcAIii9Nh11azlgcxer36YQXHUSrIo7BuVfT2EE1JvwA-OMcTWVduLlcSP8L0CcZZicgLVC_uU9SkPJyLOOatikz0XttdnVJN4BorBBoxWV9N25FMLkHCNYXdOGoAoKo8zLU5jzQg%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fbc76c86bea48fd9fdadfbe7b12eeea&_e=XMItPcGZBi3ubg-O6DK72-1_L6ppZnJzPVOgxAsBJUjam3RbKxzkrJZn6uM1VxZycWBrI7_5rdVWR4UUxz8CC9uD-0H25SjAvVEbk86Dw6yUHuSyk4wxxsoZbGUOyVX_2o2LaRG9GGABvo3G0sivY100f_wwGOT4q1lchfJko_WqUC9mPHVe_L3WwoQgwjS0QzMfGmU9ia_MuNKgKRjdMIG7iWTEd_zM6ueniVPEmby8dEsGNCIC--vEqzoVd2yjmcWBhkA7lC8MVb4UCHMCwYMsFvjbxMjjv-lMeMtPqkF7LzKq7Xh8P4g3NwkNRcQdJJwiHr_0vdAQKQSesKaDVQ%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fbc76c86bea48fd9fdadfbe7b12eeea&_e=XMItPcGZBi3ubg-O6DK72-1_L6ppZnJzPVOgxAsBJUjam3RbKxzkrJZn6uM1VxZycWBrI7_5rdVWR4UUxz8CC9uD-0H25SjAvVEbk86Dw6yUHuSyk4wxxsoZbGUOyVX_2o2LaRG9GGABvo3G0sivY100f_wwGOT4q1lchfJko_WqUC9mPHVe_L3WwoQgwjS0xraW4-Fw2Qb8GQJsxx9bC8eYzEtmVNif3pP92OKn833iQ9zd4Ggi1Mb7pqPEmAC0PinUFEI4Z95ad9mY1GqeaFUOvVwlSB3V6Iq4CAtItMCdPGoGWKQjYi67cRDfqx-FWxcBazgKB0EzA-e0ohRLtg%3D%3D)

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m not like other politicians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58368217/390842992/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mjk1OGMzOC02MWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_yzc32-9X83W7YE8hkl7alQ7Zvr9k2dQENZcLpyYHRo=&emci=90263b70-84a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=82958c38-61a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Can I explain something, Peter?

I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.

In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**

Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble and seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.

I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef and pork. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.

The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.

And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with big donors and wealthy super PACs in the hopes of a campaign check, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.

[**_That’s why I’m personally asking you to join our team and split $15 between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign today to help us defend and expand our hard-won Senate majority. Anything you can give makes a difference._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58368218/390842993/-1883314608?refcode=20230206.2_JT_2O&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mjk1OGMzOC02MWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_yzc32-9X83W7YE8hkl7alQ7Zvr9k2dQENZcLpyYHRo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Matthew Diemer
subject: Happy Febuary!
body:
| |
---
Peter, Happy Black History Month Diem Team, **** Since we spoke last many events have transpired in Congress. The three most notable were the fight for house speaker, the subsequent removal of Democrats from committees, and the Strategic Protections Act where Rep. Miller voted against protecting our Great Lakes. **** What we saw during the battle for House Speaker was a GOP divided and Democrats united. Concessions were made that weakened the speakership, allowing the opportunity for this divided GOP to wreak havoc on the American people for political gain. Between the in-fighting of the GOP and the very slim margin of majority control in the house, I worry that basic obligations of the government will not be met and it will affect our position globally and possibly the day to day lives of Americans. **** Let’s hope that our Congress decides to work for the American people, not personal/political gain. **** As Ohio Governor Mike DeWine [declared natural gas green energy](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EMO6RjejOOm4tZLIWyZPvViM9F8gRJvkZf5HtOZV797GRCDY46YBC0vzgz4-e-UEFXmb9aWjkP6SwukBSFabaLYa0KpuLra4dNcM_8bKgvxy3zKzlUx3lGc5bWK8AYPRH3qoRsPhe29gPiWkqGLJ9Rw7jNFX6rZnD7rhLNv2WTaUiOZdBDr8g4Cp711H7wFSHxdFkQd34cNn5xtrMJ6P8RYH1fT9agz1jK3IjPSZrHdcqKyZbxM3ozwWox2BOiXcYwoFSpXCwxJHPlCeNyf_rYi/3th/XvxSgYKGQMyebsrk-_Dd4A/h0/Dqz1GzKykNJfCDop9RK0dX0O9cOII9gQstkhHPffxHo), the Strategic Protections Act passed the house. This bill would allow oil and gas drilling in our Great Lakes. Imagine seeing oil rigs off the shore of Edgewater Park. Max Miller voted to make this a reality. **** We also were witness to blatant political revenge. The McCarthy led GOP removed Democrats from committees. One of such removals was led by my former opponent. I found a new twitter page that is dedicated to keeping an eye on Max Miller in congress. [Link to the account is right here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhk11TIwAVifvrMJdSC7ht15jSiojMoASZr1cMR0z5bVyXKX8e3PuM3yii6AZYQtAvE18mpK6sJKDr6RUzg3C_NeDbgdxxmyiZFaJJuSsdY-_T1qp7Jp8GxXtEPk27-XubrxbLnulw-4eKyYmAJWlVej1i0GAf8znUBs24m7q1_TsQYTG5TagOl_EpDpL9XlnbMutlfRmVuj3TZNr_4co5ME/3th/XvxSgYKGQMyebsrk-_Dd4A/h1/i3EOj6ijrSn66qZWTKIJVLSGe77cLKaRc1sc3SXm3yM) I hope that whoever made this twitter keeps it up. It is a very useful and important resource. Follow it to show support to the creator, to keep up to date, and hold him accountable.
---
|
---
Finally, I want to update you on some key members of the Diem Team. First, Thomas Dufour (former Political Director) has declared his intention to run for Brook Park city council! **** Tom will bring experience, innovative ideas, and will put policy over politics to get things done for the residents of Brook Park! He has my full endorsement and support! **** [Please chip in here to help Tom Win!!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wwM9MFR59LeGYJn906rVOYGbuCJjdyBg35N2WdFZ86oq8Sh2Vv9ElKgpp7-pVd7y1bh1xkFItmGyXHzgQyqX9aB7JaqMxkDZzfO9YnYsksTHmUtUBRDaRsMt_e7eZu6343EYlPnOlWK42cTe3lCbt82blXcRZNG-DARvy-mC84iydyM2PmN6f73WGQWySo_PGbSQwuVCrxmTK-moVYbjCQfe11lXcf3QBiSE7s0f3TgFML9A3vES6DfdMgkyMNgjo/3th/XvxSgYKGQMyebsrk-_Dd4A/h2/ovBsUFtyW55UO74zqhwKLtAETb9_h8mzcwQ2S7k__QE) **** Nicole (former Operations Director) is back at home in Debary, FL where she was just elected President of the Volusia County Young Democrats. She is finishing up her PhD in International Business and is expected to graduate in May. She also has recently received a foster corgi named Teddie. **** I am very proud of you both. **** Be well everyone wherever you are. And don’t give up the fight in 2023 & 2024\.
---
Please write back and let me know how you are doing and what issues are on your radar. I would love to hear from all of you. See you next month! Matthew Diemer
---
|
---
Diemer for Congress P.O. name: Team Baldwin
subject: “Fan the flame”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter — We all know how the 2020 election ended: President Joe Biden won, and Donald Trump threw a tantrum, spreading his Big Lie that the election was somehow stolen from him. But truth be told, we didn’t realize how just how involved Trump’s team was in this dangerous scheme: **A recent audio recording revealed that the head of Trump’s campaign in Wisconsin knew full well he had _lost_ this state but _still_ directed staff to continue to “fan the flame” of Trump’s Big Lie and spread disinformation about Democrats trying to steal the election. ** He told the campaign staff to do “whatever they needed” to promote these lies — _and they did._ After the election, dozens of lawsuits were filed in Wisconsin and other close-margin states, attempting to pressure election officials to overturn the will of the voters and keep Trump in office. And it gets worse: In this audio recording, Trump’s team also mocked the Democratic efforts to engage Black voters. These are the same people who _bragged_ about creating voter suppression tactics specifically targeting Black and Hispanic voters, leading to 37,000 fewer votes cast in Milwaukee in the 2022 election. Trump and his allies are downright dangerous. And they’ve made it clear that they’ll do whatever it takes to win — including attacking our democracy and spreading lies to suppress the voices of the people of Wisconsin. **Peter, with Trump on the Republican ballot, we need to be prepared for the lies and schemes his team will promote in Wisconsin to take down Democrats. We’ll need to build on our strategy to protect and defend our right to vote in the next two years, which is why we’re asking: ** **Can we count on your donation today to help us fight back against Republican extremism? ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58369586/390847814/321909845?refcode2=test&amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230206_PM1_V3_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGYxNzMxMi02N2E2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_FExwrNTlQWNgADDfxsTOxKDJtsCQoYppUjxrp4yTA=)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: February is Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
And a reminder that we still have work to do. | Hi Peter, This month, we celebrate our state’s rich African American culture and honor the contributions of Black North Carolinians. We remember civil rights leaders, like the Greensboro Four, who helped launch the national sit-in movement, along with groundbreaking Black artists, educators, and health care professionals who have made monumental contributions to our nation. **We know that diversity is one of our greatest strengths in North Carolina, but as we celebrate this month, we know there’s more work to do to fight racism and ensure opportunities for everyone.** My administration has made it a priority to work to break down the barriers in our health care, education, economic, and criminal justice systems that communities of color continue to face. **Let’s keep working together toward solutions that make our state a more just and equitable place for everyone.** Thank you, Roy [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58369634/390848150/823540626?refcode=ea.1c41e6db-67a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1c41e6db-67a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzQxZTZkYi02N2E2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SdujeihcsGSc_4jiqEDz6jO_3z_pyAB5E1LEOo2qWY4=&emci=c82b1c09-3da6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=1c41e6db-67a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: And a reminder that we still have work to do. | Hi Peter, This month, we celebrate our state’s rich African American culture and honor the contributions of Black North Carolinians. We remember civil rights leaders, like the Greensboro Four, who helped launch the national sit-in movement, along with groundbreaking Black artists, educators, and health care professionals who have made monumental contributions to our nation. We know that diversity is one of our greatest strengths in North Carolina, but as we celebrate this month, we know there’s more work to do to fight racism and ensure opportunities for everyone. My administration has made it a priority to work to break down the barriers in our health care, education, economic, and criminal justice systems that communities of color continue to face. Let’s keep working together toward solutions that make our state a more just and equitable place for everyone. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Egofske Will Serve as Mayor-State Rep
body:
Mayor-State Rep. Egofske will be busy with three full-time jobs, enjoying the perks of being a mayor and a state legislator at the same time.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/8c644b9df9a3/alert-egofske-will-serve-as-mayor-state-rep?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Egofske Will Serve as Mayor-State Rep: Durkin, Who Voted for Weapons Ban Calls Him "Outstanding Public Servant" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/egofske-will-serve-as-mayor-state-rep-durkin-who-voted-for-weapons-ban-calls-him-outstanding-public-servant.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Sunday, Lemont Mayor John Egofske (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-local-republican-leaders-select-lemont-mayor-john-egofske-an-independent-who-endorsed-democrats-to-fill-jim-durkins-vacant-house-seat.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) was sworn in as the new Illinois State Representative for the 82nd District, replacing the vacancy left by former House Republican Minority leader Jim Durkin, who resigned his seat in early January after a string of embarrassing losses during the midterm election.

In a press release on Sunday, Durkin called his friend, whom he supported in a letter to the selection committee, an “
outstanding public servant (https://chicago.suntimes.com/2023/2/5/23587290/lemont-mayor-john-egofske-replace-republican-jim-durkin-in-state-house?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/egofske-will-serve-as-mayor-state-rep-durkin-who-voted-for-weapons-ban-calls-him-outstanding-public-servant.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Egofske, who is listed as an Independent (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/CandidateDetailCD.aspx?ID=CatYq1BiVlmqbl87lxy0%2fg%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on the Illinois State Board of Elections website, endorsed (https://www.politico.com/newsletters/illinois-playbook/2020/01/07/28-mayors-endorsing-lipinski-done-deal-to-replace-sandoval-bloomberg-rendezvous-488005?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Illinois Democrat US Rep. Daniel Lipinski in the 2020 Primary and Illinois Democratic State Rep. Larry Walsh, Jr. during the 2022 general election.

Members of the selection committee tasked with finding Durkin’s replacement have said privately that Egofske pulled a Democratic Primary ballot in 2020 to vote for Lipinski.

During that same time, grassroots conservative Republican
Mike Fricilone (https://ballotpedia.org/Mike_Fricilone?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) was on the 2020 Primary ballot running against two other Republican challengers – but Egofske chose to support the Democrat instead.

Supporters of Egofske point out that Lipinski was a conservative Democrat – an excuse to justify their Republican In Name Only (RINO) leanings.

During Lipinski’s re-election to Congress in 2018, Democrat House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi
endorsed (https://twitter.com/alweaver22/status/969248362519199744?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E969248362519199744%7Ctwgr%5E82724bc9fcd9392c74ea9221974b8cb805369c65%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.motherjones.com%2Fpolitics%2F2018%2F03%2Fnancy-pelosi-just-endorsed-a-congressman-who-opposes-abortion-and-gay-rights%2F&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his campaign, and in 2019, she was elected Speaker of the House of Representatives by Lipinski and his fellow Democratic colleagues.
https://twitter.com/alweaver22/status/969248362519199744?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

In the 2022 primary election, Egofske endorsed (https://twitter.com/KeithPekau/status/1488930405042556932?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Keith Pekau for Congress, saying,

“I am supporting Keith because of his hard work in growing quality businesses along with his fiscally responsible policies...”
https://twitter.com/KeithPekau/status/1488930405042556932?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Pekau would lose the general election to Democratic US Rep. Sean Casten by nearly 9 points (https://ballotpedia.org/Keith_Pekau?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . In 2020, Republican Jeanne Ives only lost to Casten by 7 points (https://ballotpedia.org/Jeanne_M._Ives?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

In announcing his selection as the new state representative, Egofske
said (https://chicago.suntimes.com/2023/2/5/23587290/lemont-mayor-john-egofske-replace-republican-jim-durkin-in-state-house?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“After 27 years in corporate business as a job creator, I look forward to working with anyone, from any party, who shares my goals to lower property taxes, address crime, and keep jobs in Illinois.”

And Egofske has already proven that he can work with anyone, from any party. He’ll also endorse anyone, from any party, too.

Egofske will continue to serve as mayor of Lemont and principal of K and J Builders while serving as state representative.

Many states
prohibit (https://www.ncsl.org/ethics/dual-office-holding-restrictions?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) elected officials from serving in two elected offices at the same time, including Alabama, Alaska, Arizona and Arkansas, for example.

But no surprise – in Illinois, you can serve in two elected positions at the same time, so long as you are not receiving compensation for both. Clearing the way for Egofske to serve as Lemont Mayor, where he doesn’t take a salary, and as a state representative – where he will.

In January, the Illinois House of Representatives passed a budget bill that included a
16 percent pay raise (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-house-passes-16-pay-raise-gop-lawmakers-should-donate-their-pay-raises-to-support-local-charities.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for lawmakers. The salary increase raises their base pay to $85,000 annually, an $11,655 increase.

But that’s not all.

If you are in a majority or minority leadership position, you’ll receive an additional pay increase on top of the 16 percent. Committee chairmen earn an additional $12,000; and the House Speaker, Senate President and minority leaders in both chambers will receive up to an additional $16,000 raise.

Illinois lawmakers remain some of the
highest paid (https://www.illinoispolicy.org/illinois-state-lawmakers-among-highest-paid-in-nation/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in the country.

And while lawmakers may spend more than 80 percent of their time doing legislative work, the position is considered
quasi full-time (https://www.ncsl.org/about-state-legislatures/full-and-part-time-legislatures?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , meaning many lawmakers have other jobs when they are not in session.

It’s clear Mayor-State Rep. Egofske will be busy with three full-time jobs, enjoying the perks of being a mayor and a state legislator at the same time.

And while Illinois residents and small business owners are still struggling to recover financially from the pandemic, their legislators are voting for pay raises. And although House Republicans voted against the measure, they still benefit from the raise – and they’ll see a bigger paycheck in 2023.
https://youtu.be/L296GJqkN_8?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Shannon Adcock, Founder of Awake IL, joined Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer to discuss the IL GOP's lost opportunity in selecting a replacement to former House minority leader Jim Durkin (Feb. 5, 2023).

In January, before he resigned from the legislature, Durkin was the only Republican to join the Democrats, voting (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=00000185-8628-de44-a7bf-ee3f47b80000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in favor of the assault weapons ban (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-il-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-votes-with-democrats-to-ban-assault-weapons.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

And in the last few months,
Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-durkin-use-citizens-to-change-illinois-pac-to-support-gop-spokesman-during-primary-against-conservative-candidate.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) has published several articles about Durkin using his political influence to target conservative grassroots candidates during the Illinois Primary.

Sources also confirmed to
Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/sources-il-gop-blames-jim-durkin-for-postage-discount-abuse-as-gop-faces-potential-postal-audit.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that the IL GOP is blaming Durkin for the party’s postage discount abuse, where mailers “Paid for by the Republican Party of Illinois” were sent during the primary to viciously attack conservative Republican grassroots candidates that were challenging Durkin’s friends and political allies.
https://youtu.be/gBqxtOg-UDQ?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3e675ca963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_06_08_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3e675ca963-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
On this day, February 6th, one year ago: Michael Reagan, son of President Ronald Reagan, joins Mark Vargas, host of Mark My Words, on his father's 111th birthday.

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96bb44cc0d8e47a18da619b31dde52b6&_e=Yp9GsswZrOjkJFs_TcpbuIFtjuh3IlAh0i9OBpHB7Adq9Gv4uAev5nQ3f0MVOln3W8GnVMY0RoQ-bYvisq6KRgqYisuY_XYrVbcUzN_QpZL9JDVGIBC1jGFUChNNH2TjBlwM-CsQ5aXTlKBfP714uhvEor7n89QDTohqW2dOoH0Oa3A87yfobE_2EFu_t-MmqQqJO-YKjViswOtZ3QnEYyVADF7gpXbebpGcyRo-9Y4hZXk74vi5T8QNptx95-_wp5uT9tKMG7IzPtusYbqKQXiuvGkki0bMPRgATyrTa1jvKXrbaHOmPP37I-mC-irm)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96bb44cc0d8e47a18da619b31dde52b6&_e=Yp9GsswZrOjkJFs_TcpbuIFtjuh3IlAh0i9OBpHB7Adq9Gv4uAev5nQ3f0MVOln3W8GnVMY0RoQ-bYvisq6KRgqYisuY_XYrVbcUzN_QpZL9JDVGIBC1jGFUChNNH2TjBlwM-CsQ5aXTlKBfP714uhHfVYEJAX6Gjs-KZRVuRY7JhY9YVnfiVdtN5zC8ByOwICq_HINUy0LnolI0J18JDUY86lAWW3aNvRXIj_AW6aapDc2qA4P9ALvLPif2pkNdLRrIkAgBFzj5zfI_22Uz6Es3hog8zKuMpTAg4ZFnvVhUQfn9SFQrBVWPLYBel4f2)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96bb44cc0d8e47a18da619b31dde52b6&_e=Yp9GsswZrOjkJFs_TcpbuIFtjuh3IlAh0i9OBpHB7Adq9Gv4uAev5nQ3f0MVOln3W8GnVMY0RoQ-bYvisq6KRgqYisuY_XYrVbcUzN_QpZL9JDVGIBC1jGFUChNNH2TjBlwM-CsQ5aXTlKBfP714usfMwq2P4iq2mYzpL-RvA-GqWP9A6H1kCeE20-ExLH3zhctvKHB475Ss3GgPWJUtxe7OkuRmK9eqqOvcCRI3Ii-AqAurUnbaE54pjlKcG9WgJCwPWf3YHM3US2iF7LO1heWqzhc0PSN_0IWICqIG-n55bOsEjaBah1RNpT6BvEid)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,
_with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96bb44cc0d8e47a18da619b31dde52b6&_e=Yp9GsswZrOjkJFs_TcpbuIFtjuh3IlAh0i9OBpHB7Adq9Gv4uAev5nQ3f0MVOln3W8GnVMY0RoQ-bYvisq6KRgqYisuY_XYrVbcUzN_QpZL9JDVGIBC1jGFUChNNH2TjBlwM-CsQ5aXTlKBfP714upjv6_ugTmw4CrCD93UV9L4EtOQ0DeG3TwGH-Uzfst3d952ZCZ8nx6hxA3fKyKL-wHei_8mUn4WHgGKHQyL4xgKeVzVSySYjsIddEoc8BXS9dFBUycxmzy0BhonJr1Xf-hnz85o_u8zGZ09NHUR2hAz8aGxa8fcsNHoZXGcW2fIz)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96bb44cc0d8e47a18da619b31dde52b6&_e=Yp9GsswZrOjkJFs_TcpbuIFtjuh3IlAh0i9OBpHB7Adq9Gv4uAev5nQ3f0MVOln3W8GnVMY0RoQ-bYvisq6KRgqYisuY_XYrVbcUzN_QpZL9JDVGIBC1jGFUChNNH2TjBlwM-CsQ5aXTlKBfP714ujgtzWXIexHAgG8M_R903XPQsRHDjxfKim9oUN4lVp4VoFwOgRaSRRULoSLN8I-aeJq7SLRzCRvtJwwekkkyowBXvhNeFUtbG_UT-lb8iSt_OqfRk0sR8xrJt5yRdQ-6HNhsEeVoaUhG9NezGRlRKSynqlN_7qAYfmniLxzzuIjB)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96bb44cc0d8e47a18da619b31dde52b6&_e=Yp9GsswZrOjkJFs_TcpbuIFtjuh3IlAh0i9OBpHB7Adq9Gv4uAev5nQ3f0MVOln3W8GnVMY0RoQ-bYvisq6KRgqYisuY_XYrVbcUzN_QpZL9JDVGIBC1jGFUChNNH2TjBlwM-CsQ5aXTlKBfP714uqi2GZcpPdZ40YC2KYKSBFBXJf5rJR3LBW3zntNbtGU6UOREDux4SyAY7Y4CRxAIfGH33mnnuYB0BNQhXCe7XwHH1xQc7TQNUyimTIkXR9gK8uAy52Wa-rfxYhOc9OLoLM-0oHscofKy2uMc1D4OPhNq8l7ExPVzOOMwynQYbAvk) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96bb44cc0d8e47a18da619b31dde52b6&_e=Yp9GsswZrOjkJFs_TcpbuIFtjuh3IlAh0i9OBpHB7Adq9Gv4uAev5nQ3f0MVOln3W8GnVMY0RoQ-bYvisq6KRgqYisuY_XYrVbcUzN_QpZL9JDVGIBC1jGFUChNNH2TjBlwM-CsQ5aXTlKBfP714uiRGfcBrc0yZwYkhk1e-alftCiQt0q6Qxgei7uL7ETqdKL5pQ4norW_DwFsA-eZPfwSgaBiz5W89O8J7Hc1qz1aGgLXgRMPPSMS7fg-pl7gGoRfoSjbCP0CdjXsQerg0zqv_4wZPv_zNw8SWBBNYbRdRq7yCkziI9LweGtUae7fD)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96bb44cc0d8e47a18da619b31dde52b6&_e=Yp9GsswZrOjkJFs_TcpbuIFtjuh3IlAh0i9OBpHB7Adq9Gv4uAev5nQ3f0MVOln3W8GnVMY0RoQ-bYvisq6KRgqYisuY_XYrVbcUzN_QpZL9JDVGIBC1jGFUChNNH2TjBlwM-CsQ5aXTlKBfP714uqpjmzY1yIMJaFrBwL7VFqxOlV2FAexs-UgdBxDnEbSE9zLCrDqv1OqzXCUJFXQExM89vwF-NKjmNQjMGlaba_aG_UOBzdw_E1pW83-5uSOyBDjw9HJsdmzoveGz2xE-F5gYiGWE4vwJTz8-zgRtO2zWBAqhiP9kC78qLq8eINNj) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities.
