name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The first immigrant in Congress to hold this role
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m the newest Ranking Member of the House Judiciary Committee’s Subcommittee on Immigration Integrity, Security, and Enforcement.
#
Peter, I’m honored and humbled to share with you that **I’ve been named the _Ranking Member_ for the Judiciary’s Committee’s Subcommittee on Immigration.**
I came to this country when I was 16, alone, and with nothing in my pockets. After 17 years on an alphabet soup of visas to become a U.S. citizen, I was lucky enough to have the opportunity to live the American Dream, a dream that is out of reach for too many immigrants today. It’s time for that to change.
**As the first South Asian woman elected to the U.S. House of Representatives and one of only two dozen naturalized citizens in Congress,** I’m ready to serve and bring my own life experiences to this critical role.
It is extremely meaningful to me that after everything it took for me to journey to the U.S., navigate the citizenship process, and win election to Congress, I will now be in this position to better move the needle and re-center our broken immigration system around dignity, humanity, and justice.
[**I ran for Congress because I saw a need for genuine leadership from people like me — and because of you, this is all possible. Can I ask for your support one more time to shore up our resources in light of this historic news?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33748?refcode=em20230206-2126&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2126%2E420207%2EIqmVcr)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33748?refcode=em20230206-2126&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2126%2E420207%2EIqmVcr)**
I have been fighting to reform our immigration laws from the moment I first set foot in Congress, and I am proud of the landmark bills I’ve introduced, including:
* _Roadmap to Freedom Resolution_
* _Access to Counsel Act_
* _Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act_
* _WISE Act_
* _Protection of Kids in Immigrant Detention Act_
* _HEAL Act_

But for me, this work started long before I was elected to the House of Representatives. For many years, I organized as an activist for immigrants’ rights.
I sued George Bush’s administration and was recognized by President Obama — in other words, I’m not afraid to get in the trenches and I know what’s worth fighting for. I fought **unjust deportations** , advocated for **newly naturalized and immigrant Americans** , and mobilized women against **cruel family separation policies**.
[**As Ranking Member, I intend to do everything in my power to stop the GOP’s cruel agenda and fight for our communities. Will you chip in to stand with me?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33748?refcode=em20230206-2126amounts%3D5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2126%2E420207%2EIqmVcr)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/33748?refcode=em20230206-2126&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2126%2E420207%2EIqmVcr)**
It’s clear that the Republican leadership of the Judiciary Committee has no intention to engage in good faith or reform our immigration laws for the better. It is up to us to stand up to the GOP’s extreme agenda and protect our people — and I will. **This is the work that I came to Congress to do.** Along with the rest of our movement for all forms of social, racial, economic, and environmental justice, I promise you to never stop fighting.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230206-2126-footer&t=23&refcode2=2126_420207_IqmVcr&akid=2126%2E420207%2EIqmVcr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2126%2E420207%2EIqmVcr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2126%2E420207%2EIqmVcr)

Peter, I’m honored and humbled to share with you that I’ve been named the Ranking Member for the Judiciary’s Committee’s Subcommittee on Immigration. I came to this country when I was 16, alone, and with nothing in my pockets. After 17 years on an alphabet soup of visas to become a U.S. citizen, I was lucky enough to have the opportunity to live the American Dream, a dream that is out of reach for too many immigrants today. It’s time for that to change. As the first South Asian woman elected to the U.S. House of Representatives and one of only two dozen naturalized citizens in Congress, I’m ready to serve and bring my own life experiences to this critical role. It is extremely meaningful to me that after everything it took for me to journey to the U.S., navigate the citizenship process, and win election to Congress, I will now be in this position to better move the needle and re-center our broken immigration system around dignity, humanity, and justice. I have been fighting to reform our immigration laws from the moment I first set foot in Congress, and I am proud of the landmark bills I’ve introduced, including: Roadmap to Freedom Resolution Access to Counsel Act Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act WISE Act Protection of Kids in Immigrant Detention Act HEAL Act But for me, this work started long before I was elected to the House of Representatives. For many years, I organized as an activist for immigrants’ rights. I sued George Bush’s administration and was recognized by President Obama — in other words, I’m not afraid to get in the trenches and I know what’s worth fighting for. I fought unjust deportations , advocated for newly naturalized and immigrant Americans , and mobilized women against cruel family separation policies. It’s clear that the Republican leadership of the Judiciary Committee has no intention to engage in good faith or reform our immigration laws for the better. If all goes as expected, this will mean three new Democrats to replace the three Democrats who had previously held these seats. Two of the three won higher elected positions in November including Summer Lee (now Congresswoman) and Austin Davis (now Lt. Governor). Both elevations left vacancies, along with the passing of State Representative Anthony DeLuca. With our help, these districts will continue to be held by Democrats and at long last, a constitutional Democratic majority that reflects the will of the people.

**But we must not take these results for granted, or the people we need to get out and vote for them.** **[Our time is limited, and we still have a lot of people to reach before polls close tomorrow. Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35

clean_body: Tomorrow’s special elections will determine the PA House majority. = | Fellow activist, = = = = = Pennsylvanians deserve a reflective state legislature that prioritizes the needs of the community, and that all comes down to TOMORROW’s special elections in three State House Districts: 32, 34, and 35 in Allegheny County. If all goes as expected, this will mean three new Democrats to replace the three Democrats who had previously held these seats. Two of the three won higher elected positions in November including Summer Lee (now Congresswoman) and Austin Davis (now Lt. Governor). Both elevations left vacancies, along with the passing of State Representative Anthony DeLuca. With our help, these districts will continue to be held by Democrats and at long last, a constitutional Democratic majority that reflects the will of the people. But we must not take these results for granted, or the people we need to get out and vote for them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. I just introduced a **CONSTITUTIONAL AMENDMENT** to impose**TERM LIMITS** on Senators and House Members serving in the United States Government.

Imposing TERM LIMITS is one of the only ways to fix how broken Washington has become. **Our great Founding Fathers never envisioned** a Federal Government that only served a small group of political insiders and special interests at the top, gaming the system while RUNNING OVER the American people.

It's finally time we do something about the entrenched politicians in Washington. I want to know what YOU think about my Constitutional Amendment to impose TERM LIMITS on Senators and House Members.

clean_body: Friend, It's time to return power to the American people and remove it from entrenched Washington politicians. ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** I just introduced a CONSTITUTIONAL AMENDMENT to imposeTERM LIMITS on Senators and House Members serving in the United States Government. Imposing TERM LIMITS is one of the only ways to fix how broken Washington has become. Our great Founding Fathers never envisioned a Federal Government that only served a small group of political insiders and special interests at the top, gaming the system while RUNNING OVER the American people. It's finally time we do something about the entrenched politicians in Washington. I want to know what YOU think about my Constitutional Amendment to impose TERM LIMITS on Senators and House Members. **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Term limits will bring ACCOUNTABILITY that is LONG overdue in Washington, and I'm fighting for the American people to get this done. I'll look for YOUR response soon, Friend. Please hurry. Thank you, Ted Cruz United States Senator from Texas ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand (via RBG)
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please [click here](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1677%2E564421%2E8n6SEr). If you no longer want to receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.ronbegone.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1677%2E564421%2E8n6SEr).
---
I wanted to share this with you personally, friend:

**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important.**

The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.

But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.

**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, folks. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**

[**Please, will you split $3 between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15417?t=9&akid=1677%2E564421%2E8n6SEr) I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.

But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.

**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.** [**Please, will you split $3 between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15417?t=11&akid=1677%2E564421%2E8n6SEr) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15423?t=17&akid=1677%2E564421%2E8n6SEr)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15424?t=18&akid=1677%2E564421%2E8n6SEr)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15425?t=19&akid=1677%2E564421%2E8n6SEr)
Thank you,

Kirsten
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! They're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bfb7fd4e01642a292f8dddc2dafb4bc&_e=DHVD64YzxHZYBS3qz4yTYMhjE0TqW4NSH9qxjkb5yQyTRtP0hZQp0Qyb5mykc6ELfpikiarfZgeTRxkTet0FUBwk3QOm9fmzs8DO9e-8AhCXuizgl0D2wYife4jRcTzJ3pJmWLTjLAydWCE6VfhNJbp55N_bf2Kchq26KoS49xN03wjwqGU6_qidUVE7WV605QuB79s0SUZwCVU7pCWNTxBQnOEXTuw5akYu2G2UDsaVgdW1wsXR5yKEUDlOR3-b7BwFL6DL0rS82vkYfAGOLY7_IaSBRaUM4bOXbN8eqoNUa7doa_cnyCC-Ft65zt1V) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bfb7fd4e01642a292f8dddc2dafb4bc&_e=DHVD64YzxHZYBS3qz4yTYMhjE0TqW4NSH9qxjkb5yQyTRtP0hZQp0Qyb5mykc6ELfpikiarfZgeTRxkTet0FUBwk3QOm9fmzs8DO9e-8AhCXuizgl0D2wYife4jRcTzJ3pJmWLTjLAydWCE6VfhNJbp55N_bf2Kchq26KoS49xP0KwdArGSgxwEHUykKHDD2QFLUmPQmyJPvICkOs9PSZ8vMXLrRvOOm2QghTKkxneNxhNSkIIR9wPm3VgGr9NdKKoMnxhwqpQsOwhKYhp44dx4TLSyIuiwMMZHQSziAy2nzq66fxZd5w0JAoPb8VP_v)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bfb7fd4e01642a292f8dddc2dafb4bc&_e=DHVD64YzxHZYBS3qz4yTYMhjE0TqW4NSH9qxjkb5yQyTRtP0hZQp0Qyb5mykc6ELfpikiarfZgeTRxkTet0FUBwk3QOm9fmzs8DO9e-8AhCXuizgl0D2wYife4jRcTzJ3pJmWLTjLAydWCE6VfhNJbp55N_bf2Kchq26KoS49xMzB6XPxFQ24XTN42xaVRDj7RzszZAiwRZdp3FJTiOF2DIKYiU9_0UGKyqU9ZMnM4-8oIn_hf0O1tkojdwvw-RNMTj_5sUrJSNudhj2xa0SWCTiOnJGUP8pXs49egvgGj34bFwCr5EKHJdhYiLbStGe)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bfb7fd4e01642a292f8dddc2dafb4bc&_e=DHVD64YzxHZYBS3qz4yTYMhjE0TqW4NSH9qxjkb5yQyTRtP0hZQp0Qyb5mykc6ELfpikiarfZgeTRxkTet0FUBwk3QOm9fmzs8DO9e-8AhCXuizgl0D2wYife4jRcTzJ3pJmWLTjLAydWCE6VfhNJbp55N_bf2Kchq26KoS49xPtzBBGKVnWCYRt6FC244Yll737TED9yOD9QVqHF5LIdmO3O4r9EJ6HhAH9pLjBaESsTl9szlzKfJ57WLc5gtM3jRvSgQrTYw-ITOIjl0pw_k6qYyN5JtGoAD9atHvbNfLSS-H1IQO_qKxu1TcXt1oh)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bfb7fd4e01642a292f8dddc2dafb4bc&_e=DHVD64YzxHZYBS3qz4yTYMhjE0TqW4NSH9qxjkb5yQyTRtP0hZQp0Qyb5mykc6ELfpikiarfZgeTRxkTet0FUBwk3QOm9fmzs8DO9e-8AhCXuizgl0D2wYife4jRcTzJ3pJmWLTjLAydWCE6VfhNJbp55N_bf2Kchq26KoS49xN1Wd1MmFnXblKP3ZuPKWG7CSKktuBq2fLJn_tP1gqYlUVDbZ1kQzo0Te1zvk6Me2JV97WIYJiSM-gCZb1qFTDu2YcuzBlleq4EERJZPRGQgKRn36-UK7JIe2dYtFhBjZLHfsd5csfBp3YJiyPor5We)

At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit. Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Wynne?=
subject: We agree with Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros and Michael Bloomberg
body:
they’re trying to chip away at our rights, but together we can protect the Constitution | | | | | | | | | **🚨 2A FLASH POLL 🚨** **Judges in state courts should protect our Second Amendment rights.** [**_YES >>_**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=adb9eb8d5a&e=fdefed58de) [**_ABSOLUTELY >>_**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=328c3e6eef&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Friend, In last year’s landmark _Bruen_ decision, the Supreme Court reaffirmed our Second Amendment rights _are_ guaranteed, both inside AND outside the home. **Now, woke judges at the state and federal levels are trying to circumvent this monumental decision, and effectively rewrite the law of the land.** For too long, radicals in this country have utilized our judicial system as their _[**liberal enforcement offices**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8e4f765fd4&e=fdefed58de)_. State court judges step beyond their authority when they practically rewrite laws, forfeit liberty, and overrule the will of the people. **_Thankfully, Supreme Court Justices Samuel Alito and Clarence Thomas are watching these state courts like a hawk._**
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0ee1acff61&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, your right to keep and bear arms is not equally protected in every state and jurisdiction. In fact, the Left continues to chip away at our Second Amendment rights in areas where judges are bought and paid for by George Soros and Michael Bloomberg. **We need judges who respect our God-given rights and defend them._[Do you agree?](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=eb77dd4dd4&e=fdefed58de)_** If we want to protect our Second Amendment rights for generations to come, we must invest in electing judges who will follow every SCOTUS decision, including controversial ones like _Bruen_. **_Because if woke judges ignore this ruling, NOTHING is stopping them from cherry-picking future SCOTUS decisions and chipping away at our other rights._**
---
[**PROTECT THE SECOND AMENDMENT**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3b952b42cc&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Fair Courts America exists to defend our judicial system from activist judges who want to dismantle our constitutional rights and legislate from the bench. Friend, we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like you to stand with FCA to ensure our 2A rights are protected for generations to come. [**_Will you chip in to the Fair Courts America 2A Defense Fund and help us elect judges who will defend our right to keep & bear arms in every state?_**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f47edec6da&e=fdefed58de)
---

|

**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Hey Peter,

I’m calling it now: Joe Biden will ignore the myriad of failures over the past year in his upcoming State of the Union address on Tuesday. He’ll paint a rosy picture of the United States and completely ignore the real issues at hand: crime, inflation, and a wide-open border.

Our families, our jobs, and our values are under attack every day, but Joe Biden is dangerously incompetent to solve anything.

Our **BEST** way to show President Biden and his radical left administration that he is **FAILING** the American people is to take back the Senate and support Republicans now.

**[That’s why I’m emailing you, Peter. I need my top supporters to rally together and rush a donation BEFORE Tuesday. clean_body: Biden’s Rosy Picture v. Reality | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hey Peter, I’m calling it now: Joe Biden will ignore the myriad of failures over the past year in his upcoming State of the Union address on Tuesday. He’ll paint a rosy picture of the United States and completely ignore the real issues at hand: crime, inflation, and a wide-open border. Our families, our jobs, and our values are under attack every day, but Joe Biden is dangerously incompetent to solve anything. Our BEST way to show President Biden and his radical left administration that he is FAILING the American people is to take back the Senate and support Republicans now. | -Senator Ted Budd | Senator Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they’re doing to our kids?
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecbd7cd439534a8fbea9de93cc338254&_e=ycAvwdX0-wpbN2RYeVzRGjtzuT0bbuNhp_FPz28fVS2lQuk2vM1mP4MCWGCrMDXxZAu0hqdXpZtcmdLdgOA5n7eMfpKhjX2VYiSI4yDegV4pWjs4dijDepVHrkTa3B6IfWc_yXbxw2P4dDDIHLWDLYCIweiTeMRrMYcY--Zb3AePV_w3nu7kwVVQapQNpXVv8Q9-b5pmOycOVBJFEUxBg1vSrQlxFkgWj72XOq84VznvulTLFsk-5nvswzgY_ZQe49DNqBUJ26kSWazXfaYIMCwC6viQY3Y4ROEOyXTpkSL86enrwvWFLFreju-8E7ZcV6Eigh6AG4HnOo8jntPyag1AmvXmHlcA9nUWw4C5XUTYvYaW05C_K7jydJoLaKKGRNb6Tu4iZL7Aae2ZtTDRHw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecbd7cd439534a8fbea9de93cc338254&_e=ycAvwdX0-wpbN2RYeVzRGjtzuT0bbuNhp_FPz28fVS2lQuk2vM1mP4MCWGCrMDXxZAu0hqdXpZtcmdLdgOA5n7eMfpKhjX2VYiSI4yDegV4pWjs4dijDepVHrkTa3B6IfWc_yXbxw2P4dDDIHLWDLYCIweiTeMRrMYcY--Zb3AePV_w3nu7kwVVQapQNpXVv8Q9-b5pmOycOVBJFEUxBg1vSrQlxFkgWj72XOq84VznvulTLFsk-5nvswzgY_ZQezBFu5NKc4LHxvb_qOGXjrTVE0I08HLqEw3NMVvIEuUstV21MXP0SCidN1600-n_NVJheudgglHg6T2jREoh72VNKSTW-9V2ARx2moVfKETLcxZQg7rNpoI4gK1bAdN0mS4I_mFmVPTyL1H6JZi2SMA%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecbd7cd439534a8fbea9de93cc338254&_e=ycAvwdX0-wpbN2RYeVzRGjtzuT0bbuNhp_FPz28fVS2lQuk2vM1mP4MCWGCrMDXxZAu0hqdXpZtcmdLdgOA5n7eMfpKhjX2VYiSI4yDegV4pWjs4dijDepVHrkTa3B6IfWc_yXbxw2P4dDDIHLWDLYCIweiTeMRrMYcY--Zb3AePV_w3nu7kwVVQapQNpXVv8Q9-b5pmOycOVBJFEUxBg1vSrQlxFkgWj72XOq84VznvulTLFsk-5nvswzgY_ZQeMVfXfh1BqDxtnLfCqdQsz-Ho5kryqDjmF98VmvjkAcSFaTH6AOLLIfWQzHqaAt33EZJi-wu2fEfFORUQ-YKudLDqY7HxOsqalGNoAEpLLqOxuETX1UBlu2UbTGaWXDMFL5EThwNgDNqxLXT8IVPgcw%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecbd7cd439534a8fbea9de93cc338254&_e=ycAvwdX0-wpbN2RYeVzRGjtzuT0bbuNhp_FPz28fVS2lQuk2vM1mP4MCWGCrMDXxZAu0hqdXpZtcmdLdgOA5n7eMfpKhjX2VYiSI4yDegV4pWjs4dijDepVHrkTa3B6IfWc_yXbxw2P4dDDIHLWDLYCIweiTeMRrMYcY--Zb3AePV_w3nu7kwVVQapQNpXVv8Q9-b5pmOycOVBJFEUxBg1vSrQlxFkgWj72XOq84VznvulTLFsk-5nvswzgY_ZQeCVU_ADNV-gBOraFl8RIrE488yVyw4h2uHGdeV7wDRGqkx_xwhRURF2CXipuR3w37hogOI8I8cIEW0z9uN3d7IH4vkmTdRgp8fdoSY95e6JcYwzWIf-BMCSLQq5yIkoFdjU9uua6yaZsPhEZFiizxXg%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecbd7cd439534a8fbea9de93cc338254&_e=ycAvwdX0-wpbN2RYeVzRGjtzuT0bbuNhp_FPz28fVS2lQuk2vM1mP4MCWGCrMDXxZAu0hqdXpZtcmdLdgOA5n7eMfpKhjX2VYiSI4yDegV4pWjs4dijDepVHrkTa3B6IfWc_yXbxw2P4dDDIHLWDLYCIweiTeMRrMYcY--Zb3AePV_w3nu7kwVVQapQNpXVv8Q9-b5pmOycOVBJFEUxBg1vSrQlxFkgWj72XOq84VznvulTLFsk-5nvswzgY_ZQew6b4Avof3DWviFHff9ol2A-TX1pAtDZI5uilwGMUSH6l3vhXCw_JoatFid7SsGu1NFw00NA2P6o84-mIp7X67Ec2B-dbKBtJSUXCLCPAUJbsycZgP6E-ka4E8WxVPekrZ1sY2ocWZfv_MyV6zKIS2g%3D%3D)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecbd7cd439534a8fbea9de93cc338254&_e=ycAvwdX0-wpbN2RYeVzRGjtzuT0bbuNhp_FPz28fVS2lQuk2vM1mP4MCWGCrMDXxZAu0hqdXpZtcmdLdgOA5n7eMfpKhjX2VYiSI4yDegV4pWjs4dijDepVHrkTa3B6IfWc_yXbxw2P4dDDIHLWDLYCIweiTeMRrMYcY--Zb3AePV_w3nu7kwVVQapQNpXVv8Q9-b5pmOycOVBJFEUxBg1vSrQlxFkgWj72XOq84VznvulTLFsk-5nvswzgY_ZQeY_wRWoeoYqai-2lR3YJjz1NKnmVK2DCLRQaE1P0ImWRlI5HMiQrbh6JbwdGPkTU0peyPAMyRIocDlsv9IyE7WPrOl2Fon5XfwsfN56_xvRXe7smUfI2VjZ1F_1lk2Gs1Rqy5My5xomNTuKXHKqLzwA%3D%3D) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecbd7cd439534a8fbea9de93cc338254&_e=ycAvwdX0-wpbN2RYeVzRGjtzuT0bbuNhp_FPz28fVS2lQuk2vM1mP4MCWGCrMDXxZAu0hqdXpZtcmdLdgOA5n7eMfpKhjX2VYiSI4yDegV4pWjs4dijDepVHrkTa3B6IfWc_yXbxw2P4dDDIHLWDLYCIweiTeMRrMYcY--Zb3AePV_w3nu7kwVVQapQNpXVv8Q9-b5pmOycOVBJFEUxBg1vSrQlxFkgWj72XOq84VznvulTLFsk-5nvswzgY_ZQeztvmcxsHxZmamDjhg6CfTKXPlDrRkPkmbd19clKAVV_yhAHkK5utHwdCD_S3ala75TmCR_yKUZyCl5ZrXPBikMopB-njNtSZXvxkrmMnI4dyN5wTlTNoElduvlJLTG6_vDg8_BuNWI7v9ZagWPc00A%3D%3D)

| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecbd7cd439534a8fbea9de93cc338254&_e=ycAvwdX0-wpbN2RYeVzRGjtzuT0bbuNhp_FPz28fVS2lQuk2vM1mP4MCWGCrMDXxZAu0hqdXpZtcmdLdgOA5n7eMfpKhjX2VYiSI4yDegV4pWjs4dijDepVHrkTa3B6IfWc_yXbxw2P4dDDIHLWDLYCIweiTeMRrMYcY--Zb3AePV_w3nu7kwVVQapQNpXVv8Q9-b5pmOycOVBJFEUxBg1vSrQlxFkgWj72XOq84VznvulTLFsk-5nvswzgY_ZQepK8KSHW-a4ZVQWuL46JbH8E--A1gst-l9Co6qhtBv5FX-zl63YjgPUqIJsH0qU0di3kPF-tDFQmOLSIgpulUhpD_LHREN7yRYJ4BF0lOshxuWAO4jNFp7lpzK7nKU4hAdPoNIGFDPhcOeMipTPLmUA%3D%3D)
